Name: VehicleCare
Description:
Motor insurance claims in India suffer from unpredictable outcomes, inconsistent repairs, and poor customer experience.

VehicleCare is building a full-stack motor claims fulfillment platform that delivers predictable, transparent, and reliable claim outcomes by managing the repair ecosystem end-to-end.

We work with independent vehicle workshops to create a disciplined, accountable repair network—bringing standard pricing, SOPs, quality benchmarks, and SLA-driven execution.

In parallel, we partner with insurers and brokers to reduce claims leakage, improve turnaround time, and provide real-time visibility across the repair and settlement lifecycle.

This is an operations-first business, powered by technology—where execution, trust, and incentives matter as much as software.

Our focus areas:
• Managed & franchise workshop networks
• Motor claims operations & fulfillment
• Repair standardization & cost control
• Claims transparency & auditability
• Faster, fairer claims experience for customers

We believe fixing motor claims requires controlling outcomes—not just digitizing processes.

Name: Big O Tires
Description:
The Big O Tires story begins back in 1962, just as America's new love affair with the automobile was hitting high gear. The market for replacement tires was exploding, and independent tire dealers found themselves struggling to compete in the face of low prices offered by major tire manufacturers' own company stores. Big O's founding fathers were a handful of progressive independent tire dealers who decided to band together to form a tire-buying cooperative so that they could secure volume pricing and keep their customers happy. Their concept worked. In the years that followed, The Big O Tires co-op evolved into a full-fledged franchise as it continued to find innovative ways to harness the power of the collective to benefit independent dealerships and their customers.
 
Almost a half-decade later, Big O Tires has become North America's largest retail tire franchisor, with over 400 independently-owned and operated locations, providing customers with a broad range of automotive services in addition to quality tires, wheels and accessories. Big O has become an industry role model admired for its innovative approach to franchising and unmatched customer loyalty ratings.
 
In 1996, Big O Tires joined forces with one of the largest and most respected tire marketers in the nation when it became part of TBC Corporation. Big O's reach was broadened again in 2005, when TBC Corporation was acquired by Sumitomo Corporation of America, the largest wholly-owned subsidiary of Tokyo-based Sumitomo, one of the world's leading traders of goods and services.
 
As Big O Tires continues to thrive and adapt to an ever-changing marketplace, it remains rooted in its humble beginnings as a proud collective of independent dealers committed to putting its customers first.

Description:
The story of RAMY dates back to 1992, when an off-road enthusiast combined passion with profession, founding a company that supplied 4x4 parts and car care products in the UAE – home to some of the most majestic deserts and off-road terrain across the globe. With the rise of motorsports and outdoor adventures, it was not long until RAMY started serving the entire Gulf region. Having evolved into a family business with the second generation of automotive enthusiasts, RAMY expanded its outreach to sourcing products from the world’s top car accessory brands and suppliers.

Apart from its showrooms in the UAE and Oman, RAMY has its own in-house fully equipped workshop where a team of skilled mechanics installs all purchased parts and helps customize vehicles in a personalized manner for each individual client; we are a one-stop shop offering a multitude of services to bring our clients convenience and efficiency all at once. 

Today, we are proud to be recognised as the longest standing and most experienced in our field. Quality and customer satisfaction are at the core of what we do, and our dedicated team of sales and technical advisors and engineers is committed to ensuring the finest results that help create lasting relationships with each and every client.

As off-roaders ourselves, we understand that your car is your greatest connection to the road and the sand, and we acknowledge that every individual has different needs and tastes. That’s why we strive to find the best solutions for each client’s performance both on and off the tracks!

Our clients range from beginner level off-roaders to advanced dune bashers, and from distributors and car dealerships to government departments. We have something in store for everyone.

We’ll go that extra mile to get your smile is our motto, and the satisfaction of our clients is our top priority.

Name: Certified Automotive Parts Association (CAPA)
Description:
Certified Automotive Parts Association (CAPA) is an independent, nonprofit organization established in 1987 to protect consumers and the collision repair industry by setting trusted standards for automotive replacement parts.

CAPA exists solely in the public interest. We do not manufacture, sell, or distribute parts—and we have no financial stake in which parts pass or fail certification. Our role is to provide independent, unbiased verification of quality, safety, and performance.

Through rigorous, transparent testing, CAPA Certification helps consumers, auto body shops, parts distributors, insurers, and regulators identify replacement parts that fit properly, perform reliably, last over time, and meet safety expectations comparable to original equipment. Appearance, branding, or visual inspection alone cannot determine whether a part will truly perform as intended.

To date, more than 190 million replacement parts have earned CAPA Certification, making it one of the most widely respected quality assurance programs in the automotive aftermarket. CAPA Certification is also recognized by government and regulatory agencies as an assurance of quality.

Every CAPA Certified part carries the distinctive blue and yellow CAPA Quality Seal, which appears only on parts that meet or exceed CAPA Standards.
No seal. No certification.

________________________________________


Vision
To be the most trusted industry standard for quality automotive replacement parts and services that protect consumers.

Mission
To ensure consumers have access to high-quality automotive replacement parts and services by identifying safe, sustainable options at competitive prices.

With state-of-the-art facilities and a team of highly skilled technicians, ACR delivers comprehensive automotive care — from routine maintenance and running repairs to advanced diagnostics, complex mechanical jobs, and complete reconditioning. Our standardized processes, modern equipment, and deep technical proficiency ensure accuracy, reliability, and long-term performance for every vehicle.

Customer trust is central to our approach. Transparent estimates, clear communication, timely delivery, and consistent service quality drive the seamless and premium experience we promise to every car owner.

ACR is also strongly aligned to serve B2B clients, insurance companies, fleet operators, used-car reconditioning programs, and direct customers , offering scalable service solutions that prioritize reliability, turnaround time, and predictable quality.

As we expand rapidly across Delhi NCR and beyond, our mission and vision continue to guide our path:

Our Mission:
To deliver reliable, high-quality automotive service through expert workmanship, transparent processes, and tech-enabled convenience — ensuring every customer enjoys a premium, seamless, and value-driven experience.

Our Vision:
To lead India’s automotive aftermarket transformation by building the largest trusted ecosystem for multibrand car care — known for quality, honesty, and operational excellence.

With a focused expansion roadmap, ACR is committed to becoming India’s largest self-owned multibrand car workshop chain , setting new benchmarks for service excellence and becoming the most trusted partner in every customer’s ownership journey.

Your vehicle deserves the best — and we are here to deliver it.

Introducing ECS, the Ezi Compliance System. The ultimate solution for all your BS10125 compliance needs.

ECS enables you to conveniently manage all your paperwork, procedures, declarations, and matrices online, in one central location.  
It also allows you to schedule and book all your staff, equipment, and training requirements.  

Plus, ECS is a completely paperless and cloud-based system, enabling remote, multi-user access from any device, anywhere.

The portal is designed to be user-friendly, so that all BS10125 compliance can be managed internally by the bodyshop, with our team of Ezi Compliance experts always available to provide ongoing support.

ECS is a live, fully diarised system that sends push notifications to alert you and your suppliers when any service, calibration, assessment, or internal audit is due.

Sound interesting? Book a free demo today and find out how the Ezi Compliance System can revolutionise your bodyshop standards management at hello@ezicompliancesystem.uk

Name: AAMCO Transmissions & Total Car Care ( St. Matthews - Louisville, Kentucky )
Description:
AAMCO East is a AAMCO Transmissions and Total Car Care Franchise, our professional, highly-trained technicians can perform quality auto repairs on your vehicle using the latest technologies. When you bring your car in for service, we always conduct a thorough evaluation of your vehicle’s repair needs so that we can be 100% certain before moving forward with repairs. We also back all of our work with a comprehensive warranty.

AAMCO East is a local company with a nationwide presence, and we understand that our reputation is tied to each and every customer who walks through our doors, which is why we make sure to provide honest, thorough, and complete service to everyone.

Our services include transmission repair on both manual and automatic transmissions. If repair isn’t an option, we can rebuild or replace your vehicle’s transmission. We also offer free towing with any major transmission or auto repair. We provide complete electronic diagnostics (including the engine), TranScan and external diagnostics, differential repair and overhaul, brake service and repair, engine tune-up and fuel injection cleaning, steering and suspension repair, transfer case and differential service, and so much more. You can also count on us for factory-recommended maintenance and general auto repairs.

For all of your transmission and auto repair needs, you can depend on AAMCO East. We offer a local fleet program that will help keep your vehicles on the road with warranty coverage that is comparable to our national fleets. Call or stop in today to learn more.

Onze waarden, oprechtheid, betrouwbaarheid, duidelijke communicatie, kwaliteit, veiligheid en duurzaamheid zijn geen holle woorden, maar dagelijkse praktijk.

Nieuwsgierig wat wij voor jou kunnen betekenen? Spring gerust eens binnen of geef ons een seintje!

Name: London Auto Haus
Description:
London Auto Haus is part of the Celtic Tuning dealer program which has been operating for over 20 years.  The current economic climate and associated exponential rise in the cost of fossil fuels, has impacted hard on the fleet sector and as a direct consequence has put ever-increasing importance on tackling fuel wastage and fuel management.   
Celtic Tuning is one of the leaders in Electronic Engine Enhancements with a global dealer network and major franchises as far afield as Malaysia, South Korea, and South Africa. Celtic Tuning’s knowledge and expertise have allowed it to reverse engineer engine management software for performance enhancements and has since extended its portfolio of products and developments to specifically target individual market sectors.   
Over the last 13 years, Celtic Tuning has put extensive resources and development into the economy tuning market to levels rivaled by no other.  The goal was purely to improve KM/L as much as possible whilst also taking into consideration the life cycle and maintenance schedules of the vehicle.   Our resulting software has led to the emergence of the London Auto Haus brand and our range of software which we refer to as ‘Eco Re-calibration’.   
London Auto Haus focuses on intelligent engine management software to improve business performance by reducing operational costs and reducing the impact on the environment.    
With our working Specialised workshop, we can offer you a professional all-round service which is bespoke

We offer the following:
•	Fuel Economy Re-calibration
•	Speed Limiter Installation 
•	Rev limiter Installation
•	Engine Diagnostics

Además, nos enorgullece ofrecer servicios de formación en mecánica de competición, tanto en modalidad online como presencial, contribuyendo al desarrollo de profesionales altamente capacitados en el mundo del motorsport.

Además de nuestra dedicación a la excelencia técnica, brindamos servicios de asesoría técnica en motorsport, donde nuestros expertos proporcionan conocimientos especializados para optimizar el rendimiento de los vehículos y mejorar la eficiencia operativa de los equipos. La gestión integral de equipos es otra de nuestras fortalezas, asegurando una coordinación eficaz y una ejecución sin contratiempos durante las competiciones.

Como parte de nuestra visión de contribuir al crecimiento y la promoción del motorsport, nos especializamos en el diseño, distribución y venta de nuestros propios productos específicos para el cuidado y lubricación para automoción

En resumen, en Rbs Racing S.L., nos enorgullece ser una empresa versátil y completa en el ámbito de los vehículos de competición, proporcionando soluciones integrales que abarcan desde la creación y optimización de vehículos hasta la formación, asesoría técnica y gestión de eventos en el apasionante mundo del motorsport.

Name: Guru Motors Srl
Description:
Guru motors srl è costituita da multipli dipartimenti che collaborano tra loro allo scopo di fornire servizi di manutenzione dei Autoveicoli. Come reparto meccanico,
officina di carrozzeria, reparto pneumatici, reparto riparazione elettronica e meccanica ECU. Siamo orgogliosi di offrire una vasta gamma di meccanici esperti servizi per mantenere il tuo veicolo in perfetta efficienza. I nostri tecnici qualificati si impegnano a fornire un'assistenza di prim'ordine la tua auto, garantendo prestazioni e affidabilità ottimali. Il nostro ambito di lavoro meccanico include il periodico completo servizio alle piccole riparazioni particolari:
1. Diagnostica e riparazione del motore:
Analisi approfondita delle prestazioni del motore.
Identificazione e risoluzione delle problematiche che influiscono sull'efficienza. In particolare la possibilità di aprire il passaggio benzina/diesel motori, sostituire le parti danneggiate e richiudere autonomamente.
2. Manutenzione del sistema frenante:
Ispezione e sostituzione delle pastiglie e dei rotori dei freni. Controlli e modifiche del liquido dei freni.
3. Servizi di sospensione e sterzo:
Valutazione dell'usura dei componenti delle sospensioni.
Servizi di allineamento per migliorare la manovrabilità e la longevità degli pneumatici.
4. Servizi di trasmissione:
Controlli e sostituzioni dell'olio della trasmissione.
5. Riparazioni del sistema di scarico:
Rilevazione e riparazione di perdite di scarico.
Sostituzione marmitte, catalizzatori e tubi di scarico.
6. Controlli e modifiche dei fluidi:
Ispezione e rifornimento regolari dei fluidi essenziali (olio, liquido di raffreddamento, liquido del servosterzo, ecc.).
7. Riparazioni di impianti di climatizzazione e riscaldamento:
Diagnosi e riparazione di problemi relativi all'impianto di climatizzazione e riscaldamento compresa la ricarica del refrigerante.
8. Diagnosi e riparazione dell'impianto elettrico:
Risoluzione dei problemi e riparazione di problemi elettrici.
9. Servizi per pneumatic

Výhodou sítě je úzká spolupráce s velkou částí fleetového trhu, mnoha regionálními fleety, nadnárodními společnostmi a s téměř všemi leasingovými společnostmi.

Společnost klade důraz jak na kvalifikovanost a neustálé vzdělávání všech členů týmu, tak na kvalitu technologií, které jsou využívány na pobočkách. Cílem společnosti je být předním poskytovatelem automotive služeb.

Our seasoned team possesses invaluable insights into the vulnerabilities of various equipment components, ensuring that they receive extra attention during the rebuilding process. We begin by conducting a comprehensive evaluation of the assets requiring rebuilding, providing you with an accurate budget estimation for our rebuilding services. We approach our clients’ equipment with utmost care and respect, recognizing its pivotal role as the lifeblood of their companies.

At Revitalize Mixers, we manufacture high-quality, lightweight aluminum extension chutes for the Ready-Mix industry. Designed for durability and driver safety, our chutes reduce strain and injury without compromising strength. Featuring a replaceable liner, they offer a cost-effective solution—allowing you to replace only the liner instead of the entire chute. Proudly made in the USA, our chutes are built with a relentless commitment to quality and customer satisfaction.

We are dedicated to continuous improvement, and stand firmly behind our mission statement, which encapsulates our commitment: “To delivering the best rebuilds, building the best equipment, and fostering enduring relationships for the future.”

Das eigene Neugummierungswerk in Aarau wurde bereits 1962 als erstes seiner Art von Pneu Egger eröffnet. Heute, mit einem jährlichen Volumen von rund 35'000 runderneuerten Reifen für LKW, Bus oder Baumaschinen, ist Pneu Egger nach wie vor der führende Schweizer Anbieter bei der Runderneuerung.

In allen Geschäftsbereichen hat die Qualität seit je her eine zentrale Bedeutung. Mit dem Resultat, dass wir als erstes Unternehmen aus der Reifenbranche, nach ISO 9001 sowie ISO 14001 für Umweltmanagementsysteme und 45001 für Arbeitssicherheit und Gesundheitsschutz zertifiziert sind.

Name: Black Falcon GmbH & Co.KG
Description:

Seit der Gründung im Jahr 2006 hat sich BLACK FALCON einen internationalen Namen im GT- und Langstreckenrennsport erarbeitet – dies unter anderem mit zahlreichen Erfolgen bei prestigeträchtigen Rennen wie dem 24h-Rennen Nürburgring, den 24h Dubai sowie bei der VLN/NLS und in internationalen GT-Serien.

Neben dem Motorsport bietet BLACK FALCON umfassende Dienstleistungen rund um High-Performance-Fahrzeuge an – darunter Fahrzeugaufbau, Wartung, Engineering sowie maßgeschneiderte Trackday- und Kundenevents. Das Unternehmen vereint technische Exzellenz, Ingenieurskunst und Motorsport-Leidenschaft unter einem Dach.

BLACK FALCON steht für Performance, Qualität und Präzision – auf und neben der Rennstrecke.

3 NYC Locations:

- Blue Star Brothers Auto Repair Center - Glendale, Queens
- Blue Star Brothers Auto Spa & Detailing Center - Greenpoint, Brooklyn

Description:
Precision Repair Group (PRG) is building a new kind of collision repair network that brings the benefits of national reach, local strength and genuine partnership to its customers. We’re bringing together strong, well-run independent repairers to create a national group built on quality outcomes and trusted relationships. Our aim is to protect what makes each business successful while investing in the people, capability and capacity needed for long-term growth.

Today, PRG includes leading repair businesses Alton Cars, Hilton Coachworks, Turners Accident Repair, HB Accident Repair Network and Fast Track ARC - with plans to add more brands in 2026 as we continue to grow responsibly and at pace.

People are, and will continue to be, at the heart of our business. We invest in teams, leadership and skills because our vision is to build a reputation on the pride and expertise of our colleagues. 

Whether you are a customer, a repairer interested in joining the group, or a professional looking for your next opportunity, PRG is creating a new kind of network focused on quality, collaboration and growth across the UK repair sector.

Description:

Sind unsere Kunden zufrieden, sind wir es auch. So sorgen unsere engagierten Mitarbeiter stets dafür, die Instandhaltung eines Fuhrparks möglichst aufwandsarm sowie betriebsnah zu gestalten. Diesen Service bieten wir sowohl bundesweit als auch im benachbarten Ausland an. Hierdurch können wir einen reibungslosen Wartungsablauf für Ihr Tagesgeschäft sicherstellen. Da On track seit 2018 Teil der TEX Gruppe ist, profitieren Sie darüber hinaus vom Zusammenhalt einer wachstumsstarken Branchengruppe im Bereich Bahndienstleistungen. In Kombination mit unseren individuell auf Ihre Bedürfnisse zugeschnittenen Angeboten wissen Sie: Wir setzen auf die Nummer 1 – und unsere Güterwaggons bleiben auch zukünftig on track.

Vi är ett familjeföretag i fjärde generationen med verksamhet på åtta orter; Karlskoga, Örebro, Västerås, Sala, Eskilstuna, Katrineholm, Nyköping och Norrköping. 2021 hade vi ca 170 anställda och en omsättning på drygt 700 mkr.

Description:
Motorrad Theory is a dynamic and versatile service provider specializing in tailored solutions for Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs), motorcycle communities, and direct-to-consumer (B2C) product sales. Since our inception, we have become a key player in the motorcycle industry, engaging with over 5,000 riders and racers, and converting more than 3,000 customers in just two years. With an 85% customer retention rate, we take pride in delivering exceptional value to both individual riders and corporate partners.

Our core services include premium motorcycle parts and accessories, end-to-end servicing solutions, custom race bike building, and advanced training through our racing academy. We also collaborate with professional racing teams, offering technical expertise and operational support to enhance their performance.

Notable achievements include partnerships with industry leaders such as KTM, Bosch, Ultraviolette, and Monster Energy, as well as impactful collaborations with rider communities and premium motorcycle clubs. From hosting MotoGP screening events to empowering women riders through training programs, we are dedicated to fostering a vibrant motorcycle culture.

Our technical expertise shines in initiatives like our partnership with Madrabbit Racing Academy and Racing Team, where we manage trackside operations and provide technical support. Additionally, our 100% success rate in rebuilding over 50 motorcycle engines reflects our commitment to quality and precision.

Motorrad Theory’s vision is to be the go-to partner for OEMs, racing teams, and motorcycle enthusiasts. By continuously innovating and expanding our services, we aim to elevate the motorcycling experience and drive the growth of motorcycle culture.

Xidmətlərimizə aşağıdakılar daxildir:
• Avtorizasiya xidmətləri;

• İxtisaslaşdırılmış ehtiyat hissələri ilə mağazalar (o cümlədən yağlar, təkərlər, akkumulyatorlar, filtrlər); 
.• Lisenziyalı audit və peşəkar mühəndislərin tövsiyələri.

Şirkət 29 ildir ki, Gürcüstan və Cənubi Qafqaz bazarlarında uğurla fəaliyyət göstərir və Mobil (ABŞ), Champion (Belçika) kimi 300-dən çox dünya şöhrətli brendin, eləcə də Bridgestone, Michelin, Continental, Pirelli, Varta, Exide, Shell, Motul, Mann Filter, Hengst, ZF Parts, Lemforder, Sachs, Philips, Bosch, Febi, Denso, Toptul, Sonax və digər markaların rəsmi distribütorudur.

Tegeta Motors 2017-ci ilin fevralında Bakıda Tegeta Motors Baku-nu təsis edib. Biz minik və yük avtomobilləri, avtobuslar, tikinti və xüsusi texnika üçün kompleks diaqnostika və təmir xidmətləri təqdim edirik. Servis mərkəzimiz ən müasir avadanlıq və mexanizmlərlə təchiz olunub.

Tegeta Motors Baku müştərilərinə geniş çeşiddə məhsul təklif edir: təkərlər, ehtiyat hissələri, sürtkü yağları, akkumulyatorlar, servis avadanlığı, alətlər və daha çox. Qısa müddət ərzində müştərilərin etimadını qazanaraq Azərbaycanın aparıcı şirkətlərindən biri kimi tanınmışıq. Pərakəndə satışla yanaşı, tikinti, yükdaşıma və neft sənayesində əsas şirkətlərlə əməkdaşlıq edərək korporativ satışlarda da fəal iştirak edirik.

Tegeta Motors Baku Azərbaycanda JCB texnikaların, eləcə də Champion və Motul yağlarının rəsmi distribütorudur.

Switch Glass est le reflet de notre volonté de changer les choses, de repousser les limites et de prouver que l’excellence n’a pas de genre.

 Switch Glass, ce n’est pas juste un nom : c’est une promesse d’ambition, d’intégrité et de progrès.

Name: Spark Group
Description:
In 1996 a group of highly motivated, professional and entrepreneurial –minded youths started a small PAN registered Vehicle rental company at Sorakhutte, Kathmandu with a few vehicles to meet the needs of the general market under the name of Kathmandu Vehicle Services.

In due course of time, the increasing of business relations with NGOs, INGOs, diplomatic missions, Hydropower companies and various ministries of Nepal government, the enterprising team incorporated another VAT registered vehicle rental company in 2010 with the name of Spark Link Enterprises. 

Considering the same nature of service but highly growing demands from both Private and Public sectors, Kathmandu Vehicle Services and Spark Link Enterprises were eventually merged into a single company under the name of Spark Group in the year 2011. It has duly registered with Company Registrar Office, Internal Revenue Office and local bodies (Cottage & Small Industry Department) as per the prevailing company's law of Nepal Government. It has a vast pool of manpower under one roof and it provides the most reliable and innovative services as per the needs of the various clients. 

In due course of time Spark Group has become the first ISO 9001-2015 Certified company in Nepal due to its Quality Management System for Vehicle Rental service. Our management team and employees have played a crucial role to achieve ISO certification. In today's cut-throat competition market in the field of vehicle rental service, we have established our brand identity among its valued clients -NGOs, INGOs, Diplomatic Missions, Hydropower Companies, Banks, Financial Institutions and various ministries of Nepal government in a short span of time.

Ceramic Coating: Our premium ceramic coating provides unparalleled protection against environmental contaminants and UV rays, while also enhancing the appearance of your vehicle's paint.

Description:

To deliver excellent reliable service, Logic Fleet consists of 4 divisions:

Logic Fleet Service Centre:

Logic Fleet Service Centre provides expert fleet maintenance, servicing, and repair, to all makes and models of cars and vans. 
We are located 500m from NCT test centre Greenhills & 1km from Spanners CVRT test centre. We take the hassle out of having your vehicle tested so that you may concentrate on running your business. You drop your vehicle off and pick up your replacement vehicle, have your vehicle serviced, inspected tested & returned to fleet washed and cleaned. 

Logic Fleet Commercials:

Logic Fleet Commercials provide cost effective service & repair solutions for HGV, LCV &Trailers. We specialise in providing gold-standard service and top-class pre- C V R T work. We’ll even bring it to the test centre for you and return it to your fleet washed and as good as new.

We specialise in service & repair for Fleets from 10-100 vehicles. Our commitment to you is to provide a quality service, with strong turn around times at affordable pricing. 

Logic Fleet Waste Division:

Our Waste Division specialises in the Sale, Service & Maintenance of Waste Vehicles, Moba On Board Weighing Systems, Skip & Hook Loaders.
Our Highly Skilled Team of Service Engineers carry out Routine & Breakdown Repairs on Refuse Collection Vehicles throughout Ireland.

Logic Fleet Parts Division:

We specialise in the supply of spare parts for refuse collection vehicles, hydraulic pumps & Pto’s, along with ancillary parts such as Roll on Roll Off Sheeting Systems.

We are member of SIMI and Agencies that we represent:

Hillend Engineering – Refuse Vehicles
Boughton – Skip Loaders & Hook Loaders
Moba – Bin Weighing

Description:
Premio Reifen + Autoservice: Ihr Partner für Mobilität und Innovation

Premio Reifen + Autoservice ist seit über 25 Jahren DAS erfolgreiche Fullservice-Konzept der Goodyear Retail Systems (GRS) für Reifen- und Autoservice-Spezialisten in Europa. Wir unterstützen Reifenfachhandelsbetriebe in Deutschland, Österreich, der Schweiz, Belgien, Luxemburg und in den Niederlanden nicht nur bei der Digitalisierung und den immer neuen technischen Herausforderungen, sondern fördern auch ihre wirtschaftliche Effizienz und sichern ihre Profitabilität.

Premio steht für einen europäisch einheitlichen Markenauftritt und zeichnet sich durch ein breites Leistungsangebot für selbständige Unternehmer inklusive persönlicher Beratung aus. 

Service neu definieren

Bei Premio geht es darum, Dinge anders zu machen. Wir helfen unseren Partner-Betrieben, die Kunden dort zu erreichen, wo sie sind – online wie offline. Premio-Kunden setzen auf individuelle Beratung, eine moderne Werkstatt, ein Höchstmaß an Service und ein breites Angebot an erstklassigen Markenprodukten in einer Preisklasse, die jedem Bedarf gerecht wird.

Wachsen Sie mit uns

Interessieren Sie sich für eine Partnerschaft oder die Übernahme eines Premio-Betriebs? Wir bieten umfassende betriebswirtschaftliche Unterstützung, fortschrittliche Schulungs- und Weiterbildungsprogramme und mit TireSoft3/GRIPS ein leistungsstarkes Warenwirtschaftssystem. 
Neben dem Direkt-Einkauf der Goodyear-Marken profitieren Premio-Partner auf dem FRI-Einkaufsportal von Rahmenabkommen mit namhaften Lieferanten für Reifen und Felgen, Autoservice-Teile und Werkstattausrüstung. Bei der Vermarktung helfen moderne E-Commerce- und Marketing-Lösungen unserer Experten sowie der professionelle Zugang zu Fuhrparks und Leasing-Kunden über die 4Fleet Group.

Name: SARL Fanchon
Description:
Nous offrons une large palette de prestations techniques autour de trois principaux axes :

 1. Nettoyage de filtres à particules et systèmes anti-pollution
Nous procédons à des nettoyages complets et certifiés de filtres à particules, catalyseurs ou DOC pour tous types de véhicules — du VL aux poids lourds, en passant par les engins agricoles ou bus. Cette intervention, généralement réalisée en moins d’une journée, prévient les surcoûts de remplacement des systèmes d’échappement et optimise leur durée de vie.
 2. Optimisation moteur
Grâce à notre expertise technique, nous proposons des reprogrammations moteurs et boîtiers additionnels pour améliorer la puissance, le couple, la réactivité et la consommation de vos véhicules légers, utilitaires, 4×4, agricoles ou industriels. Nos solutions sont conçues pour respecter les normes anti‑pollution et permettre un retour en configuration d’origine rapide si nécessaire.
 3. Climatisation embarquée
Nous assurons l’installation, la maintenance et la réparation de systèmes de climatisation sur tous types de véhicules — qu’il s’agisse de voitures particulières, véhicules professionnels ou engins lourds — avec une intervention rapide.

 Un service de proximité et adapté à vos besoins
Basée dans le nord de la France, nous intervenons sur plusieurs départementset nous déplaçons directement chez vous pour certaines prestations. Notre approche repose sur la réactivité, la qualité d’exécution et une grande flexibilité pour répondre aux contraintes des professionnels.

 Une équipe au service de la performance
Alliant le savoir‑faire d’un expert avec plus de quatre décennies d’expérience et l’expertise technique moderne, nous mettons un point d’honneur à fournir des prestations fiables, transparentes et orientées résultats.
 Envie d’échanger sur vos projets ? N’hésitez pas à nous contacter pour discuter de vos besoins et découvrir comment nous pouvons vous accompagner.

Name: ECUTECH AUSTRALIA PTY LTD
Description:
We are an ECU Remapping and DPF/EGR/ADDBLUE specialist based just outside Sydney and Brisbane. Our services include a wide variety from economy to performance tuning.

We believe reliability and drive-ability is as important as power and torque and therefore our maps have built a reputation for being some of the best in the tuning world. Using some of the most advanced and sophisticated tuning equipment available, combined with years of experience we are able to tune the vast majority of cars and commercial vehicles on the market today.

Unleashing the true potential of a vehicle, depending on customer requirements this could be simply to extract as much performance as possible or to generate the most amount of fuel efficiency. All our maps are fully custom and most are developed on a Dynocom 5000 series rolling road. We cover all sectors, Automotive, Heavy vehicle, Agricultural, Marine.

We pride ourselves on offering the best tuning solutions coupled with the highest of customer care, so whether you are looking for just better fuel economy from your commercial vehicle or more power with the better economy we will have a tuning solution for you.

Our maps are proven time and time again as reliable and effective. Even though we can offer incredible gains in power and torque, we also believe in safe and sensible tuning - that’s why our customers return time and time again. We offer a lifetime warranty against any software malfunctions, furthermore, all original maps are backed up on a dedicated server allowing the vehicle to be reverted back to the original format at any point in the future.

Name: AutoSauce Vehicle Repairing
Description:
Welcome to AutoSauce – Where Vehicles Get Saucy Service! 

With over a decade of experience serving the automotive appetite of Dubai, AutoSauce Vehicle Repairing is not just a garage; it's your one-stop sauce shop for all things car-related! 

 Why AutoSauce?
At AutoSauce, we spice up the traditional vehicle repair scene with a dash of professionalism, a pinch of reliability, and a whole lot of saucy customer service! We understand that your car is more than just a set of wheels – it's your trusty sidekick in the adventure of life.

 Services That Sizzle:
 AC Repairs: Is your car feeling hot under the hood? Our AC repairs include diagnostics, leak tests, gas refills, compressor repairs, and full AC system flushing service. Because a cool car is a happy car!

 Oil Change: Give your engine the VIP treatment with our premium oil change, oil filter replacement, oil flushing, and a full health check. Because every engine deserves a little extra love!

 Transmission Repair: From inspections to programming, gearbox overhauling, and everything in between – we ensure your car's transmission is as smooth as a perfectly stirred sauce.

 Car Service: Whether it's a full service, pre-purchase inspection, or a free pick-up and delivery, our car service will have you back on the road, cruising in style.

 Paintwork: We're not just about fixing the mechanical stuff; we also add a splash of color with body and paint repairs, protective film application, and polishing.

 Engine Services: Give your engine the attention it deserves with tuning, detailing, and diagnostics. Because a well-tuned engine is the secret sauce to a smooth ride!

 Car Repairs: From mechanical to electrical repairs, car diagnostics, and beyond – we fix it all! Because no car problem is too spicy for AutoSauce.

 Connect with Us:
Join our saucy automotive community on LinkedIn for a daily dose of car humor, behind-the-scenes sauciness, and updates on the latest in vehicle repairs.

Name: Southern ADAS Specialists Ltd
Description:
Although the addition of ADAS in modern vehicles continues to grow by the year, for many garages, auto body shops, and accident repair centres, investing in ADAS calibration equipment can be cost-prohibitive. 

The size of the equipment, ongoing maintenance costs, and the need for specialised training can make adding ADAS calibration to your list of services impractical for smaller businesses.

That’s where we come in. 

At Southern ADAS Specialists, we offer a practical and cost-effective solution – mobile ADAS calibration.

Using specialised Digital ADAS Calibration Equipment, which complies to the latest IIR regulations, we not only carry out both static and dynamic calibrations, but also ensure a full pre-calibration and post-calibration report for each vehicle.

En un momento de tanta incertidumbre como el actual, en el que tantas cosas están cambiando, es importante pararse para analizar hacia dónde vamos... Eso es lo que pretende EFIAUTO: ser una iniciativa que promueva las buenas prácticas que aporten las claves para conseguir encaminar a los negocios del sector hacia un futuro más sostenible y eficiente. 

Si eres un taller de carrocería, este es tu evento.

Além da sede em Rio Preto, o grupo também é composto por mais um auto-center em Mirassol, uma indústria de recauchutagem de pneus e um centro de distribuição, ambas na cidade de Bady Bassitt. Ao todo, são mais de 100 colaboradores treinados, diretos e indiretos, garantindo a excelência dos produtos e serviços que a Barrela oferece.
 
Em 2010, as lojas tornaram-se revendas autorizadas Michelin, e desde então comercializam com exclusividade todos os pneus do grupo Michelin, composto pelas marcas BFGoodrich, Levorin e Camso.

Além de oferecer serviços como alinhamento, balanceamento, troca de óleo, desempeno de rodas e substituição de peças de suspensão, freio e amortecedores, o Grupo Barrela se destaca como um dos principais comerciantes de pneus da região.

Em 2022, a filial de Rio Preto tornou-se um Car Service Michelin, uma loja modelo que oferece o mais alto nível de serviços, atendimento e uma experiência exclusiva.
 
Com uma equipe especializada e equipamentos novos com tecnologia de ponta, um dos serviços de destaque é o Alinhamento Total. Na realização do serviço, o veículo passa por uma análise completa em 3D, e um dos grandes diferenciais é a garantia de que o cliente nunca terá surpresas na conta, pois tudo que tiver que ser feito (caster, cambagem e alinhamento traseiro) será realizado gratuitamente.

- 2012, 2014, 2015 and 2018 Best of NOVA Auto Repair winner, awarded by Northern Virginia Magazine

Here at Virginia Tire & Auto, we believe in four core values that are the essence of who we are:

Description:

Name: MOBRAGE – Vehicle Expert Locator App
Description:
At Mobrage, we're transforming the automotive industry. Our journey began in Reading, UK, after the COVID-19 pandemic when we identified a significant challenge: small-scale mechanics wanted to go mobile due to high shop purchase and rental costs, while vehicle owners were seeking convenient repair services.

In response, we created Mobrage—a platform where mechanics can showcase their skills, and customers can effortlessly book both mobile and static repairs. With over 150 users already on board, we're bridging the gap between mechanics and vehicle owners.

We are driven by a passion for reshaping the automotive sector and making car maintenance more accessible. Join us on this journey of innovation and convenience. Together, we are changing the way cars receive the care they deserve.

 Mobile app available to download in the United Kingdom for free on iOS & Android. Learn more at https://mobrage.com/ or email: info@mobrage.com

Name: Spheretech
Description:
Depuis plus de 25 ans, Spheretech Environnement, le département recherche de Ecosphere, analyse et étudie la combustion des moteurs par le biais de milliers d’analyses de gaz moteur collectées depuis les ateliers équipés de l’analyseur de Gaz 5 gaz EASYDIAG.

De cette expertise unique est née le concept original d’ECOMAINTENANCE qui permet aux professionnels de l’automobile de s’engager dans une démarche d’entretien écoresponsable des véhicules thermiques. Pour l'aspect correctif et le "verdissement" du parc nous accompagnons cette démarche par la conception d'additifs "solutions" spécialement formulés pour décarboner et assainir les moteurs : un moteur propre et bien entretenu c'est une voiture qui pollue moins ! 

Spheretech Environnement apporte des solutions aux professionnels et de la pédagogie auprès des automobilistes afin d’agir sur la « santé » de leur moteur pour préserver celle de notre planète. Nous pensons qu’agir pour l’environnement n’est pas seulement réservé à ceux qui peuvent changer de voiture…

Découvrez notre démarche écoresponsable sur notre site Spheretech-environnement.org

Name: CARFLEX
Description:
Des carrossiers en réseau

CARFLEX a été créé par des carrossiers indépendants, pour des carrossiers indépendants, avec un objectif simple : pérenniser les entreprises de carrosserie. 

Pour cela, nous avons créé notre propre méthodologie de travail, IMOV, qui signifie :
- INNOVER
- MASSIFIER
- ORGANISER
- VALORISER

INNOVER
CARFLEX possède sa propre équipe informatique qui développe, en interne, des solutions digitales en fonction des besoins de ses membres. En collaboration avec le comité informatique, composé de carrossiers membres, nos outils naissent des besoins remontés par les carrossiers. Nos outils leur appartiennent et évoluent, en fonction de leurs demandes.

MASSIFIER
Le chef d'entreprise de carrosserie, seul, a peu de poids lors de ses négociations. Mais quand des carrossiers indépendants se regroupent, pour peser plus, ils obtiennent des conditions tarifaires et de services qu'ils n'auraient pu obtenir seuls. Et c'est exactement la manière dont fonctionne CARFLEX.

ORGANISER
CARFLEX peut intervenir et accompagner ses membres à tous les niveaux, dans la gestion d'une entreprise de carrosserie. Nous travaillons en fonction des besoins de nos membres sur des sujets comme la mutuelle, les énergies, la formation,... 
La rupture de l'isolement est également l'une des raisons d'être de CARFLEX. À ce titre, nous organisons des évènements annuels qui permettent à nos membres de sortir la tête de l'eau et de grandir, au côtés de leurs pairs. Nous avons, entre autre, les CARFLEX DAYS, notre séminaire annuel. Mais aussi des réunions de zone, où l'équipe CARFLEX part à la rencontre de ses membres dans les différentes régions de nos membres.

VALORISER
CARFLEX accompagne ses membres dans leur communication locale. Gestion des réseaux sociaux, création de site Internet, gestion de fiche Google, création de supports de communication personnalisés,... Notre équipe communication contribue à valoriser le savoir-faire de nos artisans carrossiers.

Name: TAGPRO
Description:
A TAGPRO é uma associação de proteção veicular licenciada pela SUSEP, que trouxe inovação para o segmento, sendo o principal parceiro do motorista profissional e uma das principais associações de proteção veicular do Brasil. 

Nosso propósito vai além do básico: estamos aqui para superar expectativas e resolver os problemas de quem dirige, oferecendo segurança nas rotas e com benefícios reais. 

Somos apaixonados por cuidar dos nossos associados e daqueles que os levam aos melhores destinos. Protegemos o patrimônio e a ferramenta de trabalho do motorista profissional com condições exclusivas, além de investir em qualidade, humanização e processos personalizados para cada membro da nossa base.

Nosso maior diferencial é a proteção de renda de até R$ 5.000,00 que protege muito mais que só o veículo, mas mantém a família unida, o alimento na mesa e o motorista profissional tranquilo. Com o reboque ilimitado para todo o Brasil em caso de acidente, batida ou colisão, vantagens como socorro pneu furado, pane seca, telemedicina, carro reserva, danos a terceiros, desconto em combustível e seguro APP de até R$ 250.000,00 tornam a nossa proteção ainda mais completa. 

Prezamos acima de tudo por uma comunicação assertiva voltada para servir bem, com empatia e trabalho em equipe, a fim de instigar o senso de pertencimento dos propulsores da marca e fomentando tudo em dados, números e resultados. 

Acesse nosso site e veja o que nossa solução pode fazer para proteger a sua rotina como motorista profissional, trazer segurança para sua família e seus passageiros ou converse diretamente com nossos especialistas: 

 - (31) 2532-0890 (Telefone e WhatsApp) 
 - Redes sociais: @tagpro.brasil

Name: Rino Blindagens
Description:
Conhecer a história da Rino Blindagens é se encantar com uma empresa que nasceu com DNA industrial na área da segurança.

Unindo os conhecimentos fabris ao know-how do mercado automotivo, já presente conosco há mais de 20 anos, nasce a Rino Blindagens, em 2015. Nossa história começou com um objetivo claro: oferecer aos nossos clientes a segurança e proteção necessárias para que possam desfrutar da vida com tranquilidade. Investindo em tecnologia e infraestrutura para oferecer um serviço de qualidade inigualável.

Somos vinculados à ABRABLIN – Associação Brasileira dos Blindadores Veiculares, e credenciados pelo Ministério do Exército Brasileiro, órgão que regulamenta a Blindagem no Brasil.

Com sede em São Paulo e alcance em diversas regiões do Brasil, a Rino Blindagens é reconhecida por sua excelência em atendimento e qualidade em serviços. Nossos profissionais são altamente capacitados e treinados para oferecer o melhor em tecnologia de blindagem veicular e atender às necessidades específicas de cada cliente.

Além da conversão de veículos para blindagem, utilizamos as melhores ferramentas e materiais disponíveis no mercado para garantir a eficácia do processo. A nossa produção é rigorosamente controlada e submetida a testes que verificam o nível de segurança oferecido, seguindo as diretrizes e normas dos órgãos competentes.

Com uma estrutura física completa, hoje comportamos: Linha de produção da blindagem, Centro de assistência técnica de blindados, Centro de revisão da blindagem, Centro de estética e reparos automotivos e Setor de documentação da blindagem.

Acreditamos que a nossa história de sucesso é resultado de muita dedicação, paixão e um profundo compromisso em oferecer a melhor experiência possível aos nossos clientes.

A Rino Blindagens é a escolha certa para quem busca segurança em primeiro lugar. Venha conhecer os nossos serviços e comece agora mesmo a proteger quem você ama.

Rino Blindagens – Segurança que você confia!

FORAMAG a été créée en 1989, en tant qu’importateur et distributeur exclusif des huiles MOTUL sur le territoire marocain. Elle est également spécialisée dans l’importation et la distribution des pièces de 1ère monte.
Pendant 20 ans, depuis sa création, Fast Pro était la master franchise au Maroc d’une franchise internationale. En 2018, le management de Fast Pro a décidé de changer de franchise et de créer sa propre franchise dénommé FAST PRO.
FAST PRO, l’expert en entretien automobile, propose un large choix de prestations d’entretien pour les véhicule automobile : vidange, freinage, pneumatique, batterie, amortisseurs …
Toutes les pièces de rechange utilisées par les centres FAST PRO sont des pièces de 1ère monte produites par les plus grands fabricants de pièces de rechange au monde.
FAST PRO s’engage à assurer à ses clients un service rapide et sans rendez-vous, qui offre le meilleur rapport qualité/prix. Ce service est réalisé en toute transparence ; Les clients peuvent s’inviter à assister eux-mêmes à la prestation demandée.
Avant toute prestation, les centres FAST PRO proposent au client un devis gratuit. Et suite à toute prestation, le client bénéficie d’une garantie pièces et main d’œuvre.

Name: KARSENZ TOTAL CAR CARE PVT LTD
Description:
Karsenz Total Car Care Pvt. Ltd is an ISO 9001:2015 certified premium imported car service center, established in 1997 in Chennai, founded by qualified automobile engineers from the Gulf with over 25 years of specialist experience in sports, super, and European luxury automobiles.

With decades of hands-on expertise, our highly skilled technicians are trusted across South India for delivering precision-driven repairs, maintenance, diagnostics, and performance enhancements across a wide range of imported makes and models. Our team is widely regarded as one of the finest groups of luxury car specialists in the region—ensuring every vehicle is handled with absolute care and technical excellence.

From routine servicing to advanced diagnostics, ECU reprogramming, complex troubleshooting, and complete engine repair or replacement, Karsenz offers comprehensive end-to-end automotive solutions. We utilize state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment to ensure accurate fault detection and efficient resolutions.

At Karsenz, integrity and transparency are core to everything we do. We are committed to delivering honest, professional advice, exceptional service quality, and outstanding value, while strictly using OEM/OES-approved parts to maintain manufacturer-level standards.

With access to the latest software and hardware updates from Germany, Italy, and the UK, we provide advanced technical support across most vehicle systems, ensuring global-standard service delivery.

Karsenz has successfully expanded its presence to Coimbatore and Dubai, and we continue to grow across South India and the Gulf, bringing world-class premium automotive care closer to our customers.

Karsenz — Precision. Performance. Premium Car Care Since 1997.

Name: Voltest
Description:
Voltest
Bringing transparency and trust to the used electric vehicle market

Voltest is dedicated to making EV battery health accessible and clear, enabling buyers, sellers, and service providers to make informed decisions. Our portable, easy-to-use OBD2 diagnostic tool delivers real-time, reliable battery health insights, transforming how dealerships, repair shops, fleet operators, and auctions assess EV battery value.

What We Offer
Our device generates data-driven battery health reports with key metrics like State of Health (SOH) and charge cycles, supporting accurate appraisals and fair pricing. Compatible with most major EV models, Voltest empowers everyone in the used EV market to understand and manage battery condition confidently.

Our Vision
To set the standard for EV battery diagnostics in North America and support sustainable transportation by making battery health information universally accessible.

 Join us in driving trust and clarity in the EV market for smarter, more sustainable choices.

Name: Prospeed
Description:
Prospeed is the organization behind the official Porsche one-make series in the Benelux. The organization established the first one-make series in the Benelux market in 2013. In 2019, the championship was awarded Carrera Cup status as the first independently organized Porsche one-make series. In the following years, the championship portfolio was extended to include an entry-level sprint championship, an endurance format, and an off-season sprint challenge in Spain and Portugal.

In addition to organizing the championships, Prospeed provides a technical and support platform for racing teams and track day customers, including:

• Racing Parts – Prospeed supplies the full range of Porsche Motorsport, Porsche Genuine and Manthey parts, ensuring teams and drivers have access to high-quality components for their race and track cars.

• Specialized Workshop – The Prospeed workshop provides maintenance, upgrades, and setup for drivers active in track day programs, ensuring their Porsche GT street and race cars are always performing at the highest level.

• Technical Assistance – A dedicated team of engineers and mechanics offers on-site technical support at race events and track days.

With its deep expertise in motorsport and a strong focus on service and support, Prospeed is the go-to partner for both competitive racing teams and enthusiasts looking to push their limits on track.

- De personnaliser votre aménagement en fonction de vos besoins en installant des étagères, des tiroirs pour sécuriser vos outils. 
- Ranger vos outils sous un double plancher afin de garder un espace de chargement. 
- Accessoirisez votre aménagement avec des organiseurs de tiroirs, des boites et mallettes de rangement …
- Pensez à installer des éclairages supplémentaires dans votre véhicule pour utilisation sereine toute l'année. Un SAV de proximité.
- Les aménagements sont soumis aux crash test afin d'assurer votre sécurité.
- Garantie 5 ans.

Le Van de L'ouest vous aide à concevoir et réaliser votre aménagement qui vous reflète en vous projetant avec un outils 3D pour visualiser votre aménagement final. 

J'aménage également les véhicules de loisirs pour les transformer en vans aménagés.

Name: CARBOVAPT
Description:
A CarboVapt é especialista em manutenção preventiva inteligente por meio da descarbonização de motores a combustão. Desde 2019, oferecemos ao mercado uma tecnologia exclusiva de descarbonização de motores que atua diretamente na câmara de combustão, recuperando desempenho e evitando falhas precoces.

Nosso processo é rápido, seguro e comprovado: em até 1 hora, sem desmontar o motor, reduzimos resíduos que comprometem a combustão, gerando economia de combustível, retomada de potência e menor desgaste de componentes. O resultado é a redução de manutenções corretivas e maior disponibilidade da frota.

Além da eficiência operacional, a CarboVapt entrega impacto ambiental mensurável. Cada aplicação contribui para a diminuição das emissões de CO₂ e apoia empresas no cumprimento de suas metas de sustentabilidade e agenda ESG.

Com presença em  11 estados e em expansão nacional, a CarboVapt é hoje referência em soluções que unem produtividade, economia e redução efetiva de emissões, um novo padrão para a performance limpa no transporte e na indústria.

Concierge have access to a wide range of vehicles including Prestige, Sports, Electric and PCO licenced chauffeuring vehicles which can be delivered to you at your preferred time and location. If your vehicle is no longer fit for purpose following the collision, we can supply a replacement hire vehicle as a matter of urgency to ensure you can continue your day to day business with minimal impact.

The concierge style of service we provide enables you to continue with your day to day business, without the concern of dealing with numerous parties. Leave this to the experts and rest assured your dedicated Concierge Claims handler will take care of the whole process on your behalf freeing up your valuable time.

Location et Vente de Véhicules : Une gamme de véhicules utilitaires disponibles à la location ou à l’achat pour répondre aux besoins temporaires ou permanents de votre activité.

En choisissant LH Services, vous accédez à une expertise complète et polyvalente, dédiée à maximiser la productivité de vos équipes et la durabilité de vos équipements. Nous nous engageons à offrir un accompagnement personnalisé, assurant à votre entreprise une mobilité continue et performante.

Name: ESTIMATE SOLUTIONS LIMITED
Description:
At Estimate Solutions Ltd, we’re more than just independent vehicle damage assessors — we’re trusted partners to repairers and insurers, delivering clarity, compliance, and confidence with every estimate.

Founded by Andrew Hill VDA MIMI, with over 38 years of industry experience, we have supported independent repairers for more than 20 years. With a team that combines over 60 years of expertise, we’ve created more than 30,000 estimates and helped 1,000+ repairers strengthen their businesses.

Our mission is simple: to support independent repairers and insurers, reduce hassle, restore trust, and create a fair, profitable industry for all. We act as mediators, sense-checkers, and problem-solvers, bridging the gap between insurers and repairers.

Our services include:

Audatex Estimates for repairers without direct access.

Holiday, sickness, and staff cover for Audatex users.

Estimate reports for other VDA companies without subscriptions.

Non-Fault Accident Claims support, linking repairers to third-party insurers for faster authority.

At Estimate Solutions, we understand the challenges repairers face — because we’ve lived them. That’s why we’re committed to protecting profits, ensuring fairness, and creating partnerships that last.

Partnering with Repairers. Protecting Profits.

Name: West Midlands Accident Repairs Limited
Description:
Welcome to West Midlands Accident Repairs Limited — a proudly independent, insurance-approved bodyshop based in the heart of Dudley.

We specialise in high-quality, expert vehicle repairs, from minor cosmetic touch-ups to full accident restorations. With decades of combined experience and cutting-edge facilities, our skilled team is committed to getting every vehicle back on the road looking its best — and driving safely.

We are trusted specialists in fleet, insurance and company vehicle repairs, delivering fast turnaround times, consistent communication and high-standard workmanship. Whether you're managing a single car or an entire fleet, we understand the importance of keeping your business moving.

We are also an approved repairer for Ford and Hyundai, meaning we meet strict manufacturer standards and use genuine parts — giving our customers added peace of mind and quality assurance.

At West Midlands Accident Repairs, we do things differently. We combine precision workmanship with genuine customer care. As an independent business, we understand the value of trust, transparency and local reputation — and that’s what keeps our customers coming back.

Whether you’re working with us through your insurer, as a fleet manager, or coming in direct, you can expect efficient service, clear communication and repairs done to the highest standard — every single time.

Independent. Manufacturer-approved. Built on pride and results.

Whether it's through our top-quality auto detailing or our support for local charities and nonprofits, I am committed to using my skills to not only transform the appearance of your vehicle but also to inspire positive change within our communities.

We proudly call ourselves "Grime fighters that come to you!"—offering the highest quality products and services delivered with care and precision. Name: Driver Center - Red de talleres
Description:
DRIVER CENTER es la red de centros especializados en neumáticos y servicios de mecánica rápida dirigidos a todo tipo de vehículos. Nuestros objetivos son velar, de forma profesional y competente, por la seguridad de los clientes y de sus familias, y ofrecer productos y servicios de máxima calidad, siempre con una atención personalizada. 

En España el grupo Driver Center se creó en 1994 con el propósito de formar una red de centros de reparación especializados en neumáticos. Después de un lustro de experiencia en el sector, el grupo reforzó su posicionamiento con la incorporación de Pirelli como socio mayoritario. 

Desde ese momento, y con el apoyo de esta marca, de reconocimiento mundial, Driver Center se ha convertido en un grupo de referencia en el sector, con más de 130 socios y más de 160 puntos de venta en España y alrededor de 900 talleres distribuidos en diversos países de la Unión Europea. 

Un grupo que ha sabido mantener los ideales que dieron origen a su creación: independencia, calidad de servicio y trato personalizado, y que se ha adaptado a las exigencias de los mercados internacionales con eficiencia, rentabilidad y calidad. 

Nuestro modelo de negocio proporciona a nuestros socios una respuesta competitiva y de éxito seguro, y garantiza a nuestros clientes los más altos estándares de calidad, manteniendo un constante espíritu de desarrollo, innovación y visión de futuro.
 
Los Socios de DRIVER, excelentes profesionales seleccionados por su liderazgo en su zona de influencia, constituyen el principal activo del grupo. Son profesionales independientes y altamente cualificados, con la vocación de proporcionar el mejor servicio al usuario, estando en primera fila en la gestión de sus negocios para responder con la mayor calidad de servicio a los Clientes de Driver.

Name: Williams Norwalk Tire & Alignment
Description:
Some of you may remember the days of working on your own vehicle.  Now you may open the hood and say "where do I begin?"  It is packed in tight with many components that the cars of the 60s and 70s never had.  

But that is why you can depend on our team.  We are do this every day.  There is a good chance that the issue you are having with your vehicle is something we have diagnosed before.   

Here is a little history:  
Jim did not have the money to repair his 67 GTO – so he learned to work on it.  He worked in several gas stations, Foster Chevrolet, Bill Beatty Chevrolet & Dorr Chevrolet before opening our business.   

Williams Auto Repair & Classic Restoration started in our home garage in May, 1988.  Jim enjoyed when the door between the garage & house would open with a quick “hi daddy”!  

When we outgrew our home garage, we put up a building East of Norwalk on Route 20.  Vicki continued to work at GTE while helping behind the scenes.  

In 1994, we moved to our present location at Cleveland Rd in Norwalk.  Vicki was laid off from GTE.  Our son Keifer joined the team in 2007.  

Yes – we are family owned AND operated.  

We run our shop with honor and integrity.  Our current team works well together.  Each employee has a minimum of 15 years of automotive experience.  

Today’s vehicles require the experience & knowledge of professional technicians.

When experience counts, call 419-668-3071!

Name: Vohnt, Inc.
Description:
You can book a weekend stay in a cabin across the country with two clicks. You can order a new TV at 6 pm and receive it the next day. You can catch a ride wherever you need to go with just one click. 

Now think about getting an oil change, new tires, a car detail, even pumping your gas. It feels like a lot of wasted time, doesn’t it? In a world full of convenience, why do you still have to spend so much time and money maintaining your car?

We started Vohnt by asking ourselves - why can’t car care be better? Our mission is to create a world where you have immediate, convenient, and affordable access to car care so that you can just enjoy the ride.

When you use Vohnt, the only thing you have to worry about is where you’re going and who you’re with.
At Vohnt we have 3 core pillars that we abide by: 

1. Quality at the right price

The consumer should not have to pay for the industries’ inefficiencies. 

2. Redefined convenience 

You should not have to sacrifice hours out of your day without a car for it to be cleaned.  With our model, a touch of a button allows you to get your car cleaned on its time, not yours.

3. Environmentally responsible 

Convenience doesn’t have to come at a high cost to you or the environment. We care about you, your car, and the places you’re driving. We refuse to sacrifice any one of those things for more profit margin.

Vohnt is embarking on a journey to redefine the Carcare industry, and we want you to join us for the ride.

Lokaal en vertrouwd

Garages van het Eurorepar Car Service netwerk hebben de voordelen van een internationaal merk, maar blijven toch een lokale onderneming. Zo hebben alle garages toegang tot het uitgebreide internationale assortiment aan onderdelen, en beschikken de technici over internationale kennis op het gebied van alle merken en alle modellen auto’s. Daarnaast zijn alle vestigingen van Eurorepar Car Service in handen van lokale ondernemers die betrokken zijn bij uw samenleving; een vertrouwde garage dus voor iedereen, waar u een eerlijk advies op basis van úw budget mag verwachten, ongeacht hoe oud, of van welk merk uw auto is.

Voordelig

Eurorepar Car Service garages bieden de beste prijs/kwaliteits-verhouding voor alle reguliere services zoals APK, reparatie en onderhoud, waarbij uiteraard de richtlijnen van de fabrikant worden gevolgd.Voor Eurorepar onderdelen geldt er twee jaar garantie op de onderdelen en montage; deze onderdelen voldoen aan de normen en kwaliteitseisen van de fabrikant.Tevens kunt u tegen een kleine vergoeding gebruik maken van de (inter)nationale mobiliteitsservice van Eurorepar Car Service.

Onze diensten

Is uw auto toe aan een APK? Bij Eurorepar Car Service gebeurt dat door een APK-keurmeester. Wanneer uw auto wordt afgekeurd, kunnen wij direct alle nodige werkzaamheden uitvoeren, en zullen wij uw auto gratis herkeuren.

Heeft u reparatie nodig? Voor Eurorepar-onderdelen geldt er twee jaar garantie op de onderdelen en montage.

Heeft u onderhoud nodig? Eurorepar Car Service dekt alle domeinen: olie verversen, banden, remmen, ophanging,

SIKAND & COMPANY was founded in the late 1940's, marking the beginning of a new era in the automotive world. Our glittering journey started with importing Dodge & Chrysler cars in New Delhi. Then, this ride of importing the best vehicles from around the Globe continued with importing Standard cars along with Triumph Motorcycles from 1953 - 1962. In the following decade we became Bajaj Auto Dealers in New Delhi and Tata Commercial Dealers in Himachal Pradesh. Also, Sikands Limited, established in Faridabad in 1970's specialised in manufacturing nuts and bolts for the automotive sector.
In 1984, Sikand & Company became the third dealer for Maruti Cars. Sikand &
Company's perpetual growth in the automotive industry led us to become one of the few Maruti dealers across India with keeping consistency in attaining the Highest SSI & CSI rating.

In 2002, we decided to spread our wings and take our legacy forward from selling
automobiles to maintaining automobiles with SIKAND STANDLEY ENTERPRISES PVT. LTD.
Through this platform, we have taken the responsibility to import and distribute the latest automobiles products and services throughout India, providing solutions to a wide range of automotive-related issues.
Sikand Standley has tied up with key international brands and continues to introduce new and first-time technologies in India, offering premium products to many leading Automotive OEMs and Automotive enthusiasts across the country. Since its establishment, SSEPL's devotion has been to provide excellence in products and services.
SSEPL teams aim to reside at the forefront, in the delivery, of innovative technologies for commercial, fleet & heavy industries.
Our brands include LionnoiL - High-Performance Additives, Oils and Lubricants, Bike & Car Care Products, Gliptone - Finest Professional Car Care Products, Driwash ’n Guard - The Original Waterless Car Wash & Somay-Q, Nano Technology Coatings and Industrial Paints, offering all-in-one solutions.

Name: Büyükkarcı
Description:
360 Derece Ağır Ticari Araç Hizmeti Büyükkarcı olarak bizler, global markalarımız, geniş ürün portföyümüz ve kusursuz hizmet anlayışımız ile bölgemizdeki ağır ticari araç sektöründe akla ilk gelen markayız.

140 kişilik uzman ekibimizle, araç sahiplerinin ve şoförlerin daha iyi standartlarda, daha mutlu hizmet vermeleri için tutkuyla çalışıyoruz.

Ege Bölgesi’nde, 2 tesiste Ford Trucks, Otokar, Anadolu Sigorta, HDI Sigorta, Allianz Sigorta gibi global ve ulusal markaların distribütörlüğünü ve bayiliğini yapıyor; müşterilerimiz için değer yaratma misyonumuzla tüm hizmet standartlarını sağlıyoruz. Müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarını doğru anlamak ve en uygun çözümleri geliştirmek bizim uzmanlığımızın, sorumluluklarımızın ve taahhütlerimizin çerçevesini belirliyor.

360 Derece Ağır Ticari Araç Hizmetimizle araçların kesintisiz olarak hizmet vermesine, işletme sürelerinin artmasına, karlılığın yükselmesine ve böylece şirketlerin iş hedeflerine ulaşmasına destek oluyoruz. Tüm faaliyetlerimizin temelinde yatan ‘Müşterilerimiz için değerli olanı koruma’ felsefemiz, Büyükkarcı marka kimliğini oluşturuyor.

Bizler, verdiğimiz hizmetin sonucunda, tüm paydaşlarımız için daha iyi bir yaşam yaratabileceğimize inanıyoruz. Yolculukları, güvenli ve keyifli bir hale dönüştürmek için çalışıyoruz.

Biz, şoförlerin taşıdığı sorumluluğun farkındayız.

Taşıdıkları şeyin sadece yük olmadığını; yolculuklarına umutlarını, hayallerini ve hasretlerini de çıkardıklarını biliyoruz.

Bu yüzden bizler, en zor koşullarda dahi müşterilerimizi yarı yolda bırakmayız.

Çünkü, 38 yıllık yol arkadaşları olarak biliyoruz ki…

Hayat, Yolda Olmaktır!

Name: Epic Automotive & Driveline- Saskatoon - Automotive Repair and Service, Driveline Repair & Build
Description:
We do more than just driveline balancing and repair. We also offer complete automotive maintenance and repair as well as heavy duty truck repair services including front end repair and alignment, brakes, wheel balancing, trailer repair.... and a full line of almost every PTO related product that you can imagine.

After more that three decades working for others Wayne Chittick opened Wayne’s Driveline Ltd. At the time he opened his shop all those years ago, Wayne wanted to supply customers with quality parts, quality work and the best service around. At Wayne's retirement, he wanted to ensure that the tradition continued and as of May 2022 the company was sold to Bob & Shelley Harder. With an unmatched track record of customer service delivered over the last 45 years, the company is in good hands. Bob & Shelley brought Mitch Quesnel into the company as Managing Partner. The company has been renamed Epic Automotive & Driveline to reflect the new ownership and with a skilled individual like Mitch, Epic will continue to grow and provide the kind of service that keeps you coming back.

At Epic, our expert staff can custom build your driveshaft to suit any application from agricultural and heavy trucks and equipment to cars and everything in between. Epic Automotive & Driveline also provides high speed balancing for automotive applications. We can rebuild your existing shaft or exchange your shaft for a refurbished one.
Epic carries a wide selection of driveline parts, accessories and shafts, for custom work or for the ‘do it yourselfer”

Call Epic Automotive & Driveline today @ 306- 242-1888 to book your appointment or find us at www.epic-auto.ca

2950 Millar Ave, Saskatoon, SK. S7K 5X7

Description:
The Auto Assist Group is a nationwide organisation, led by a strong leadership team with expert knowledge, that brings you the very best customer experience. Our Board of Directors consists of automotive specialists that have worked in all areas of supply chain and services, for many years. 

With 125 years of combined knowledge and our strong partnerships in this space, including the ITW Additives international group, a billion-dollar corporation, we bring our customers the latest and most reliable outcomes that work! Combine this with our partnership with Xpart, our global parts sourcing partner, we not only offer the best part, but we buy the part at the best price, passing on to you the most competitive pricing for the job.

Established since 2009, we have many thousands of satisfied customers including loyal blue-chip corporations that we retain due to the exceptional services we provide. No customer is too small or too big, and we aim to provide you with the very latest and best solution(s) for all your motoring needs, bringing you real value and convenience.

We pride ourselves on having market-leading solutions, from fuel contamination to replacing vehicle parts by sourcing the right part at the right price, ensuring that we provide you or your fleet, with the right result for you. Aided with the latest diagnostic technology, puts us light years ahead of our competitors. 

The Auto Assist Group specialises in areas such as contaminated fuel, AdBlue problems, diesel particulate filter (DPF) repairs at the roadside or our workshops, and sourcing required parts for all your motoring needs, from the dual mass flywheel to the latest EGR valve. 

So, whether it is just fixing the problem of accidentally picking up the wrong fuel nozzle or you’re looking for the right fleet maintenance partner, leave all the worrying to us. We provide roadside assistance 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

Name: DAT Deutsche Automobil Treuhand
Description:
Deutsche Automobil Treuhand GmbH (DAT) is an international company operating within the automotive
industry. In accordance with its mandate, it collects and prepares comprehensive vehicle data and provides
the sector with cost-effective, nationwide access to it via the SilverDAT System.
DAT sees itself as a neutral intermediary between all the stakeholders in the automotive industry. Ever since
1931 it has been funded by its three partners: the VDA (Association of the German Automotive Industry),
the VDIK (Association of International Motor Vehicle Manufacturers) and the ZDK (German Federation
for Motor Trades and Repairs). This structure gives DAT a unique status and a special mandate within the
automotive industry.
In addition to providing a nationwide network of automotive experts in Germany, DAT’s main tasks are to
observe the market and document technical data for all makes of vehicles and to augment this with
additional relevant facts. This know-how is consolidated in the SilverDAT software, which offers its users
numerous options for the digitisation of their processes. This includes e.g. precise vehicle identification via
VIN queries (Vehicle Identification Number), repair-cost calculations, used-car valuations, key-data analyses
and residual-value forecasts. Hire-car costs and compensation for loss of use can also be automatically
calculated where necessary. Process-oriented online claims-management systems facilitate paperless
communication between all parties involved in a claim and allows them to process digital claims files.
DAT leverages its immensely valuable collection of data to develop new products and services, such as the
analysis of vehicle groups by their equipment levels and the combination with other equipment features.
The DAT Group is represented in numerous international markets by its subsidiaries and holding companies.

DAT Imprint: http://www.dat.de/en/company/imprint.html

Description:
MyRaasta is your ultimate destination to solve all your Car Problems.  The company was started keeping in mind the problem of the unorganised sector of independent garages. We've dedicated ourselves to providing a comprehensive, one-stop solution for all your car repair services. We target tech savvy vehicle owners who look for convenience to book services at their fingertips. We will be your trusted companion on the go. Our commitment is simple, to simplify the complex world of car care. We have curated customised solutions and offerings to improve vehicle services. 

From doorstep services to providing 100% OEM parts, we have got you covered!

We're proud to offer OEM spare parts and insurance services, making us the ultimate one-stop solution for both individual car owners (B2C) and businesses (B2B).

Vår verksamhet vilar på en effektiv distribution av reservdelar och verktyg via våra lager till professionella bilverkstäder. Allt vi gör syftar till en sak – ett enklare och mer kostnadseffektivt bilägande med högsta kvalitet och service. 
 
Som företagskund hos MECA kan du dessutom samla hela bilflottans verkstadsärenden på ett ställe. Ofta har företagskunden fordon av flera märken och modeller samt en geografisk spridning över stora delar av landet. Med M-Fleet ges företag möjlighet att samla sina verkstadsärenden på ett enkelt, tillgängligt, kvalitetssäkrat och kostnadseffektivt sätt.

Name: Activate Group Limited
Description:
We’re Activate Group - The faster, smarter accident management partner. Our brands service hundreds of thousands of motor claims every year from end-to-end, on behalf of some of the UK’s best-known insurers, brokers, and fleet operators.

Our mission is to get drivers and policyholders back on the road quickly and safely after an incident, supporting them through every step of the claims and repair journey, while controlling costs and repair quality.

Together, our group businesses form a fully-connected, data-driven claims & repair ecosystem, delivering everything from incident reporting, to engineering, vehicle repair, parts supply, connected technologies, and specialist claims management:

 Motor Repair Network – Customer-focused motor claims partner, delivering cost-effective, right-first-time claims & repair journeys for insurers, MGAs and brokers.

 sopp+sopp – Fleet-specialist accident and claims management, reducing downtime, controlling costs, and protecting fleets’ commercial reputations.

 Activate Accident Repair – A UK-wide network of state-of-the-artrepair centres, strategically located where demand is highest, ensuring fast, high-quality repairs.

 Activate Parts – Our in-house vehicle parts supplier and aggregator, sourcing and delivering cost-effective, sustainable parts at speed.

We believe we have the power to ‘make someone’s bad day better’ - that’s our core purpose, applying to both our connections with claims customers, and our day-to-day workplace culture. Our people are the heart of everything we do, driving our market-leading service with empathy, innovation, and commitment - from our call handlers, to our operational support teams, and expert vehicle repairers.

To find out more about Activate Group, and our industry-leading accident and claims management solutions, visit: www.activate-group.com

Description:
GO Car Wash’s ambition is to be the most admired car wash company by enriching the lives of its teammates and customers.  We do so by providing a convenient, consistent, and exceptional car wash experience.  Our values of teamwork, fun, integrity, caring, and continuous improvement are lived by everyone, every day.
GO Car Wash is one of the fastest growing consolidators in the car wash space, aggressively expanding across the United States through acquisitions, new builds, and partnerships. GO Car Wash currently operates 130 sites in 8 states, including Kansas, Missouri, Nevada, Texas, New York, California, Oregon and Virginia with several additional acquisitions in discussions and new build sites under development. Description:
Vulco : les spécialistes des pneumatiques et de l'entretien tous véhicules

La marque Vulco a été créée en France, en 1996. Spécialiste des pneumatiques et de l’entretien tous véhicules, le réseau Vulco compte plus de 2 500 centres dans toute l'Europe, dont plus de 200 en France et Outre Mer. Ces centres sont aux services des particuliers et des professionnels ; pneus, révision garantie constructeur préservée, climatisation, vidange, freins, amortisseurs, parallélisme, échappement… des centres parfaitement équipés, et des techniciens formés en permanence aux évolutions technologiques de l’automobile, apportent le meilleur savoir-faire pour un service irréprochable et de qualité, y compris sur des véhicules hybrides et électriques.

Nous proposons également un ensemble de services spécialement dédiés aux professionnels. Artisans, PME, PMI, entreprises multi-sites, comptes nationaux et européens… Transporteurs, génie civil, agriculteurs…La clientèle professionnelle a toujours constitué une grande partie de l’activité de notre réseau Vulco.
Référencés par les principaux loueurs, les grandes entreprises nationales et privées et de nombreuses PME, nous apportons des solutions de proximité et de services qui répondent, à partir d’un standard de qualité basé sur les nouvelles techniques de maintenance, à toutes leurs exigences commerciales. De l'assistance dépannage à la gestion de flottes, Vulco accompagne au quotidien les professionnels pour leur rendre la route plus sûre.

Vous souhaitez intégrer un groupe dynamique et ambitieux où les opportunités d’évolution sont réelles ? Rejoignez vite l’aventure Vulco et faites grandir votre talent !
