Name: J.A Plant Pool Gh Ltd
Description:
J.A. Plant Pool Ghana Ltd is a leading force in Ghana’s equipment, automotive, and industrial solutions space. As part of the renowned Jospong Group of Companies, we serve a diverse range of sectors, including construction, mining, sanitation, energy, and transportation, through the provision of rugged, reliable machinery and unmatched after-sales support.

With a presence in all 16 regions of Ghana, we specialize in:

 Supply of genuine spare parts

At J.A. Plant Pool, we understand that great machines are only as good as the support behind them. That’s why we’ve built a reputation for responsiveness, technical expertise, and an uptime commitment, making us a trusted partner for both public and private sector projects.

Name: ComfortDelGro Engineering Pte Ltd
Description:
As a leading company in the automotive engineering industry for over 40 years, ComfortDelGro Engineering Pte Ltd (CDGE), a wholly-owned subsidiary of ComfortDelGro Corporation Limited, has been providing a suite of automotive services for taxis, as well as private and commercial vehicles. It is also the exclusive distributor for Volvo Bus & Parts, Davanti Tyres for passenger cars and Duraturn Tyres for commercial vehicles.

Recognising the role it plays in supporting the Singapore Green Plan 2030, CDGE had, in 2021, formed a joint venture (JV) company with ENGIE South East Asia – ComfortDelGro ENGIE Pte Ltd – which made its foray into the electric vehicle (EV) charging field by winning the first tender to install over 500 charging points in Singapore. It formed a solar JV with ENGIE – ComfortDelGro ENGIE Solar Pte Ltd – in 2022 to provide renewable energy services using solar power to support the Group’s electrification journey.

CDGE recognises that at the centre of its business is its “heartware” – its automotive technicians – and the importance of ensuring that they are given the knowledge and training to do their jobs well. For this purpose, CDGE set up the CDGE Academy in September 2021 and is collaborating with TÜV SÜD PSB to upskill its technicians as well as those in the industry.

Ziebart continues to grow and offers domestic and international franchising opportunities, a best-in-class investment for qualified prospects. For more information about Ziebart including franchise opportunities, please visit www.ziebart.com.

Description:

İstanbul’da Merter, İstinye, Maslak, Ataşehir 1 ve Ataşehir 2, Esenyurt, Ankara’da Çankaya ve Çayyolu, İzmir, Antalya ve Bodrum lokasyonları olmak üzere 11 farklı lokasyonda faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir. Name: Protech Automotive Solutions
Description:
At Protech Automotive Solutions, we are dedicated to pioneering advanced diagnostic scanning, ADAS calibration, and mechanical expertise to ensure vehicle safety and reliability. Since 1993, we have consistently delivered high-tech, full-service diagnostics across various OE makes and models, maintaining an unwavering commitment to quality service.


Our Purpose: Giving Lives the All Clear

Customer safety is our top priority at every step of the repair process. We understand that customers entrust us not just with their cars but with their confidence. We honor that trust by ensuring that every issue is diagnosed accurately, every code is properly cleared, and every vehicle is returned to its pre-accident condition – inside and out.

 
Our Offerings

Our strength lies in our ability to combine advanced technology with personalized service, ensuring that every vehicle we touch is safe and road-ready.

+ On-Site Diagnostic Scanning: Performed by our fleet of highly trained mobile technicians.
+ Advanced ADAS Diagnosis and Recalibration: Ensuring proper precision and safety.
+ Mechanical Expertise: Comprehensive mechanical services to ensure all aspects of the vehicle are thoroughly inspected and repaired.
+ Virtual & On-Site Support: Provided by our team of ASE and I-CAR-certified technicians.


Why Choose Us?

With over 30 years of industry leadership and access to the nation’s largest network of static certified facilities, Protech Automotive Solutions combines advanced technology with personalized service to ensure every vehicle is safe and road-ready. We continuously innovate, develop and leverage new technologies to stay ahead of the industry curve, maintaining the highest standards of vehicle safety and reliability.

 
Discover how Protech Automotive Solutions can enhance your vehicle safety and reliability.

Name: Cary Group
Description:
Cary Group offers sustainable car care solutions, specialising in vehicle glass repair and replacement with a complementary offering in auto body repair. Our services sustain the life, value and safety features of motorised vehicles. With convenient locations, high-quality products and smart solutions, we help our customers make simplified and sustainable choices. Our journey started 1947 with Ryds Bilglas in Sweden, and today we serve customers throughout Europe with several well-known and successful brands. 

At Cary Group we care about cars, people and the planet. It is in our name today and has been part of our ambition the last 70 years, growing with family-run businesses that share the same vision and come together as one in Cary Group. For more information, visit www.carygroup.com.

Name: Carglass Germany
Description:
Carglass Deutschland ist Spezialist für die Reparatur und den Neueinbau von Fahrzeugglas. In Deutschland beschäftigt Carglass rund 2.700 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter, davon mehr als 1.950 in den deutschlandweit 410 Service-Centern. Etwa 210 Mitarbeiter sind im Customer Contact Center (Call-Center) beschäftigt. Das Unternehmen bearbeitet rund 1,4 Mio. Kundenkontakte pro Jahr und hilft Autofahrern in ganz Deutschland stationär oder unterwegs mit mehr als 170 mobilen Einheiten.

Das Unternehmen gehört seit 1990 zur internationalen Belron-Familie und firmiert seit 1993 als Carglass GmbH. Belron ist weltweit das größte auf die Reparatur von Fahrzeugglasschäden, den Scheibenersatz und die erforderlichen Rekalibrierungen von Fahrerassistenzsystemen spezialisierte Unternehmen. Belron ist in 39 Ländern auf 6 Kontinenten mit eigenen und Franchise-Betrieben tätig. Belron beschäftigt rund 30.000 Mitarbeiter, die im Jahr 2023 15,8 Millionen Aufträge ausgeführt haben, wobei der Schwerpunkt auf der Servicequalität liegt, die eine sehr hohe Kundenzufriedenheit generiert.

Name: Big Brand Tire & Service
Description:
Our vision is to be recognized as the best one-stop tire and auto repair provider. We deliver our customers the highest level of satisfaction while investing in the lives of the hardworking, dedicated people who make up our team.

Why Choose Big Brand Tire & Service? Here at Big Brand Tire & Service our goal is to provide complete customer satisfaction. We have been locally owned and operated for over 45 years. We will be here tomorrow and the next year to handle any problems you may have. Our objective is to provide you with great value. Big Brand Tire & Service offers all the "Big Brands" for less including but not limited to Bridgestone, Michelin, Firestone, Cooper, Goodyear, and many more.

Big Brand Tire & Service also offers a long list of services including Alignments, Brakes, Oil Changes, Suspension, Custom Lifting or Lowering of your vehicle and much more. We also have a list of FREE Services, FREE Alignment Checks, FREE Flat Repairs, FREE Tire Rotations, and FREE Inspections and FREE Estimates of your vehicle’s needs. We sell and stock what we advertise. No "bait and switch" tactics. Shop our competition and see for yourself. 

We sincerely appreciate your business. Our families treasure your support of local merchants, which in turn helps our communities prosper.

Name: Mekonomen Sverige
Description:
Vi på Mekonomen finns alltid här med smarta lösningar för att du ska kunna leva ditt bästa billiv. Det gör vi genom ett brett och lättillgängligt utbud av prisvärda och innovativa lösningar och produkter för konsumenter och företag. Mekonomen är en ledande aktör inom service- och eftermarknad för fordon.
Vi erbjuder både service och reparation av din bil och ett stort utbud av produkter, både via vår hemsida och i våra butiker runt om i landet. Reservdelarna som används håller hög kvalité, garantierna fortsätter att gälla och att stämpeln i serviceboken är lika mycket värd som hos en märkesbunden verkstad. 

Som företagskund hos Mekonomen kan du dessutom samla hela bilflottans verkstadsärenden på ett ställe. Ofta har företagskunden fordon av flera märken och modeller samt en geografisk spridning över stora delar av landet. Med M-Fleet ges företag möjlighet att samla sina verkstadsärenden på ett enkelt, tillgängligt, kvalitetssäkrat och kostnadseffektivt sätt. Allt för att ditt billiv ska fleeta på.

115 butiker
370 Mekonomen bilverkstad
110 MekoPartner bilverkstad
Kontor i Stockholm och Malmö
Centrallager i Strängnäs

Name: Grupo Partner
Description:
O Grupo Partner é a reunião de empresas do ramos de peças e
serviços voltadas para veículos leves, pesados e agrícolas. Nossas
atividades, se iniciaram em fevereiro de 2016, na cidade de
Curitiba-PR, após adquirirmos a unidade da Viscardi Peças, uma
tradicional concessionária com a bandeira ZF.
No ano de 2017, montamos a primeira filial na cidade de Sarandi- PR e, em 2019, a segunda filial na cidade de Curitiba- PR.
Em 2020, abrimos a nossa 4ª filial, desta vez em Santa Catarina, na
cidade de Joinville, levando nossos produtos e serviços para fora do nosso estado de origem.
Em 2025, Inauguramos a operação agrícola em Joinville - SC,
separando o ramo veicular para focar no setor. A nova unidade mira ser a maior distribuidora agrícola do Sul do país.
Neste mesmo ano, adquirimos a concessão de Câmbio Automático ZF. Com isso, foi-se introduzindo uma política de bons negócios, e principalmente qualidade no atendimento e nos serviços prestados por nossa equipe, guiados pelo nosso CEO, Renan Gomes.
Iniciou-se uma total reformulação na metodologia anteriormente
utilizada. Métodos estes, que vieram a dar resultados meses depois, como crescimento dos negócios e parcerias com transportadores e distribuidores.

Venha você fazer parte dessa história!

Description:
Full speed ahead.
Fasten your seatbelt, indicate and move into the fast lane: welcome to Derendinger.
Our family business was founded in Zurich in 1930 as a small company selling brake and clutch materials. Today, we are not only the leading supplier of automotive spare parts in Switzerland, but also one of the largest suppliers in Europe as part of the Swiss Automotive Group.
We are driven by our passion for the vehicle maintenance market and our enjoyment of providing service. That was true back then and remains true today.
We think quickly and comprehensively, respond rapidly to market demands and meet future challenges with the necessary flexibility. Your needs are always at the centre of our attention – they are the compass that guides our actions.
From consultation to delivery to installation: you can rely on our expertise. We support you when problems arise and help you to make your mark on the market.
From professional to professional: our collaboration is straightforward, characterised by mutual respect and always on equal terms – and it's also fun. We are ready. Are you?

Description:

AUTO KING implemented Micro Repair and Mobile Parts Repair concepts in 2001 in an integrated way for the first time in the world. As of 2011, AUTO KING started to serve its customers for mechanical maintenance, medium and large-scale damage repair to provide 99% customer satisfaction. 

AUTO KING service centers are able to provide high quality of service at reasonable prices due to its fast  repair techniques through the use of the latest technology. AUTO KING franchise business model is based on repairing a damaged part instead of replacing it in order to save time and money for the car owners and insurance companies while contributing to the country’s economy. AUTO KING continues to render service with its innovative services and business models to individuals and corporate business partners by its unique customer oriented service understanding and ISO 9001:2000 Quality Management System Standards which is 1,200 pages and sets our service standarts.

Name: ExpressGlass - Vidros para Viaturas
Description:
A ExpressGlass é uma empresa especializada na prestação de serviços ao nível da Reparação e Substituição do Vidro Automóvel.

Nas lojas ExpressGlass, poderá reparar ou substituir qualquer vidro automóvel, independentemente da marca, modelo ou ano de origem da viatura. A ExpressGlass garante um serviço de excelência que privilegia a segurança e responsabilidade.

Com atuação no mercado desde 2002, a ExpressGlass é atualmente a única empresa do sector, em Portugal, com capital exclusivamente nacional. O crescimento da estrutura, que conta já com aproximadamente uma centena de lojas, tem criado as condições necessárias para o aumento da quota de mercado e uma aproximação dos Clientes.

Em 2016, iniciou-se uma nova etapa da empresa, quando Inter-Risco, sociedade capital de risco, S.A., através do fundo Inter-Risco II CI, concretizou a aquisição do capital da ExpressGlass. 

Em Abril de 2022, fruto do forte crescimento orgânico na europa pelo Cary Group, a ExpressGlass é adquirida, pelo grupo, como parte da sua estratégia de expansão da posição na Península Ibérica.

Part of Inter360° Group since 2022 , UniCar occupies the premier position in gathering worldwide handover inspection data and deployment of this rich information to avoid the avoidable and contain the inevitable damage costs stemming from the increasingly long and unprotected finished vehicle supply chain.

Name: Pneus do Alcaide, SA
Description:
Somos uma empresa que opera no mercado de Pneus, no ramo da Recauchutagem de Pneus, fazendo parte de um grupo restrito de empresas europeias da rede Next Tread Recauchutadores Autorizados das marcas Goodyear, somos também um dos maiores revendedores de Pneus novos, sendo agente das principais marcas de pneus presentes no mercado e comercializando todos os tipos de pneus para todos os tipos de serviços. 

Oferecemos através dos nossos Postos de Assistência (Tremoceira, Santeira, Benedita,) quer através de uma rede móvel de assistência que cobre já uma área considerável do nosso país.
Somos uma empresa certificada de acordo com a norma ISO 9001:2015 no âmbito do Sistema Português da Qualidade.

Os nossos produtos de recauchutagem são Homologados desde Junho de 2002, através do Regulamento 109 da CEE/ONU.

História:

A empresa nasce em 1981, nas mãos de Augusto Laureano, com a atividade de revenda de Pneus Ligeiros e Pesados, num pequeno posto em Porto de Mós. Prestando assistência aos seus clientes e procurando sempre satisfazer as necessidades dos seus clientes a empresa cresce e daí surgem umas novas instalações em Tremoceira, lugar onde ainda hoje nos encontramos sediados.

Em 1991, alargamos o mercado para a indústria de Recauchutagem de Pneus, tornamo-nos um Recauchutator Oficial da Goodyear e contamos já com quatro postos de assistência, um deles, a Alcaide & Salco em Leça da Palmeira. Este posto nasce em 2019 de uma parceria entre o Grupo Salco e Pneus do Alcaide.

Em 2022, cimenta-se uma história que já tem vindo a correr: David e Jânia Laureano assumem o controlo total da empresa, reforçando assim o compromisso e confiança no projeto futuro.

Esta é a nossa história até hoje: procuramos ser únicos no mercado, procurando soluções amigas do ambiente, investindo em equipamentos que permitem reduzir a pegada ambiental e ao mesmo tempo conseguirmos ser mais competitivos.

Name: AllTracks Engineering
Description:
AllTracks – Redonnez une nouvelle vie à vos machines de damage

Saviez-vous qu’une dameuse, c’est :

    10 tonnes d’acier et de technologie,
    500 chevaux de puissance,
    8000 heures de fonctionnement en moyenne, pour une durée de vie souvent limitée à seulement 7 ans ?

 Un impact écologique sous-estimé :
Chaque machine construite mobilise des ressources considérables. Lorsqu'une dameuse atteint la fin de son cycle traditionnel, la majorité de ses pièces, pourtant très coûteuses en énergie à produire, ne sont pas réutilisées.

Chez AllTracks, nous avons choisi une autre voie :
En reconditionnant les engins existants, nous permettons d’économiser jusqu’à 55 tonnes de CO₂ par machine, soit l'équivalent de :

    793 tours de la Terre en TGV,
    55 allers-retours Paris-New York en avion,
    484 000 gobelets en plastique,
    2970 jours de chauffage domestique.

 Notre expertise unique :
Grâce à notre parfaite connaissance des machines de damage, nous restaurons leur performance d’origine :

    Pression au sol réduite : 100 g/cm²,
    Capacité ascensionnelle : 100%,
    Capacité de poussée : 9 tonnes,
    Vitesse de déplacement : 23 km/h.

 Et nous allons plus loin !
Nous adaptons également ces machines pour des usages agricoles et environnementaux :

    Travaux de méthanisation,
    Préparation des pistes de ski,
    Broyage en zones humides,
    Épandage spécialisé,
    Débardage...

 Découvrez nos réalisations sur notre chaîne YouTube :
https://www.youtube.com/@alltracksengineering/playlists 

AllTracks – Pour des machines plus durables, plus responsables, et toujours plus performantes.

Hållbarhet är en viktigt för Svenska Bussglas och Cary Group. Förutom att delta i forskningsprojekt på koncernnivå går samtliga lånebilar på el, vi är ISO-certifierade inom miljö och strävar alltid efter att reparera istället för att byta ut.

Name: Piva Jaguar Land Rover
Description:
Piva Jaguar Land Rover opera nel settore automobilistico dal 1964 e ha sede in Via Carlo Maria Maggi 70 ad Abbiategrasso (MI). PIVA si avvale della professionalità di 20 dipendenti con oltre 3000 metri quadrati di struttura. 

LA NOSTRA STORIA
La concessionaria PIVA viene fondata nel 1964 da Giancarlo Piva, imprenditore di origine veneta, che entra nel settore automobilistico aprendo un’officina meccanica ad Abbiategrasso. La passione per il lavoro e la sua intuizione lo porta ben presto ad avere ambizioni più grandi. Nel 1972 firma l'accordo con Austin Rover e più tardi con Land Rover. Nel 1979 presenta ai propri clienti la carrozzeria interna e nel 1983 acquisisce una nuova sede in Via Dante 71, sempre ad Abbiategrasso, per il marchio Suzuki, ora gestito dal figlio Umberto, mentre nel 2006 passa la conduzione dell’attività Land Rover (che ingloberà poi anche il marchio Jaguar) alla figlia Orietta, che prosegue nel segno dell'eccellenza dei servizi e dell'affidabilità dell'assistenza. I clienti di PIVA possono affidarsi al suo staff per ricevere una consulenza tout-court riguardo alla propria esperienza di guida e di vita con i modelli Jaguar Land Rover.

Name: SERMI Association
Description:
Welcome to SERMI – the Association created to further develop, own, operate and maintain a scheme and process initially proposed by the EU Forum on Access to Vehicle RMI (Repair and Maintenance Information) to approve and authorise independent operators (IO’s) working in the European automotive aftermarket industry sector, to enable them to access security-related RMI.

SERMI has been created as part of the requirements of the Delegated Regulation (EU) N° 2021/1244, Regulation (EU) N° 2018/858 and Regulation (EC) N° 692/2008, which grant standardised access to technical information whilst establishing specific provisions for access to vehicle security features. Subsequently the ‘EU Forum on Access to Vehicle RMI’ was established and issued in October 2009 a report describing the complete process and architecture on access to security related RMI, including an accreditation scheme for Independent Operators. This scheme is currently under revision to align with the latest Regulation.

SERMI has been established as de-facto association under Belgian law. It is organised as a joint responsibility between Vehicle Manufacturers and Independent Operators as stakeholders who are primarily involved in the process to obtain or provide access to security-related RMI, parts and functions.

SERMI acts as scheme owner to the European co-operation for Accreditation (EA).

The updated SERMI scheme is validated by the European Accreditation association on the 3rd of February 2023. The scheme will become operational in August 2023. The SERMI organisation is responsible for this. Currently authorisation for access to anti-theft related RMI is handled by vehicle manufacturers directly. Parties requiring such authorisation in advance of SERMI becoming operational should contact the vehicle manufacturer concerned.

Name: HOMER Smart Auto Services
Description:
Homer Auto Service 2003 yılında 2.500 m² büyüklüğündeki laboratuvar servis alanında yapılan yoğun Ar-Ge çalışmaları sonucunda geliştirildi. Marka, edindiği deneyim ve gözlemlerin ışığında “ihtiyaç olduğu andan yolcuğun tekrar devamına kadar” olan sürecin onarım, maliyet ve yönetim çözümlerini tek çatı altında sunmaktadır. Homer Auto Servis, her türlü marka, model ve elektrikli aracın hasar onarımının, mekanik onarımının, boyasız göçük düzeltme işlemlerinin, lastik saklama, çekici, yolda onarım gibi hizmetlerin verilmesi, aracın her türlü ihtiyacının karşılanması için Türkiye genelinde tek merkezden 360 derece yönetim sağlayan bir alt yapı ve organizasyon gerçekleştirmektedir. Sektörün vizyoner kurucu lideri olarak, 30 yılı aşan tecrübesiyle Homer Auto Service, TSE Garantili Servis Noktaları ile Türkiye’nin her yerindeki tüm müşterilerine, aynı standartlarda fiyat, gerektiğinde orijinal yedek parça ve kaliteli işçilik garantisi sunan tek servis markasıdır.
HOMER Auto Service, kurumsal müşterilerinin yanı sıra bireysel araç kullanıcıları için de “Yolculuk Keyfinin Hiç Kesilmediği Bir Dünya Yaratmak” vizyonunu gerçekleştirmek için araçların ve araç sahiplerinin ihtiyaç ve taleplerini tamamıyla karşılayan aplikasyonunu; Güncel teknolojinin tüm olanaklarını, teknik altyapısını ve servis ağını kullanarak adım adım geliştirmiş, yoluna “Homer halleder” sloganı ve HOMER Smart Auto Services markası ile devam etmektedir.

Name: POLE POSITION - Salon de la carrosserie
Description:
Cette année, en remplacement du Salon de la Carrosserie, MOBILIANS a le plaisir de vous proposer un nouveau format de manifestation à destination des professionnels de l’automobile : Pole Position / les talents de la mobilité.

Dédié aux professionnels des métiers de la branche automobile et de la mobilité, ce nouveau rendez-vous des professionnels, a pour ambition de fédérer et valoriser la filière. 

Rassemblant les principaux acteurs de la profession, "POLE POSITION | Les talents de la mobilité" propose un large panel de compétences et de partenaires présents.

Cet événement fera également place aux enjeux et mutations de nos métiers par le biais de 5 ateliers/workshop proposés tout au long de l'après-midi pour approfondir vos compétences et gérer votre activité professionnelle.

Venez donc retrouver au Domaine des Griffiers à Niort dés 12h00 pour partager cet évenement professionnel en toute convivialité !

Le salon est organisé par #MOBILIANS (ex-CNPA), organisation patronale fondée en 1902 pour défendre les intérêts des entreprises de la distribution et des services de l’automobile en France. Avec 160 000 entreprises, 500 000 salariés, 70 000 jeunes formés et un chiffre d’affaires de 170 milliards €, MOBILIANS œuvre en faveur d’un secteur innovant et pourvoyeur d’emploi, à travers 3 missions principales : défendre les intérêts de la profession, fournir des services (social, juridique, fiscal, environnement, risques professionnels) aux entreprises du secteur et mener une prospective sur les métiers de l’automobile.

Name: TFER - Technicien Froid Embarqué Routier
Description:
Les techniciens du froid embarqué routier sont des professionnels qui travaillent dans l'industrie du transport alimentaire. 
Ils sont responsables de l'installation, de la maintenance et de la réparation des systèmes de réfrigération embarqués sur les camions de livraison de denrées périssables.

Ces professionnels qualifiés doivent être capables de diagnostiquer et de réparer rapidement les pannes de leurs équipements pour garantir la sécurité des aliments transportés et éviter les pertes économiques pour les entreprises de transport.

Ils doivent également être conscients de l'importance de la réglementation en matière de sécurité alimentaire et de la nécessité de maintenir des températures constantes pour garantir la qualité des produits transportés.

C'est un métier qui requiert des compétences techniques spécialisées, une attention méticuleuse aux détails et une capacité à travailler dans des conditions difficiles sur la route.

Name: Fixxr
Description:
Fixxr is the mobile mechanic that comes to you. We're reshaping the way you think about car care—combining convenience, affordability, and radical transparency.  

Founded with the vision of making car care more than just a necessity, but an effortless and transparent experience, Fixxr is here to redefine the industry norms.  

Getting your car serviced can feel like entering a labyrinth of hidden costs and confusing jargon. That's why we're here to simplify the process and give you back the confidence you deserve.  Whether it's diagnostics or repairs, count on us to provide top-notch services wherever you are. With Fixxr, we bring the mechanics to you, so you can get back on the road with minimal disruption to your day. With us, there are no hidden fees or surprises—just honest, straightforward service you can trust. 

Our commitment extends beyond our customers to the hardworking mechanics who keep your vehicles running smoothly. At Fixxr, we support our mechanics, empowering them to grow their careers and businesses while delivering top-notch service to you. Because when they succeed, you do too.  

Let Fixxr be your partner in ensuring your vehicle stays in prime condition, giving you the peace of mind to hit the road with confidence every time. Discover the Fixxr difference—where car care gets a long-overdue makeover.

Name: SHAFT Automotive Engineering
Description:
In 1999, we owned our first BMW. When the time came for the maintenance. We struggled like everybody else due to the lack of good BMW garages and below averages local dealership service that costs us a fortune each time. Therefore, we decided to work on our own BMWs at home garage. Our friends and others trusted our clean work and how fast identify the real root cause of the problem without replace unnecessary parts. 
Cars and motorcycles tuning came along together since the beginning. Since 2006, we have a winning career. It began at the national racings when we won the auto-cross race league first place in our Class, up to the latest accomplishment at the car shows best-modified class and Stance class. 
Now, over 24 years of experience, custom tuning, and certified Engineering. Finally, we decided to establish an Automotive Engineering Service Center based in Dammam, KSA. We offer first class automotive and motorcycles Service & Tuning. Shaft automotive engineering service use OEM Service standards with OEM approved tools carried by passionate mechanics and engineers to deliver high-end quality professional service. Integrity & Quality are our values to exceed customer’s expectations with reasonable costs. Now, SHAFT expanding it's business with new division doing PDI (Pre-Delivery Inspection).

Name: ConformGest S.p.A.
Description:

Siamo l'unica società di servizi in grado di gestire contemporaneamente, in nome e per conto del venditore, sia la Garanzia Convenzionale che la Garanzia Legale di Conformità. 
Il nostro ruolo è trasformare il post-vendita in un vantaggio strategico: forniamo ai dealer una tutela legale completa (inclusa assistenza pre-contenzioso gratuita) e una metodologia di lavoro certificata UNI EN ISO 9001. 

Questo approccio non solo protegge il venditore, ma garantisce anche al consumatore finale un processo chiaro, trasparente e veloce in caso di necessità, elevando la sicurezza del suo acquisto.
La nostra rete è capillare in Italia e in espansione in Europa (Spagna, Portogallo, Polonia e Romania), offrendo al mercato un'affidabilità certificata e un'esperienza con oltre il 95% di clienti soddisfatti.

La nostra missione è proteggere il dealer attraverso la conformità legale e l'efficienza operativa, e allo stesso tempo garantire un acquisto sicuro e sereno al consumatore, elevando lo standard di qualità e fiducia nel settore automotive.

Name: Garage Canagui
Description:
Le garage Canagui assure l’entretien courant de votre véhicule qu’il soit neuf ou d’occasion : vidange moteur, contrôle et remplacement des filtres, contrôle et remplacement des plaquettes de frein.
Pour vous assurer un service optimum, nous vous recommandons de prendre rendez-vous au : 625 77 54 05 (du lundi 08 heures au Vendredi 13 heures).
Avant toute intervention, nous vous remettons un devis détaillé pour acceptation.
Nous vous proposons également à prix compétitifs des pneus toute marque, des batteries toute marque, des forfaits de recharge de climatisation, etc.
En cas de panne ou d’anomalie sur votre véhicule, nos techniciens réalisent un diagnostic précis pour vous assurer un service de qualité.

Explorez également notre gamme de véhicules neufs, utilitaires, 4x4, hybrides, véhicules d'entreprise, citadines et familiales : 
Des modèle sûrs, confortables et fiables, à même d’assurer pour les années à venir vos trajets personnels, familiaux ou professionnels.
Pour répondre à vos attentes notre philosophie repose sur deux piliers : la qualité et la priorité au client.
La qualité est véritablement au cœur de toutes les marques distribuées, c’est d’elle que découlent notamment la sécurité, le confort et la fiabilité des véhicules proposés et la priorité donnée aux clients permet de tisser avec vous un lien unique pour étoffer la gamme de véhicules proposés et améliorer constamment le service rendu.

Name: KapitalCar'e
Description:
Chez KapitalCar'e, nous sommes spécialisés dans la protection haut de gamme intérieure et extérieure de véhicules, à 20min du centre de Lyon en prenant l'autoroute A6.

Prévention contre les agressions du quotidien pour préserver la valeur de votre véhicule :
✦ Rénovation intérieure & extérieure KapitalCar'e
✦ Protection céramique Gtechniq  (réduction des micro-rayures + résistance aux UV, aux pluies acides et au ternissement)
✦ Protection par film auto-cicatrisant Bodyfence (résistance aux projections de graviers et aux rayures)

Name: The CAPS Consortium Ltd
Description:
The Common Automotive Platform Standard (CAPS) is uniquely committed to expanding data access to remove friction whilst driving efficiency throughout the automotive insurance claims industry. We ensure that collaboration and information exchange can happen seamlessly among insurers, work providers, supply chain partners, systems, and drivers. Clearer communication equals a more efficient claims process from top to bottom.

Our platform was created specifically for all stakeholders in the Automotive claims process. The technology is fully scalable, and users control how their data is viewed and exchanged. CAPS is a secure automated platform/service allowing real-time data exchange. 

CAPS is user-configurable and connects to all major body shop management systems, and its ecosystem continues to grow. This means users of existing systems can connect now or change systems in the future without worry. CAPS is agnostic, and therefore, operates to serve the entire automotive claims industry better.

CAPS users can maximise productivity with customised workflows aligned to how their business works. There’s no complex implementation process or software to install—it’s quick and easy to get started with the CAPS community. 

We are committed to facilitating more effective data exchange and a stronger digitised claims industry overall.

Name: Just Like New Overspray Removal, Inc.
Description:
Just Like New Overspray Removal, Inc. has been the leading overspray company for over 30 yrs.  We specialize in the overspray removal of cars, boats, RV’s, aircraft and buildings just to name a few.  Our exclusive overspray removal processes are performed by highly skilled technicians who are capable of handling any overspray type.  Our overspray specialists can respond to most claims within 24 hours nationwide.  To assure claimant confidence we provide 24 hr 800 toll-free lines to answer any questions.  Whether it’s 1 vehicle or 1,000, Just Like New Overspray Removal, Inc. is your best choice for expert quality management and impeccable service.

Reducing the liability on an overspray claim begins with the important first step, documentation.  Vehicles are thoroughly inspected before the cleaning process begins.  Claimants sign pre-inspection reports, which separate prior damage independent from the overspray claim.  Parts of the vehicle that cannot be cleaned are noted as well.  After the cleaning, claimants sign a release to show ensure satisfaction and to further reduce future liability problems.

Our on-site specialists will meet with the claimants at times convenient to their work schedules.  They will demonstrate our cleaning process and answer any inquiries.  Vehicles will be cleaned on-site.  Our uniformed technicians will complete the vehicle before the claimant leaves work the same day, thus eliminating the high cost of auto rentals.

Just Like New Overspray Removal, Inc.  Specializes in the removal of all types of contaminants, including but not limited to:
Latex, Enamel, Acrylic, Polyurethane Foam, Vandalism, Cement and Concrete, Acid Rain, Industrial Fallout, Urethane, Epoxy, Fire Soot, Graffiti, Iron Filings, Tar/Oil, Volcanic Ash and essentially all other overspray contaminate possibilities.

We understand the complexity that an overspray claim can present.  Our skilled staff has all your answers.

Name: Core Diagnostics - Remote Diagnostics
Description:
Core Diagnostics is a cloud-based remote diagnostics company. Helping you repair more vehicles through 1 tool.
Our team work remotely to fix your chosen vehicle in three easy steps:
Step 1. Plug-in
Locate the OBDII port and insert the Core Remote Interface.
Download our dedicated remote assistance app onto your tablet from the Google Play Store.
Step 2. Select
Select the vehicle and job required. Launch the remote service.
While a Secure Connection is established, it is recommended that a battery support unit is connected to the vehicle to ensure stable battery voltage is maintained (especially for any flash programming jobs).
Step 3. Connect to a Core Technician
Our expert technicians will now complete the requested jobs in real-time.
Once you are connected to a technician, you will be able to use the live chat feature within the app in case any further information is required and so we can keep you updated on the job progress. Getting your job completed in the minimum amount of time.

OUR STORY:
Endless Creations was founded in 1999 as an engineering and trading company. With an entrepreneurial approach, the company started by importing, marketing, and selling Diesel fuel/water separators. Recognizing the growing trend of predictive and preventive maintenance for heavy-duty vehicles and the industrial sectors, the company succeeded in offering its customers smart solutions that achieve optimum operations, reduced downtime for their equipment and better maintenance cost. These solutions included special diesel engine parts and analysis of used oil.
In 2007, Endless Creations added speed limiters to its products portfolio and developed this division over the years which now includes vehicle GPS tracking and fleet management solutions with more than 10,000 vehicle installations.
In 2010,Endless Creations decided to incorporate premium lubricants into the products portfolio, as a result of the extended knowledge in used-oil analysis and different Lubrication applications in Africa, middle and far east regions, and it became the core business ever since.
In 2015, Endless Creations developed a new dynamic business model to achieve sustainable growth objectives.
In 2017, it expanded its products portfolio to include batteries and automotive aftermarket parts in 2018.
In 2020, Endless Creations invested heavily in team organization, development, and digital transformation infrastructure.
In 2022, the company started implementing a top-notch integrated ERP system to support its expansion and ensure a flawless team and customer experience. Later the same year, Endless Creations launched its retail services arm “ElCatalog” and a Products range under the same name

Name: Strike Brasil
Description:
Em 2011 nasceu a STRIKE BRASIL, na cidade de Ponta Porã-MS, baseada em uma humilde ideia de fornecer peças exclusivas que não estavam disponíveis no Brasil para personalização de camionetes. Rapidamente a ideia se tornou realidade, e a empresa passou a ser referência no mercado, uma vez que as personalizações eram realmente únicas no país (e no mundo!).

Em seguida, em 2013, a STRIKE BRASIL começou a abranger outros nichos que estavam diretamente conectados à concepção inicial: em menos de um ano viramos referência no país em performance; não só de camionetes mas de todos os veículos e maquinários, dos populares até superesportivos; dos caminhões aos tratores. Nosso software de injeção eletrônica tem uma qualidade indiscutível, contando com diversos engenheiros da Inglaterra e Alemanha desenvolvendo softwares de primeira linha para nossos clientes.

Também pioneiros com nossas unidades móveis, já atendemos clientes de norte a sul do Brasil. Já contamos com dezenas de pontos de revenda e aplicação de nossos serviços e produtos espalhados no país e com a primeira unidade internacional já em funcionamento!

Em 2015 desenvolvemos nossos kits de suspensão, sempre visando a melhor qualidade possível de produtos para nossos clientes. Com o melhor custo benefício, agora atendemos a vasta maioria de picapes médias e pequenas do mercado!

Com essa filosofia -de ser os primeiros no Brasil-, a empresa cresceu, e hoje conta com mais de uma dúzia de filiais e autorizados espalhados Brasil afora. E assim seguimos: com a meta de continuar sendo os pioneiros no Brasil -e agora América Latina- com qualidade indiscutível!

At Acumec, we understand that operational downtime is the greatest challenge our customers face. Our service model is built on efficiency and technical excellence, ensuring that whether you are an independent contractor or a major utility provider, your fleet remains compliant and operational.

By combining the innovation of the Revive Group with our extensive engineering heritage, we deliver the parts, servicing, and machinery that the modern wastewater industry demands.

Name: Leaseway España SLU
Description:
Bienvenido a Leaseway España!

Nacimos hace más de 15 de años en Francia en la región donde hoy somos los lideres para suministrar vehículos para su uso como vehículos de sustitución, a los talleres de reparación y a redes de asistencia. En Francia, trabajamos con la mayoría de las redes de talleres.
Nuestra filosofía se basa en ofrecer el alquiler de vehículos, hasta 36 meses, con las condiciones más competitivas y facilitando el acceso al alquiler a los clientes que lo deseen. 

Para poder ofrecer mensualidades competitivas nos basamos en la especialización y en unos procesos ágiles y sin tareas que no aporten valor añadido.
Leaseway España ha comenzado su andadura en febrero del 2022, con el objetivo de ser EL ALIADO de los talleres PARA SUS VEHÍCULOS DE SUSTITUCIÓN. Estamos convencidos de que vamos a escribir una historia de crecimiento, basada en unos clientes fieles y con un equipo comprometido en conseguir los mejores resultados de satisfacción hacia nuestros clientes. 

La imagen del vehículo de sustitución es la extensión de la imagen del taller, por lo que disponer de vehículos de poca antigüedad y en perfecto estado de funcionamiento e imagen exterior, impacta muy positivamente en la fidelización de los clientes. Un vehículo de sustitución siempre supone un coste para los talleres, y alquilarlo es la mejor opción. 

Alquilar con Leaseway, supone reducir gastos, maximizar el beneficio y tener vehículos a la última. 
Como estamos convencidos de esto, te ofrecemos una variedad de vehículos nuevos o de poca antigüedad a los precios más competitivos!

Name: Euromaster Nederland
Description:
Euromaster Nederland is lid van de Euromaster groep: een netwerk van service- en verkooppunten voor banden en auto-onderhoud. Wij bedienen onze klanten met passie, en garanderen zo een continue, veilige en efficiënte mobiliteit. Op elk moment, waar ze zich ook bevinden en wat hun activiteiten ook zijn, bieden we de juiste banden en het beste voertuigonderhoud, voor de juiste prijs. Dit doen wij altijd op een eerlijke, vakkundige en attente manier. Daarom zijn onze klanten bij ons in goede handen.

Wij bedienen zowel de zakelijke als de particuliere markt vanuit circa 100 vestigingen waarvan 12 franchise vestigingen. Daarnaast rijden er ruim 150 mobiele bandenbussen, servicebussen gericht op ruitschadeherstel en telematica, pechservicetrucks en mobiele uitlijners rond om klanten op locatie te kunnen helpen. 

Op de zakelijke markt (leasemaatschappijen, transportondernemingen, industrie, landbouw en grondverzet) zijn wij Europees marktleider op het gebied van banden en bandenservice. In Nederland zijn wij in het Rotterdamse havengebied en op luchthaven Schiphol de belangrijkste partner voor al het rijdend materiaal. Euromaster levert maatwerk en is dé betrouwbare bandenpartner voor bedrijven met 1 tot meer dan 1.000 voertuigen. 

Particulieren kunnen bij Euromaster terecht voor de beste bandenservice en het volledige onderhoud van hun auto zoals APK, grote en kleine beurt en aircoservice. Wij stemmen het auto-onderhoud af op het kenteken, het aantal gereden kilometers en de fabriekseisen.

Name: I'm droid
Description:
I’m Droid nasce con un obiettivo chiaro: rendere la mobilità urbana più sostenibile, smart e accessibile a tutti. Per questo offriamo servizi integrati di noleggio, vendita e assistenza di veicoli elettrici, puntando su un’esperienza cliente semplice e completa.

Siamo una realtà giovane, dinamica e in continua espansione, che punta a creare un ecosistema di mobilità all’avanguardia. Dalla gestione dei veicoli di sharing fino alla vendita di motoveicoli elettrici, ogni dettaglio del nostro servizio è pensato per offrire soluzioni innovative e personalizzate, capaci di rispondere alle esigenze di un pubblico sempre più attento al cambiamento.

La nostra forza? Un team motivato e appassionato, che lavora ogni giorno per portare sul mercato soluzioni che fanno la differenza. Siamo sempre alla ricerca di persone intraprendenti, orientate al cliente e desiderose di crescere in un ambiente stimolante e tecnologico.

Con sedi operative in diverse città, il nostro servizio si distingue per qualità, puntualità e attenzione al cliente, garantendo supporto completo durante tutte le fasi del noleggio e della manutenzione dei veicoli.

Se sei un appassionato di mobilità elettrica, tecnologia e innovazione, e vuoi fare la differenza in un settore in piena evoluzione, I’m Droid è il posto che fa per te! Con noi avrai l’opportunità di lavorare in un ambiente in forte crescita, dove ogni giorno porta nuove sfide e opportunità di sviluppo personale e professionale.

Smart mobility. Made simple.
Scopri di più su www.imdroid.it o seguici per rimanere aggiornato sulle nostre novità e opportunità di lavoro.

Name: Carrozzeria Riva
Description:
Una Storia di Passione e Maestria dal 1924.

Da quattro generazioni, Carrozzeria Riva non è solo un’azienda: è una famiglia, un luogo dove la cura per i dettagli incontra la passione per l'automobile. 
Ogni riparazione, ogni restauro racconta una storia di artigianalità, dedizione e innovazione. 
Con una struttura di 10.000 mq e un team di 20 persone, il nostro lavoro è un equilibrio tra tradizione e progresso, sempre al servizio del cliente.

L’arte del fare bene
Dietro ogni auto riparata c’è un gruppo di persone che mettono cuore e competenze in ciò che fanno. Il nostro team, composto da giovani talenti e professionisti esperti, condivide un unico obiettivo: offrire un servizio che non si limiti a soddisfare, ma che sorprenda e lasci un segno.

Relazioni e Fiducia
Nel corso degli anni, abbiamo costruito partnership solide con concessionari e marchi prestigiosi come Volkswagen, Porsche, Toyota, BMW-Mini e Ferrari, sempre con la stessa filosofia: lavorare con passione e precisione, indipendentemente dal modello o dal valore dell’auto. 
Per noi, ogni cliente è unico, e ogni richiesta è un’opportunità per dimostrare la nostra eccellenza.

Il cliente al centro
Per Carrozzeria Riva, il cliente non è un semplice destinatario del servizio, ma un vero protagonista. Dall’accettazione alla consegna, il nostro approccio trasparente e personalizzato è pensato per garantire fiducia e serenità.

Missione e Valori
La nostra missione è custodire e tramandare l’arte del fare bene, puntando su qualità, innovazione e rispetto per le persone. Crediamo nelle mani che lavorano, nelle idee che innovano e nelle relazioni che crescono. Investiamo costantemente in formazione e tecnologia, certi che il futuro si costruisca insieme, un passo alla volta.

Description:
AutoSonix is the global leader in advanced automotive acoustic diagnostics, offering a complete end-to-end ecosystem for data collection, transmission, analysis, and display. 

Leveraging the industry's most unique and detailed datasets of real-world vehicle sound signatures, our technology enables never before seen levels of accuracy, AI-driven diagnostics and predictive insights. 

From auctions and inspection companies to banks, fleets,warranty companies,diagnostic equipment manufacturers,OEMs and dealerships, AutoSonix provides scalable solutions tailored to your operations—reducing arbitration, improving customer experience, and driving smarter, faster, and more cost-effective decision-making across the entire vehicle lifecycle.

AutoSonix goes far beyond comparing noises to a database. By analyzing sound patterns in real time, it scales effortlessly across any make, model, or even brand-new vehicles without relying on pre-recorded libraries. This approach enables intelligence that grows with every use—understanding not just what a sound is, but what it means mechanically. The result is true scalability and smarter diagnostics packed into a Master-tech in a Microchip , giving anyone within the mobility chain actionable insights instantly, anywhere.

Name: RAYMOND AUTO BODY INC.
Description:
At Raymond Auto Body our goal is to restore your peace of mind - then we fix your car. After an accident, the last thing you need is to run around getting estimates, arranging rental cars, dealing with insurance companies and all of that stuff that just consumes your time.

Our process is much simpler. You merely call your insurance company and give them the details of your claim and tell them you’re taking your car to Raymond Auto Body. Next, drop your car off at Raymond, or if need be we’ll pick it up. We take care of the rest - we’ll get you into a rental car and back on the road -- usually within 20 minutes or less. Next, we inspect your car, detail the damages, provide an estimate to your insurance provider, meet with their adjusters and get their approval to begin repairing your car.

Then the magic begins. We’ll get your car back to good as new condition, and along the way your personal service provider keeps you up to date on your vehicles status. You’ll notice throughout the process you’ve had to do nothing but notify your insurance company. We’ve taken care of everything else. The only thing left is the “wow” moment. That’s when you pick up your car and say, “Wow! It’s never looked this good!”

OUR ENTIRE STAFF IS PLEDGED AND DEDICATED TO OUR MISSION:

Name: Carbana Car Wash
Description:
Carbana started, based on the belief that car washes in the UK could be much better.

Business partners Simon Moxon and Wayne Munnelly understand that the majority of UK hand car washes were in a deplorable state. A lot of petrol forecourt car wash offerings were substandard and had inconsistent quality, ineffective hardware which was quite often out of service. Sites were unattractive with no emphasis on environmental issues and in some cases staff were controlled by modern slavery, with unfair wages and a lack of protective clothing. There was also an apparent inefficiency in water usage, acid chemical and waste runoff into main sewers, and poor compliance with environmental laws.

Both Moxon and Munnelly knew there is a much better way, so Carbana started to be developed.

Carbana’s mission is to professionalise car cleaning in the UK with a high quality, technology driven, eco-friendly self-serve car washing brand.

Carbana wants its customers to have both a Clean Car and Clean Conscience today!

Name: Metal Molas.
Description:
A Metal Molas: Uma história de tradição e inovação

Fundada em 1984 como oficina de reforma de implementos rodoviários e caminhões, a Metal Molas expandiu seus horizontes ao longo dos anos, construindo uma sólida reputação de qualidade e inovação.

Nossa história:

Início (1984): Oficina especializada em manutenção de implementos rodoviários e caminhões, incluindo suspensão, molas, caixas de carga, peças e acessórios, solda, alongamento e encurtamento de chassis.
Crescimento e diversificação: Evolução para a fabricação de implementos rodoviários, como carrocerias prancha, tanques de carga e tanques para produtos perigosos.
Inovação (2019): Criação da Metal Plasma, linha dedicada ao corte e dobra de aço carbono e aço inox, atendendo clientes internos e externos. Fabricação de perfis dobrados, estruturais, chapas calandradas, flanges metálicas, corte a plasma de alta resolução e conjuntos soldados sob medida.

A Metal Molas hoje:
Empresa consolidada: Referência em implementos rodoviários e corte e dobra, com foco em qualidade, tradição e inovação.
Soluções completas: Ampla gama de produtos e serviços para atender às necessidades específicas de cada cliente.
Compromisso com a excelência: Equipe altamente qualificada, processos otimizados e tecnologia de ponta garantem produtos e serviços de alto nível.

Metal Molas: Sua parceira ideal para o sucesso.

Name: OtoDoktor
Description:
1991 yılından bugüne Nissan Yetkili Bayii ve Servisi olarak faaliyetlerine devam etmekte olan Okar Otomotiv Paz. ve Dış Tic. AŞ’nin bir markası olarak 2008 yılında Adana’da hizmet vermeye başlayan OtoDoktor, hali hazırda 6.500 m2’’si kapalı alan olmak üzere toplam 9.000 m2 alanda, bölgenin en büyük hasar onarım merkezlerinden biri olmanın yanı sıra Türkiye’nin en büyük Bosch Car Servisi olma unvanını da taşımaktadır.
Yetkili Servis tecrübesi üzerine inşa edilen OtoDoktor markasının 2018 yılında İstanbul/Kartal’da faaliyetlerine başlayan OtoDoktor Kartal Şubesi ise, 2.700 m2‘si kapalı alan olmak üzere toplamda 4.500 m2 üzerine kurulu olarak Türkiye’nin en büyük Bosch Car Servislerinden birisi konumundadır.
Adana’da 13, İstanbul Kartal’da 3 yılı aşkın süredir hizmet veremeye devam eden OtoDoktor , başta anlaşmalı olduğu DRD Filo Kiralama, Garenta, Hedef Filo Kiralama, Leaseplan, ALD Automotive, Oto Plan, Garanti Filo, Borlease, Teb Arval, Burgan Oto Leasing gibi Türkiye’nin önde gelen filo kiralama şirketleri ve AKSigorta, Allianz, Anadolu, HDI, Sompo Japan, Groupama, Magdeburger, Doğa, Gulf, Ray, Unico, Mapfre, Zurich, Eureko, Ankara, Ethica, Neova, Bereket, Koru, Quicq, Orient, Türkiye, Generali gibi Türkiye’nin önde gelen sigorta şirketlerine, bakım, onarım servisi ve hasar merkezi olarak hizmet vermektedir.
OtoDoktor Adana ve Kartal Şubeleri, Bosch Car Service güvencesi ile özel servis olarak marka ve model ayrımı olmadan TS-12047 Belgesi kapsamında tüm garantili araçlara, garantisi bozulmadan yetkili servis standartlarında periyodik bakım ve onarım hizmetleri de sunmaktadır.
Filo ve özel araçlar için özel bir yaklaşımla “müşteri memnuniyeti önceliğini” ilke olarak benimseyen OtoDoktor, uzman personeli ve yönetim ekibi ile iş ortaklarının da çıkarlarını gözeterek sektörün önemli oyuncuları arasına girmiş ve tercih edilen bir marka haline gelmiştir.

Name: HMI - Handelsmarketing-Initiative
Description:
Das Kooperationskonzept HMI (Handelsmarketing-Initiative) ist mit rund 600 Mitgliedern in Deutschland und weiteren 90 angeschlossenen Betrieben in Österreich das größte Handelssystem unter dem Dach der GRS, den Goodyear Retail Systems, einer Tochter des Goodyear-Konzerns. Seit fast 40 Jahren verbinden die GRS hohe Beratungskompetenz mit fundierten Kenntnissen aus dem Kfz- und Reifenmarkt. Gerade in Zeiten der Digitalisierung liefern die GRS wertvolle Unterstützung, mit der die Auswirkungen auf die Abläufe in den Werkstätten, das Serviceangebot und veränderte Kaufverhalten von Kunden bewältigt werden können. Bereits seit 1986 schließen sich Reifenfachhandelsunternehmen dem Konzept an, die sich im harten Wettbewerb mit einem individuellen Marktauftritt behaupten wollen. Unternehmer, die sich dafür entscheiden, das Goodyear Marken-Portfolio überdurchschnittlich zu vermarkten, können Mitglied der Handelsmarketing-Initiative werden und von dem Erfahrungsschatz und fachspezifischem Marketing-Know-how profitieren, das beim Abverkauf von Reifen und Dienstleistungen eine wertvolle Unterstützung bietet. Zum Angebot gehören handelsbezogene, individuell auf jedes Mitglied zugeschnittene Werbemaßnahmen – vor allem während der klassischen Umrüstperioden – und verschiedene Händler-Homepage-Pakete mit integriertem Online-Terminplaner. Zudem profitieren HMI-Mitglieder von zahlreichen exklusiven GRS-Leistungen wie dem Flottenmanagement der 4Fleet Group, dem Zentraleinkauf über die Freie Reifeneinkaufsinitiative (FRI), dem Warenwirtschaftssystem tiresoft 3 und der automatischen Nachschubbesteuerung VMI.

Description:
Estimatics is transforming the automotive industry with AI-powered damage assessment technology that empowers dealerships to make faster, more accurate decisions. Our platform delivers independent, data-driven estimates in seconds using just four photos and a VIN, revolutionizing operations across new car sales, used car sales, service departments, and collision centers.
Built on real-world data from over 125,000 repairs, our AI technology achieves 95-97% accuracy in under 60 seconds. This unprecedented precision helps dealerships maximize profitability on trade-ins, streamline operations, enhance customer trust, and drive service revenue.
What sets us apart:

-Real-world training data from thousands of collision centers
-Independent, unbiased estimates that build customer trust
-Seamless web-based platform accessible on any device
-Integration across all dealership profit centers
-Instant assessment capability for every team member

Whether evaluating trade-ins, handling lease returns, processing service drive opportunities, or managing collision repairs, Estimatics provides dealerships with the tools they need to operate more efficiently and profitably in today's fast-paced automotive market.
Join the growing number of dealerships discovering how Estimatics' AI-powered damage assessment is transforming their business operations and customer experience.

Name: Vahan Sewak
Description:
At Vahan Sewak, we believe a vehicle breakdown shouldn't bring your life to a halt. The traditional roadside assistance industry is fragmented, slow, and lacks transparency, leaving drivers stressed and vulnerable. We are here to change that.

Vahan Sewak is a pioneering auto-tech platform building India's most reliable on-demand roadside assistance ecosystem. Our technology creates a seamless, three-sided marketplace that connects:

Vehicle Owners in distress with immediate, trusted help.

Skilled Mechanics & Garages with a steady stream of verified jobs to grow their business.

Local Parts Suppliers with a direct, efficient channel to the mechanics who need their inventory.

Our entire platform is built on three core promises to the customer:

Speed: A verified mechanic at your location in under 30 minutes.

Trust: Vetted experts and verifiable, evidence-based diagnostics.

Transparency: Upfront digital quotes, live tracking, and secure digital payments. No more haggling, no more hidden costs.

We are not just an app; we are a service dedicated to delivering peace of mind. By empowering local service economies and leveraging cutting-edge technology, we are making India's roads more reliable.

Join us as we build the future of automotive services and ensure that for everyone, Zindagi Rukni Nahi Chahiye (Life Shouldn't Stop).

Specialties:
Roadside Assistance, Automotive Technology (Auto-Tech), On-Demand Services, Platform Economy, Mobile Applications, Logistics, and Electric Vehicle (EV) Support.

Description:
Da wir glauben, dass wir am besten performen, wenn wir  uns am wohlsten fühlen, ist die Zielsetzung unseres gesamten Teams und Partner nach höchsten Qualitätsansprüchen in Technik, Design und Individualität zu denken und  in absoluter Perfektion für unsere Kunden umzusetzen. 

Unseren STANCE – Kunden bieten wir ausschließlich hochwertige AirRide – Systeme der Marke PRAZIS – Air – Suspension an, für die wir unsere eigenen TÜV Gutachten erstellen haben. KW Automotive bietet im Bereich Street – und Track – Performance allen unseren STATIC Kunden die beste Basis, um alle modernen Fahrzeuge von BMW bis Porsche zu performen. Der maximale Kundenvorteil liegt hierbei in unseren spezifisch auf den Wunsch des Kunden angepassten STANCE & TRACK PACKS. 

Ein weiterer Kundennutzen besteht in einem deutschlandweiten Netzwerk an qualifizierten Einbaupartnern, um für unsere Kunden kurze Wege zu realisieren und dadurch bares Geld in Zeiten der Energiewende zu sparen und den CO² Footprint zu verringern. Die StanekWorxX Kernkompetenz liegt allerdings nicht in dem einzelnen Produkt, sondern in der gesamtheitlichen Lösung. 

Gemäß unserem Motto:“Laufe nicht in den Fußspuren anderer, sondern hinterlasse deine eigenen….“ bieten wir unseren Kunden ausschließlich hochwertige Schmiede – und Flow Formed Räder der Marke BBS und CONCAVER für alle gängigen Verbrenner und Elektrofahrzeuge an. Für Einsteiger bieten unsere JR Wheels ein breites Band an Felgen mit TÜV Zulassung, die ideale Lösung zwischen Preis und Performance.

Letztlich ist die  StanekWorxX Automotive GmbH seit Ihrem Gründungsjahr am Nürburgring stets im Motorsport aktiv gewesen und sammelt noch heute die Erfahrungen im Motorsport rund um den Nürburgring. Wir glauben nach wie vor, dass die Rennstrecke die richtige Umgebung für Leistung und Performance darstellt. Unsere Mitarbeiter haben wir stets nach diesen Kriterien ausgewählt.

Description:

Car Solutions Swiss bietet u.a. folgende Leistungen nachhaltig aus einer Hand:
- Integration in den Geschäftsablauf.
- Weltweites Netzwerk an Infrastruktur, Projektleitern und qualifizierten Fahrzeugtechnikern.

Name: XTIRE
Description:
A XTIRE é uma empresa brasileira, presente em mais de 20 países, que há mais de 20 anos, produz, distribui e comercializa selantes de pneus que protegem contra furos e perda natural de pressão de ar.

O selante de pneu Xtire aumenta a vida útil dos pneus; reduz o consumo de combustível e emissão de CO2; evita o sucateamento precoce da carcaça; e elimina muitos transtornos, riscos e prejuízos.

A vedação do furo ocorre de dentro para fora, instantaneamente, sem a necessidade de reparo posterior.

O produto já foi testado e homologado por grandes empresas nacionais e multinacionais de diversos segmentos e está alinhada com os conceitos ESG como proteção de recursos naturais, redução da emissão de gases de efeito estufa, gestão eficiente de matéria-prima e gestão sustentável de resíduos.

O produto, à base de água, é biodegradável, atóxico, não inflamável e possui antioxidantes que protegem as partes metálicas dos pneus e rodas. É o único selante do mercado LIVRE de MonoEtilenoGlicol em sua fórmula, que é altamente corrosivo à borracha e às partes metálicas dos pneus e rodas, e compromete o processo de recapagem.

Pode ser aplicado em todos os tipos de pneus, com e sem câmara de ar, de veículos e equipamentos usados na agricultura, transporte, construção civil, mineração, terraplanagem, indústria, forças de segurança e por consumidores nos seus automóveis, motocicletas e bicicletas.

A Xtire possui produtos para todos os tipos de veículos e diferentes níveis de proteção:

Xtire Linha Pesada:
• Frota Max - caminhões, ônibus, tratores, implementos agrícolas e veículos industriais
• Agroforte - exclusivo para pneus que utilizam lastro d'água, muito usado no setor agrícola
• Heavy Duty & Mining - tratores com alta incidência de furos e de grandes dimensões, principalmente dos setores de mineração, terraplanagem e construção civil

Xtire Linha Leve:
• Auto Passeio, SUV & Pick-up, Moto, Bike e Speed & Gravel

Xtire Linha Militar:
• Defense: veículos leves, pesados e táticos

Bij Keys Customs hechten we veel waarde aan klanttevredenheid. We geloven in open communicatie en transparantie. Den Grundstein für das Garagengewerbe in Erlach haben Monique und Werner Marolf im Jahre 1945 gelegt. Damals hat das Ehepaar die erste Garage im Städtchen gegründet. Wir sind stolz, heute noch ein Teil davon zu sein und die Dienstleistungen rund um die vier Räder weiterzuführen.
Seither ist viel geschehen – es wurden Standorte geändert, Verträge mit Automobilimporteuren abgeschlossen und neue Räumlichkeiten gebaut. 
Erfahren Sie mehr über Uns auf unserer Website!
------------------------------------------------------------------------
Depuis 1945, nous sommes votre VW et Audi partenaire pour tout ce qui concerne la mobilité dans le Seeland bernois - nous nous réjouissons de vous accueillir !

Monique et Werner Marolf ont posé la première pierre de l'industrie du garage à Erlach en 1945. À l'époque, le couple a fondé le premier garage de la petite ville. Nous sommes fiers d'en faire encore partie aujourd'hui et de poursuivre les prestations de services autour des quatre roues.
Depuis, il s'est passé beaucoup de choses : des changements d'emplacement, des contrats avec des importateurs automobiles et la construction de nouveaux locaux.

Arbetet vi levererar är inte slumpmässigt eller något som vi hastar igenom, utan vi ser hela processen som ett hantverk.

Det finns idag många bilvårdsföretag som är mer eller mindre kvalitetsinriktade. Vi kombinerar skicklighet, kunskap och erfarenhet för att kunna leverera bästa resultat.

Vi finns sedan 2010 i Ystad och är en Gyeon certifierad anläggning.

Name: KT Motors Private Limited
Description:
KT Motors is a one-stop integrated smart connected workshop solution in Sankari, Tamil Nadu. KT Motors is an initiative of KT Telematic Solutions, a leading fleet management solutions provider in Tamil Nadu, India.

With BS4 and BS6 norms, vehicle complexity is increasing and customer expectations regarding the service of their vehicles are growing continuously. Workshops wanting to position themselves optimally for the future must prepare today and align their processes with the challenges. Through the combination of innovative connected diagnostic hardware and software, as well as workshop services, KT Motors helps workshops to remain competitive and optimize the workflows for all of their processes. Ultimately it will boost workshop efficiency which in return reduces the cost of fleet ownership to fleet operators

Overview of the integrated smart workshop solution includes:
- Capture the right data. 
- Process data faster. 
- Present in real-time in an understandable format (eg: graphs and diagrams). 
- So that fleet operators can make conscious decisions faster.

By tracking all workshop activities in real time, we make sure that (i) Work Compliance (ii) Work Quality and (iii) Work Consistency, can be achieved.

-Located in Glendale, AZ
Serving the entire Phoenix metro area and beyond, Barajas Customs delivers award-winning automotive customization with unmatched attention to detail. Whether you're building a show car, daily driver, or full-on street machine, we bring the skill and vision to make it happen.

-Automotive Repairs: From small fixes to complete engine overhauls and advanced electronic diagnostics.
-Diesel Truck Repairs: Specialized service for diesel engines and heavy-duty trucks to ensure peak performance.

Our commitment to service sets us apart. Whether it’s a quick tune-up or a major overhaul, you’ll receive reliable, personalized service every step of the way.

As a small-town business, we take pride in building lasting relationships with our customers. At Oxbow Tire, we’re not just fixing vehicles—we’re helping the people and businesses that keep Oxbow thriving.

Ons toegewijde team van professionals staat altijd klaar om je te helpen bij het kiezen van de juiste auto en het beantwoorden van al je vragen. We streven ernaar om elke klant een persoonlijke en vriendelijke service te bieden, zodat je met een glimlach de weg op kunt gaan.

Name: CROSSAUDIO
Description:
Crossaudio: Tu Socio en Equipamiento de Audio y Entretenimiento para Vehículos

Bienvenido a Crossaudio! Somos tu socio confiable en el mundo del equipamiento de audio y entretenimiento para vehículos. En un mercado en constante evolución, nos enorgullece destacar como líderes en la industria, brindando soluciones excepcionales a empresas y flotas de todo el mundo. Este es nuestro perfil de LinkedIn, donde compartiremos nuestro compromiso con la innovación, la calidad y el servicio excepcional que ofrecemos a nuestros clientes.

Nuestra Historia y Valores

Desde nuestros humildes comienzos hasta convertirnos en un referente global, nuestra historia está marcada por la pasión por la excelencia. Fundada en 2004, Crossaudio ha crecido y se ha adaptado a las cambiantes demandas del mercado de equipamiento para vehículos. Nuestros valores fundamentales, como la integridad, la innovación y la satisfacción del cliente, nos han guiado en cada paso del camino.

Nuestra Gama de Productos y Servicios

En Crossaudio, entendemos que cada vehículo es único y cada cliente tiene necesidades específicas. Es por eso que ofrecemos una amplia gama de productos y servicios diseñados para satisfacer tus requisitos exactos. Desde sistemas de audio de alta fidelidad hasta soluciones de navegación de vanguardia y comunicación manos libres, tenemos todo lo que necesitas para mejorar la experiencia en carretera.
Nuestra Experiencia en el Sector

A lo largo de los años, hemos tenido el privilegio de trabajar con una amplia gama de clientes, desde pequeñas empresas locales hasta grandes flotas a nivel internacional. Nuestra experiencia en el sector nos ha permitido comprender los desafíos únicos que enfrentan las empresas y flotas en la gestión de sus vehículos.

Compromiso con la Innovación

En Crossaudio, estamos comprometidos con la innovación constante, buscando las últimas tendencias y tecnologías para asegurarnos de que nuestros clientes siempre estén un paso adelante en la carretera.

Name: Vulkal d.o.o.
Description:
Vulkal d.o.o. je dugi niz godina vodeća tvrtka u Republici Hrvatskoj za distribuciju pneumatika i naplataka za osobna, kombi i laka teretna vozila, terenska i SUV vozila, autobuse i teretna vozila, građevinsku i poljoprivrednu mehanizaciju, specijalna i vojna vozila, razne vrste dizalica, kao i pneumatika za bicikle, motore, skutere. Ovlašteni smo uvoznici i distributeri poznatih svjetskih proizvođača guma: Goodyear, Dunlop, Fulda, Sava, Michelin, Kleber, BF Goodrich, Taurus, Bridgestone, Firestone, Pirelli, Nokian, TOYO, Hankook i dr. te aluminijskih naplataka MAK, kao i čeličnih naplataka MW za putnička i teretna vozila.
Bavimo se i opremanjem vulkanizerskih radionica Butler strojevima, te alatima i priborom iz asortimana Schrader, Tip Top Stahlgruber, Tech, Wegmann automotive, uz stalnu tehničku podršku.
Tvrtka broji gotovo 300 zaposlenika te ima vlastiti, dostavni vozni park sa 48 voznih jedinica za svakodnevnu distribuciju robe kupcima na cijelom području Republike Hrvatske. 
Raspolažemo s devet prodajno-servisnih centara koji se nalaze u Zagrebu, Velikoj Gorici, Rijeci, Zadru, Stankovcima i Osijeku s dnevnim kapacitetom od oko 1600 putničkih i dostavnih vozila te 50 teretnih vozila i autobusa.
Svi servisi su opremljeni suvremenom opremom za montažu i balansiranje, te za geometriju kotača na kojima radi stručno osposobljeni tim automehaničara i vulkanizera.
Svi Centri su certificirani za montažu guma: RFT (Run Flat Tires), BSR (Bridgestone Support Ring) i PAX (Michelin run on flat tehnologija).
Nakon izmjene vansezonskih guma iste se mogu pohraniti u našem „hotelu za gume“ do iduće montaže. Usluga je dostupna u svim poslovnicama.
Osnovni je cilj tvrtke Vulkal opravdati povjerenje kupca individualnim i profesionalnim pristupom, širokim asortimanom pneumatika, pristupačnom cijenom i kvalitetom usluge.
Da naše usluge udovoljavaju visokim standardima branše potvrđuje i činjenica da svih devet Vulkalovih centara nose Michelin certifikat – standard kvalitete.

Name: The Automotive Community
Description:
Voor wie is The Automotive Community?

The Automotive Community is ontwikkeld voor professionals en bedrijven die actief zijn in, en toegevoegde waarde leveren aan, de autoschadeherstelbranche.

De community richt zich op drie duidelijke doelgroepen:

- Schadeherstellers die willen professionaliseren, verbeteren en vooruitkijken
- Dienstverleners die hun expertise inzetten om schadeherstelbedrijven te ondersteunen
- Toeleveranciers die fysieke producten leveren en hun oplossingen inhoudelijk willen toelichten

Iedere doelgroep heeft een eigen rol, eigen dynamiek en een eigen abonnement. Dat zorgt voor focus, relevantie en kwaliteit.

Waarom The Automotive Community?

- Omdat de branche gebaat is bij samenwerking in plaats van eilandjes
- Omdat kennis delen leidt tot betere beslissingen en betere prestaties
- Omdat zichtbaarheid pas waardevol is als deze relevant en inhoudelijk is
- Omdat kwaliteit boven kwantiteit gaat

The Automotive Community is geen social platform.
Het is een professionele vak community, gebouwd door en voor de autoschadeherstelbranche.

Sluit u aan!!

Of u nu schadehersteller bent, dienstverlener of toeleverancier. 
Als u gelooft in inhoud, samenwerking en vooruitgang, dan hoort u hier.

Name: WashApp
Description:
The basic principle is to reverse the traditional practice where the vehicle goes to the carwash, with a service where the carwash comes to the vehicule.
WashApp respects the ecological standards and offers a practical solution to limit the excessive use of water, electricity, as well as the dispersion of chemical-based detergents and hydrocarbons in the soil.
**The effectiveness is meant to be environmentally friendly !**
To be responsible in the face of the water scarcity and stress that Tunisia is experiencing today. To participate in the fight against pollution, water waste and global warming.
The ecological method of cleaning vehicles is done using biodegradable products, without solvents, using steam and recyclable microfibres cloths.
These products are based on polymer compounds and consist of detergents, lubricants, and polishing agents, providing a 3-in-1 action:  cleaning, polishing and protecting the vehicle while using minimal amounts of water. These products clean all surfaces of the vehicle, including windows, bodywork, plastic, rims, chrome, and tires.
By opting for a global approach, we hope and strive to make your experience with us more environmental friendly, while maintaining our uncompromising attitude towards cleanliness.

Name: LeadFoot Automotive Podcast
Description:
Consider LeadFoot the R&D department you've always needed but never thought you could afford. Founded by two shop operators with nearly three decades of combined digital experience, including time at Google, you've never heard an automotive podcast like this. 

Joe and Alex met nearly a decade ago and have spent their time together digitizing Gateway Auto, Joe's family's shop in Omaha, Nebraska. Today Gateway Auto is a multi-shop operation but it didn't start that way. 

Joe, a former Googler and tech leader, hired Alex, a digital native and gearhead while he was traveling the world advocating for a safer internet and better privacy standards. Alex's job was simple back then: help Gateway improve their marketing website, get on Google and do some of the basics needed to market the business. Challenge accepted. Mission complete.

Not long after, Alex identified a list of ways Gateway could do better and the two worked to bring these ideas into the shop. Together, they used their digital know-how to help Gateway Auto transform from a paper-and-pencil single shop operation to a mid-sized multi-shop operation that provides good jobs and community impact while balancing profit and innovation. 

Joe and Alex's experience includes:
- Building and maintaining a robust digital presence for Gateway Auto, Joe's family business
- Development of custom internal automations and intranet to manage operations across the company at a fraction of the cost 
- Migrate the company to cloud-based services and educate the team on how to use tech
- Create and maintain a cybersecurity program
- Monitor the technology landscape to ensure the company is always at the cutting edge, innovating new ways to operate a shop in the automotive industry

Their hard work resulted in Gateway growing more than 5x in revenues. LeadFoot Automotive is here to help shop owners and operators learn the things they've used to drive success and keep ahead of industry innovations. Buckle up!

Name: MMPower Garage
Description: Yillardir araçlara ilgili bir birey olma fikrinden çikip kendi araçlarimi hazirlamaya karar verdigimde yil 1998 idi. Bu takvim yilinin baslamasiyla birey olarak araç modifikasyonu adina projeler yapmaya basladik. 1998 – 2004 Yillari arasinda çok fazla marka ve model araç ile ilgilendik ve projelerini gerçeklestirdik. Modifiye adina yapilan, gördügüm çok fazla yanlis araç projelerinden dolayi kendi markami olusturma karari aldik. Tarihler 2004’ ü gösterdiginde ise markalasmanin profesyonellik ve kurumsallik adina şirketimize ve ülkemize verim katabilecegi düsüncesi ile MMPower markasini kurduk. Markanin tescil ve patentini almamızla birlikte 2004 yilindan itibaren yapmis oldugum projelerimi MMPower markasi ile tamamladik. MMPower markasina ilk olarak Kayseri Hürriyet Mahallesinde açmis oldugumuz 70m2 kapali alani olan yerimizde basladik ve 2008 yilina kadar ayni adresimizde devam ettik. 2008 yilinda Kayseri Yeni Sanayide 125m2 yeni yerimize geçtik ve yeni projelerimizi bu adreste hazirlamaya basladik. 2015 yilina kadar iki farkli adreste dünyaca da kabullenen ve çok genis formlarda yer alan projelere imza attik. Bu linkteki projeler bölümü ile yapmis oldugumuz tüm projenin baslangiçtan itibaren bitmis oldugumuz ana kadar tüm fotograflarini yayinladik. Bu sayede dünya çapinda takip edilebilir bir Garage haline gelditirdik. 2015 yilinda ise Kayseri Tunca Caddesinde 300m2 kapali 600m2 açik alani olan yeni showroom'umuza geçtik. Burada Garage-Showroom olusumu saglamak adina görselligi ile dünya standartlarinda bir alan olusturduk. Bu Garage’ imda bitirmis oldugumuz projelerimizi sergiliyor ve yeni projelerimizi yapiyoruz.

Name: D3 Services Group
Description:
At D3, we’re setting new standards in vehicle repairs and alloy wheel refurbishment, blending technical expertise with sustainability to help our customers and businesses meet their goals.

Based in Bedford, we offer comprehensive services tailored to individual vehicle owners, fleets, and businesses across the UK.

Our Services
 Insurance-Approved Accident Repair Centre
Trusted by insurers, our Bedford repair centre specialises in everything from cosmetic damage to major collision repairs. Our skilled technicians use manufacturer-approved techniques to restore vehicles to the highest standard, ensuring safety and quality.

 EV & Hybrid Specialist Repairs
As electric and hybrid vehicles grow in popularity, we’re ahead of the curve. Our team is fully trained to repair and maintain EVs and hybrids, equipped with the knowledge and tools to handle advanced systems safely and efficiently.

 Alloy Wheel Refurbishment & Powder Coating
Our Bedford-based facility provides expert alloy wheel refurbishment, including premium powder coating for a flawless, durable finish. Whether it’s minor scuffs or a complete colour change, we ensure wheels are restored to their best.

UK-Wide Mobile Paintless Dent Removal (PDR)
Our mobile PDR service offers a convenient and eco-friendly solution for repairing dents, including hail damage, across the UK.

Why PDR?

Environmentally Friendly: No paint, fillers, or waste, reducing your carbon footprint.
Cost-Effective: A more affordable alternative to traditional repairs.
Fast & Efficient: Minimal downtime for individuals and fleets.
Supports Sustainability Goals: Helps fleets align with Net Zero CO2 targets by lowering emissions linked to repair processes.

Fleet operators benefit from our PDR service, which ensures repairs are fast, sustainable, and cost-effective—helping businesses meet government mandates on carbon neutrality while keeping vehicles on the road.

Däckverket is a Swedish ownership group of independently run tyre service workshops.

We bring together well-managed, profitable workshops with strong local leadership and long-standing customer relationships. Each business continues to operate under its own management, close to customers, employees and everyday decisions.

Däckverket is not a chain and not a franchise. We do not rebrand workshops or centralise day-to-day operations. Our role is to support the people who already know their business best.

The group focuses primarily on private customers and recurring demand, particularly through tyre hotel services. In parallel, several of our workshops serve heavy vehicles, construction and agricultural customers, where reliability and operational competence are critical.

Our central organisation is deliberately small. It exists to support the workshops in areas where shared structure adds value over time, such as operational improvement initiatives, process development, digital tools and structured knowledge-sharing between owners and managers.

An important part of our model is long-term alignment. Sellers are offered the opportunity to reinvest, and employees can participate through a co-investment programme. We believe that shared ownership creates continuity, responsibility and better decisions over time.

Däckverket’s primary focus is the Swedish market, where we see significant remaining potential. At the same time, the way the group is being built naturally attracts interest beyond Sweden.

We believe that durable value in service businesses is created from the inside out, through professionalism, curiosity and respect for the people who run the operations every day..
