Od 2009 roku świadczymy specjalistyczne usługi serwisowe dla flot pojazdów ciężarowych, autobusów miejskich i turystycznych oraz pojazdów użytkowych.

W listopadzie 2023 firma Erem Serwis jako pierwszy w Polsce Partner Serwisowy MAN Truck & Bus uzyskała autoryzację na serwis i naprawy elektrycznych autobusów miejskich MAN – od tego momentu ten kierunek dynamicznie rozwija się w naszym serwisie.

Jesteśmy autoryzowanym serwisem MAN i WIELTON, ale naprawiamy wszystkie marki pojazdów ciężarowych, naczep i autobusów.

Nasza oferta nie sprowadza się jedynie do serwisu i rutynowych napraw.
Specjalizujemy się również w pełnej obsłudze szkód powypadkowych dla firm transportowych jadących tranzytem przez Polskę.

Jeśli Twój pojazd ulegnie kolizji lub wypadkowi na terenie Polski, a jesteś poszkodowanym – wystarczy, że podpiszesz upoważnienie.
My zajmiemy się wszystkim:
• holowanie pojazdu z miejsca zdarzenia,
• zgłoszenie szkody do ubezpieczyciela sprawcy,
• przygotowanie dokumentacji (zdjęcia, opisy, oględziny),
• profesjonalne kalkulacje napraw w systemach AUDATEX i DAT,
• pełny zakres napraw: mechanika, blacharka, lakiernictwo,
• rozliczenie bezgotówkowe – nie angażujesz własnych środków.
Dlaczego warto z nami współpracować?
• Ponad 15 lat doświadczenia w obsłudze firm transportowych w całej UE.
• Szybka reakcja – minimalizujemy czas przestoju Twojego pojazdu.
• Kompleksowa pomoc – od miejsca wypadku po wydanie gotowego pojazdu.
• Obsługa w językach obcych – bariery językowe nie są problemem.

Erem Serwis – doświadczenie i pewność, że nie zostaniesz sam po wypadku.

Name: Sun Automotive
Description:
Sun Automotive is a family-owned, independent automotive repair company serving the Eugene–Springfield community since 1977. With four locations, we’ve built our reputation by doing the work right, treating people well, and standing behind every repair.

We operate with high standards, strong standardized systems, and a people-first mindset. Our focus is on accurate diagnostics, quality workmanship, and clear communication — not shortcuts or volume at the expense of integrity.

Our leadership is deeply rooted in the trade. With decades of hands-on experience across the automotive industry, we understand the importance of every role on the team and are committed to creating an environment where technicians and staff feel supported, respected, and set up to succeed.

At Sun Automotive, we believe:
— Integrity guides every decision we make
— Quality and accountability matter
— People come before numbers - always

That commitment extends to both our employees and the customers who trust us with their vehicles. We’re proud to be a long-standing part of the communities we serve and to provide a workplace where careers are built, not just jobs filled.

Description:
Unser oberstes Ziel: Sicherheit und Zufriedenheit unserer Kunden!

Sachverständige sowie Prüfingenieure, deckt an vier Standorten die komplette Palette der amtlichen und nichtamtlichen Sachverständigen-Dienstleistungen ab. Dazu gehören auch digitale Online-Angebote, ein Internet-Schadenportal zur Schadenabwicklung, Video-Kostenvoranschlag oder Schaden-Web-App. 

Wir sind Ihr kompetenter Full-Service-Partner für ganz Niederbayern: 
Kfz-Sachverständigenbüro, GTÜ-Prüfstellen Tiefenbach/Passau, Deggendorf und Plattling, ADAC Vertragssachverständiger, Oldtimer-Gutachten, Classic Data Partner, Gutachten über Unfall- Motor- und Aggregateschäden, Schäden an Fahrzeuglackierungen, Zweirädern, Fahrrädern, E-Bikes, Nutzfahrzeugen, Land- und Baumaschinen, Hybrid- und Elektrofahrzeugen, Verkehrsunfallrekonstruktion.
Neue, innovative Dienstleistungen für Kfz-Betriebe. Schadenmanagement im Autohaus. Fortbildung von Sachverständigen, Kfz-Betrieben, Fuhrparks, Juristen...

Name: SRC AUTOMOCIÓN
Description:
En 2008, SRC AUTOMOCION abre sus puertas en Burguillos, puerta de la sierra norte de Sevilla, siendo el primer servicio oficial Multimarca de la zona.

Desde aquel entonces nuestro objetivo principal es brindar la mejor atención y el mejor servicio a nuestros clientes, porque creemos que en ellos se encuentra el foco de nuestra superación constante.

Sabemos que su satisfacción es la que nos permite crecer y desarrollarnos, es por ello que la dedicación puesta día a día en nuestro trabajo junto a nuestras instalaciones y equipamiento de última generación nos ha posicionado como una empresa innovadora en el sector de talleres reparadores de automóviles, prestando así un servicio integral a nuestros clientes.

Como servicio oficial Multimarca, ofrecemos los más altos niveles de calidad en nuestras reparaciones y atención al cliente:

Nuestro personal está formado por profesionales con más de 15 años de experiencia, especializados en cada sector, que toman parte en constantes programas de formación y reciclaje.
Contamos con acceso a la última información técnica proporcionada directamente del fabricante .
Damos un servicio integral en la reparación del automóvil, sin intermediarios, todo lo que Necesite su auto lo podrá encontrar en SRC AUTOMOCION
Realizamos el manteamiento de su vehículo según los estándares marcados por el fabricante otorgando una mayor calidad, seguridad y garantía en la reparación y gracias a ello un aumento en el valor de reventa de su automóvil.
Ofrecemos una gran variedad de servicios y ofertas, además de diferentes campañas estacionales.
Aportamos soluciones y atención personalizada.

Name: Usinart Retífica de Motores Ltda
Description:
Excelência Há Mais de 30 Anos

Usinart Retífica de Motores, um nome de confiança e referência em retífica de motores desde 1992. Com uma história rica e um compromisso inabalável com a qualidade, nossa empresa é a escolha ideal para aqueles que valorizam o desempenho e a durabilidade dos motores de seus veículos.

 Nossa Jornada:
Há mais de três décadas, temos nos dedicado a restaurar e aprimorar motores de todas as marcas e tamanhos. Nossa história é uma narrativa de compromisso com a excelência, confiabilidade e inovação.

 Tecnologia Avançada:
Na Usinart, investimos em tecnologia de ponta e equipamentos sofisticados. Isso nos permite realizar retíficas de motores de forma precisa, eficiente e com resultados excepcionais. Nosso compromisso com a inovação assegura que você obtenha o melhor desempenho possível do seu motor.

 Profissionais Capacitados:
Nossa equipe de especialistas é o nosso maior trunfo. Com anos de experiência, nossos profissionais capacitados são mestres na arte da retífica, garantindo que cada serviço seja executado com maestria.

 Qualidade Inigualável:
A qualidade é a espinha dorsal de tudo o que fazemos. Cada motor é tratado com o mais alto nível de cuidado e precisão, garantindo que os resultados superem as expectativas dos nossos clientes.

Venha conhecer a diferença que a Usinart pode fazer para o seu motor. Estamos prontos para atender às suas necessidades de retífica com a qualidade e excelência que você merece.

Basalt est le centre officiel et certifié RestorFX à Clermont-Ferrand, la référence dans la régénération de surface par VSP, le vernis sans peinture. Contrairement aux méthodes mécaniques abrasives comme le polissage, cette méthode de restauration permanente supprime 99% des rayures car elle augmente et régénère la couche de vernis, rehausse la profondeur et la couleur d’origine. Le résultat final est une surface traitée sans défaut et exempte de toute imperfection externe telle que de fines volutes ou des hologrammes. RestorFX, c’est comme remettre la peinture de votre voiture à l’état neuf.

Nous croyons en l’importance d’un travail bien fait où la satisfaction de nos clients est notre priorité. Vous pouvez avoir l’assurance que votre voiture sera traitée avec le plus grand respect, et nous sommes prêts à travailler avec vous en toute discrétion pour préserver votre confidentialité et celle de votre précieux véhicule. Notre local, sécurisé et équipé de technologies de pointe, assure une protection optimale.

Chez Basalt, nous ne considérons pas simplement votre véhicule comme un moyen de transport, mais comme une extension de votre personnalité. C’est pourquoi nous vous invitons à venir partager cette passion commune. Chaque échange est une opportunité pour nous aussi, d’en apprendre toujours plus.

Basalt s’est engagé à sélectionner seulement quelques partenaires, chacun se situant au plus haut niveau de son domaine et reflétant parfaitement notre vision de l'excellence automobile. C'est ainsi que nous avons fait le choix de collaborer avec la référence dans le domaine :  Colourlock, Covrgard, Fictech, Fortador, Graphtec, RestorFX, Wash&More.

Notre salon de beauté automobile est l'endroit idéal pour offrir à votre voiture un petit coup de pouce esthétique. Des soins de polissage aux traitements de revêtement, nous offrons une gamme complète de services pour redonner à votre véhicule son éclat d'origine et le protéger des éléments extérieurs. Et n'oublions pas notre boutique d'accessoires, où vous trouverez tout ce dont vous avez besoin pour personnaliser et améliorer votre voiture. Des parfums de voiture exquis aux gadgets high-tech, nous avons tout ce qu'il vous faut pour rendre chaque trajet plus agréable. Name: Mauhalub Lubrificantes e Peças
Description:
Há mais de 30 anos, na movimentada Avenida Barão de Mauá, em Mauá, surgiu um pequeno comércio de lubrificantes. Com apenas uma porta e um grande sonho, uma mulher guerreira e visionária deu início a uma jornada marcada pela determinação e pela busca incessante por excelência.

  Desde o início, a qualidade dos produtos e o atendimento personalizado foram os pilares do sucesso. Com muito empenho e dedicação, a loja conquistou a confiança dos primeiros clientes, que logo se tornaram fiéis. Ano após ano, o pequeno comércio foi crescendo, ampliando seu espaço e diversificando seus serviços.

  Hoje, o que começou como uma modesta loja de lubrificantes se transformou em 02 centros automotivos, oferecendo uma ampla gama de serviços automotivos. Nossos centros automotivos são conhecidos pela troca de óleo, filtros, manutenção de câmbio, alinhamento, balanceamento e muito mais. Com instalações modernas e uma equipe de profissionais altamente capacitados, continuamos a tradição de excelência iniciada há três décadas.

  Nossa história é um testemunho de dedicação e compromisso com nossos clientes. Cada conquista reflete o trabalho árduo e a visão inovadora da nossa fundadora, que sempre acreditou no potencial da equipe e na importância de cuidar bem de cada cliente.

  Orgulhamo-nos de nossa trajetória e agradecemos a todos que fazem parte dessa história. Continuamos firmes em nosso propósito de oferecer o melhor, sempre com responsabilidade social e respeito ao meio ambiente. Junte-se a nós e faça parte dessa família que, com muita garra e visão, segue crescendo e inovando a cada dia.

Name: Otoyer
Description:
Otoyer, araç sahipleri ile otomotiv sektöründe hizmet veren işletmeleri tek noktada buluşturan dijital bir otomotiv platformudur. Araç sahiplerinin ihtiyaç duyduğu hizmetlere hızlı, doğru ve kolay şekilde ulaşabilmesini amaçlar.

Otoyer üzerinden oto servis, yol yardım, çekici, lastikçi, oto elektrik ve elektronik, klima servisi, kaporta ve boya, boyasız göçük onarımı, oto cam, oto çilingir, ekspertiz ve test merkezleri gibi birçok hizmete araç bazlı ve konum bazlı arama seçenekleriyle erişilebilir. Bunun yanında motosiklet servisleri, ticari araç ve ağır vasıta servisleri, araç kiralama, filo kiralama, transfer ve şoförlü hizmetler de Otoyer’de yer alır.

Platform; araç bazlı arama, konum bazlı arama, hizmet bazlı filtreleme ve akıllı filtreleme özellikleriyle kullanıcıların ihtiyacına en uygun işletmeleri bulmasını kolaylaştırır. Çalışma saatleri, hizmet detayları ve iletişim bilgileri sayesinde işletmelerle doğrudan bağlantı kurulabilir.

Otoyer, otomotiv sektöründe faaliyet gösteren işletmeler için dijital görünürlük sağlamayı, araç sahipleri için ise doğru hizmete hızlı ulaşmayı hedefler. Güvenilir bilgi, şeffaf hizmet ve kolay erişim anlayışıyla otomotiv ekosistemini tek çatı altında bir araya getirir.

Name: Rustine Libre
Description:
Nous sommes des réparateurs et réparatrices. 

Que nous travaillions dans une association, une coopérative ou sous un statut d'artisan·e indépendant·e, nos pratiques sont celles de l'économie sociale et solidaire, que nous mettons en valeur dans notre charte :

    Votre satisfaction est notre priorité : Nous vous conseillons dans votre intérêt. Nous sommes transparent·es et prenons le temps de vous exposer les options possibles, pour que vous choisissiez ce qui vous convient le mieux.

    Fiabilité : nous aimons le travail bien fait. Si nous ne sommes pas compétent·es pour effectuer une réparation ou s'il y a un problème, nous vous le dirons. Nous sommes aussi à votre disposition pour vous conseiller sur l'entretien de votre vélo afin qu'il vous serve le plus longtemps possible.

    Écologie : lorsque cela est possible et avec votre accord, nous vous proposerons de réparer plutôt que de remplacer, d'utiliser des pièces d'occasion plutôt que neuves...

    Développer le territoire plutôt que l'uberiser : nous payons nos impôts en France, favorisons l'activité locale, nos activités étant par nature non délocalisables, défendons les emplois de qualité. Aucun excédent ne sert à rémunérer des actionnaires : ils visent à garantir une juste rémunération et la pérennité de l'activité.

    Entraide plutôt que compétition : au delà de notre présence sur la plateforme, nous formons une communauté de mécanicien·nes qui souhaite s'échanger formations, conseils et pièces. Nous cherchons aussi à accompagner les personnes voulant se lancer dans cette activité.

    Vers un monde plus cyclable : notre diversité et notre coopération va permettre de répondre aux attentes de chaque cycliste du territoire, des cyclistes que nous voulons de plus en plus nombreux.

    Démocratie : Rustine Libre est un Commun, un logiciel sous licence libre. Sa gestion et son développement sont décidés collectivement.

Le projet Rustine Libre est né en Hauts-de-France.

Preventive Maintenance

Our vehicle maintenance include instant oil changes, filter replacement, fluid exchange services, tire rotation, engine tune-ups, and wheel alignment. We also take care of safety and emissions inspections, replace windshield wiper blades, offer flat tire repair, and so much more…! We inspect for free your vehicle systems and discuss the best options for your budget and provide a written estimate before making any repairs. 

AUTO Signature Service
We provide Auto Mechanic Signature Service for free to inspect your car and preserve your vehicle investment. Our team of Professional ASE Certified Mechanics are ready to assist you. Signature Service isn’t an oil change. The Auto Mechanic Signature Service is a free service and a complete preventive maintenance to check, inspect, flush, fill and clean essential systems and components of your vehicle. Mechanics go over a visual checklist to diagnose potential problems and plan any upcoming manufacturer recommended maintenance. You’re welcomed to visit our service center and get an oil change that will be done quickly and professionally done.

Description:
Born and raised in Northern Louisiana, Calvin Finney Sr. grew up working as a plantation hand. He grew up working various jobs making $2.50 a day working 12-13 hours a day. Throughout high school Calvin Finney Sr. tinkered with his first 1971 Volkswagen Super Beetle. This fascination with automobiles, led to a life-long affinity and love for European Automobiles especially. Calvin went to Southern University and Louisiana State and studied Criminal Justice while playing college football. From College, Calvin went on to become a New Orleans Police Officer working the world famous Bourbon St. While being a patrolman in the Big Easy was a good time, Calvin wanted to pursue his true passion: European Cars. Calvin went on to working for Mercedes Benz after leaving the NOPD. He worked for Mercedes for 25 years walking in as an apprentice and leaving as a Master Technician. From there, Calvin Finney Sr. started Finney's. 



Finney's is the end result of a lifetime love for European Cars. 



Love is what makes the difference.

Trust your in good hands with the man from the Louisiana Heartland.

Name: Collision Pros
Description:
At Collision Pros we have developed our own 7 step Quality Control Process that allows us to confidently deliver every car knowing its right and on time. To prove that, we give every customer a lifetime guarantee. After each of these 7 steps someone reviews and signs off for accuracy.

Step 1: The vehicle is checked in, disassembled and all damage is thoroughly assessed.
Step 2: The parts are all ordered and received matching each part to the original part to assess the accuracy.
Step 3: Any repair work that may need to be done is performed.
Step 4: The vehicle is prepped and painted.
Step 5: The vehicle is completely reassembled.
Step 6: The car is washed.
Step 7: Someone reviews all the work line by line and makes sure all of the work done meets our rigorous standards.

Young, Dynamic and Represented Worldwide

The company has was founded by Arthur Vogel and Nathanael Alain in 2010 and has been rapidly growing since.

Arthur Vogel is an expert of the technology of paintless dent repair. He ensures a high quality standard of repairs and process procedures in the production sector, organises the workshops on site and coordinates furthermore the service network of dent specialists throughout Europe.

Nathanael Alain has been working as an engineer in the automotive industry for years and is familiar with project managing and leadership. He is responsible for the administrative procedures and the contact to customers and partners all throughout Europe and the USA.

About 250 hail repair experts are currently taking care of the rapid, unblemished and cost-effective hail repair of diverse vehicles within our worldwide service network. Each of our employees is highly qualified and at work with much passion for technique and vehicle. They have a well-founded expertise in the area of hail repair – especially of Paintless Dent Repair (PDR) – and consider customer satisfaction as the first priority.

We strive to guarantee the highest customer satisfaction from the start. We achieve this through our innovation, highest quality, faster procedures and digitalisation. The satisfaction of the customer/ policyholder always remains our main focus.

Work smarter, earn better.
Join PDR-Team USA
At PDR-Team, we value expertise, innovation and quality. We are looking for experienced technicians for whom independence, efficiency and customer satisfaction are important. With us, you benefit from advanced tools, well-established processes, fast payment and a strong network.

Description:
Avec une expérience de plus de 30 ans dans l'industrie automobile, nous offrons une alternative aux véhicules diesel ou essence en Crit'Air 2, 3, 4 et 5  destinés à la casse de passer en Crit'Air 1 grâce à une conversion hybride énergie gaz GPL ou GNV, c'est le Retrogaz . 

Nous rendons le véhicule hybride au gaz GPL, en ajoutant un deuxième réservoir à la voiture et un deuxième jeu d’injecteurs et calculateur pour que le moteur d’origine fonctionne également au gaz.
Cette adaptation s’appelle le Retrogaz et tout véhicule converti au gaz GPL ou GNV obtient une vignette Crit'Air 1; quelle que soit la date de fabrication.

Name: MAN garage De Laak Geel
Description:
Garage DE LAAK NV is een familiaal bedrijf, gespecialiseerd in het onderhoud van MAN vrachtwagens.

In 1966 opgestart als werkplaats voor herstellingen van personenwagens en vrachtwagens. De garage was destijds ondergebracht in een loods van de familieboerderij te Veerle.
De zaak groeide gestadig en in 1972 werd een overeenkomst gesloten als officieel dealer van MAN vrachtwagens voor de Kempen.
Al snel werd de werkplaats te klein en viel de keuze op een bouwterrein naast de Laak (vandaar de huidige naam), eveneens in Veerle. Hier werd een volledig nieuwe garage gebouwd.
Het dealerschap werd uitgebreid naar 3 merken van vrachtwagens, die door dezelfde importeur in België verdeeld werden: MAN – Saviem – Steyr

In 1992 hebben de vier kinderen het bedrijf overgenomen en is men op zoek gegaan naar een nieuw bedrijfsterrein om de huidige zaak verder te kunnen uitbouwen. Dit terrein werd gevonden aan de Bell Telephonelaan 7 te Geel.

Op 1 april 1996 werd daar de nieuwe Garage DE LAAK officieel in gebruik genomen. Deze nieuwe locatie en het merk MAN zorgden voor snelle groei en dit resulteerde reeds na 4 jaar dat de garage werd uitgebreid met 2 extra poorten.Tegelijkertijd werd er een volledige nieuwbouw gezet waarin de carrosserie afdeling is ondergebracht.In 2001 werd nogmaals een werkplaats met 2 poorten toegevoegd, specifiek voor het onderhoud van aanhangwagens en opleggers.

Description:
Das Ing.-Sachverständigen-Büro Teetzmann & Partner zählt zu den etablierten, freien und unabhängigen Sachverständigenbüros im Rhein-Sieg-Kreis und arbeitet für private Auftraggeber, Versicherungen und Werkstätten.

Wir bieten allen Kraftfahrzeugfahrern und Kunden ein weites Spektrum an Dienstleistungen rund um das Kraftfahrzeug.

Wir sind ein Team unabhängiger KFZ-Sachverständiger, welches eine fast 40 Jahre erfolgreiche Unternehmensgeschichte aufweist. Bei allen Fragen rund um PKW, LKW, Zweiräder oder Wohnmobil greifen wir auf unser weitreichendes Know-How und begleiten Sie freundlich und kompetent.

Wann sollte ich einen KFZ-Sachverständigen einschalten?

Nach einem Unfall

Ist Ihr Fahrzeug in einen Unfall verwickelt worden, haben Sie das Recht einen unabhängigen KFZ-Sachverständigen einzuschalten. Hierbei muss der Reparaturschaden an Ihrem Fahrzeug mehr als 750 - 1000€ betragen. Wir erstellen ein vollständiges, neutrales und versicherungsunabhängiges Gutachten. Mit diesem können Sie Ihren Schaden entweder reparieren lassen oder Sie können auf Gutachtenbasis mit der gegnerischen Versicherung abrechnen.
Eines der großen Vorteile uns einzuschalten ist, dass nur KFZ-Sachverständige/Gutachter gewisse Fahrzeugwerte berechnen und angeben können. Diese liefern mehr Sicherheit und Transparenz bei der Schadenabwicklung, welche zum Beispiel ein Kostenvoranschlag nicht erbringen kann. Weiterführende Informationen
Zu Ihrer Beruhigung: Die Kosten für das Gutachten rechnen wir direkt mit der regulierenden Versicherung ab, wenn die Schuldfrage geklärt ist.

Fahrzeug- / Oldtimerbewertung

Wollen Sie ihr Fahrzeug/Motorrad oder auch einen LKW schätzen lassen? Wir ermitteln den Markt-, Einkaufs-, Verkaufs- oder Wiederherstellungswert. Sie erhalten eine Bewertung mit Fotos.

Name: Rescar Srl
Description:
Rescar Srl è una azienda storica nel mercato degli allestimenti e ristrutturazioni su veicoli commerciali e industriali.

Fondata nel 1965 dal padre dell’attuale amministratore, si è specializzata nella realizzazione di varie tipologie di prodotto come: camion con centina fissa o sollevabile, con cassone fisso o ribaltabile, casse scarrabili, furgoni in alluminio, autonegozi, regie mobili, progetti speciali per soddisfare le varie esigenze dei clienti. Ad oggi l’azienda impiega circa 30 persone, suddivise tra ufficio tecnico con progettazione 3d e ufficio collaudi, amministrazione e ufficio commerciale, ufficio acquisti, magazzino, officina progetti speciali, officina camion da trasporto, officina riparazione e forni verniciatura. Opera su un’area totale di 20.000 mq di cui 10.000 coperti ed è, oggi, un polo produttivo di importanza strategica non solo per il Valdarno, dove sorge la sede, ma anche per il mercato di settore nazionale ed internazionale.

La produzione degli allestimenti è fatta in base alle richieste dei clienti, in termini di misure di  ingombro, tipologia di allestimento, accessori vari a corredo. L’ufficio progettazione definisce il progetto 3d nel suo insieme verificandone anche la struttura e disponendo i disegni per l’officina. L’officina, partendo dalle materie prime, realizza interamente la struttura che verrà poi verniciata e corredata degli opportuni impianti elettrici e idraulici. Il camion una volta finito viene collaudato internamente con la motorizzazione civile e quindi consegnato al cliente.

Ogni realizzazione è progettata, sviluppata e costruita secondo i più elevati standard di qualità e da un personale altamente qualificato, che vanta una formazione professionale continua e specializzata.

Description:
We are a third generation family company, a Münster-Nienberge-based bodywork and paintwork specialist. 
Our family tradition and passion for car repairs, bodywork and paintwork stretches right back to the 1950s. One of the positive aspects of this history is the team we have been able to build, who are always there for us and our customers.
High quality in all areas is important to us, we work with brand name manufacturers for our paints and only fit original parts.

OUR SERVICES:
-	Accident repairs
-	Coachbuilding
-	Straightening work
-	Paintwork
-	Driver assistance systems
-	Glass repair/replacement 
-	Panel beating
-	Complete classic car restoration
-	Customer care (e.g. help with claims reporting, help recover your vehicle, organise delivery of the vehicle, offer a collection and return service, and facilitate replacement vehicle rental)

OUR PHILOSOPHY:
For generations, values have been lived and passed on in our family and thus also in our family business. It is not only the fascination for technology, mechanics and electronics that makes up our profession. And for us, it is above all the human factor. For us the person is at the center of everything, whether it is a customer or one of the team. Therefore, honest, open and transparent communication is a basic principle of our actions.
Another value that sets us apart is sustainability.
Just throw everything away and replace it with new parts? That has never been our company philosophy. 
In our workshop, we therefore increasingly rely on the use of recycled materials, for example, also for seat covers. In our daily work, we make use of environmentally friendly and resource-saving materials as far as possible and also pay attention to economical consumption when using these materials.

Name: Garage Botti Snc
Description:
La Botti snc inizia la sua attività nel 1961 con Virginio Botti, specializzandosi nei settori della riparazione di auto e moto e della vendita di autovetture. Inizialmente l’attività è svolta presso lo show-room di Castello. Successivamente per adeguarsi ai nuovi volumi di lavoro è stata trasferita in via Caduti Lecchesi a Fossoli, dove risiede tutt’ora.

Nel corso degli anni si sono affiancati i figli ed anche i marchi si sono succeduti. Dall’originaria officina autorizzata Citröen, la Botti snc di Virginio Botti & C. si è sviluppata divenendo dapprima officina autorizzata FIAT ed infine officina autorizzata Lancia.

Anche le attività si sono moltiplicate: pur essendo nata come una officina riparatore di autoveicoli e motoveicoli, la Botti snc di Virginio Botti & C. si è evoluta nel tempo affiancando anche la vendita di autovetture e di moto nuove ed usate e soprattutto con il servizio di soccorso stradale con carro attrezzi ed officina mobile.

Oggi l’officina offre ai sui clienti la competenza di meccanici e tecnici specializzati nei vari settori di competenza. Con il valido supporto di partner importanti nel settore mette a disposizione di tutti prodotti qualitativamente superiori, sicuri ed affidabili che garantiscono risultati di altissimo livello. I mezzi tecnici di cui dispone l’officina Botti sono macchinari all’avanguardia, sempre aggiornati, che garantiscono ai clienti la massima affidabilità dei risultati. Il personale tecnico ad essi dedicato è scrupolosamente preparato da corsi di aggiornamento nei centri tecnici specializzati delle case produttrici, sempre aggiornato e competente.

I nostri clienti sono il vanto dell’azienda, soddisfatti della cordialità e della cortesia del personale, dei prodotti e dei risultati ottenuti a termine lavori.

Nel 2011 la Botti snc di Virginio Botti & C. ha festeggiato un importante traguardo: 50 anni di attività!

Name: ALLSTAR CARS GmbH
Description:
Willkommen auf dem LinkedIn Profil der ALLSTAR CARS GmbH!

Seit unserer Eröffnung im Jahr 2019 bieten wir Ihnen eine umfassende Palette erstklassiger Dienstleistungen rund um Ihr Fahrzeug. Unser Unternehmen hat sich fest etabliert und ist stolz darauf, unseren Kunden einen unvergleichlichen Service in der Automobilbranche zu bieten.

Unsere Dienstleistungen:

1. Fahrzeughandel:

Entdecken Sie eine exklusive Auswahl an erstklassigen Fahrzeugen. Unser Fahrzeughandel bietet eine breite Palette von Modellen, vom stilvollen Stadtauto bis hin zum leistungsstarken Geländewagen. Jedes Fahrzeug wird sorgfältig ausgewählt, um höchste Qualität und Zufriedenheit zu gewährleisten.

2. Carrosserie:

Unsere erfahrenen Fachleute in der Carrosserieabteilung stehen bereit, um Ihr Fahrzeug nach Unfällen oder anderen Schäden wieder in Topform zu bringen. Wir setzen auf Präzision und Qualität, damit Ihr Fahrzeug wieder im besten Zustand erstrahlt.

3. Tuning:

Verleihen Sie Ihrem Fahrzeug eine individuelle Note mit unserem Tuning-Service. Unsere Experten arbeiten mit Ihnen zusammen, um das perfekte Upgrade für Ihr Auto zu finden. Vom sportlichen Look bis zur Leistungssteigerung bieten wir maßgeschneiderte Lösungen nach Ihren Wünschen.

4. Spritzwerk:

In unserem hochmodernen Spritzwerk setzen wir auf fortschrittliche Technologien und hochwertige Lacke, um Ihrem Fahrzeug einen makellosen und langlebigen Glanz zu verleihen. Egal, ob Reparaturen, Neulackierungen oder Lackaufbereitung - wir kümmern uns um jedes Detail.

5. Scheibenservice:

Bei Rissen, Steinschlägen oder anderen Glasschäden sind wir zur Stelle. Unser Scheibenservice bietet schnelle und zuverlässige Reparaturen oder den Austausch von Windschutzscheiben, um die Sicherheit und den Komfort Ihres Fahrzeugs zu gewährleisten.

Bei ALLSTAR CARS GmbH stehen Kundenzufriedenheit und höchste Qualitätsstandards im Mittelpunkt. Vertrauen Sie auf unsere Fachkompetenz, um Ihr Fahrzeug in besten Händen zu wissen.

Name: RESTORFX CHANTILLY - SAINT MAXIMIN
Description:
La technologie du Vernissage Sans Peinture (VSP) RestorFX est un process technique permettant de rénover en profondeur et de façon permanente le vernis d’une automobile pour lui redonner l’aspect du neuf.
Beaucoup plus performant que le lustrage, plus rapide et moins cher qu'une peinture neuve, RestorFX permet, aux professionnels de l'Automobile comme aux particuliers, de réduire les frais liés à la remise en état de la carrosserie.
Cette technologie est donc particulièrement adaptée pour la valorisation des parcs VO, les retours LLD ou LOA. Elle est idéale pour tous ceux qui souhaitent redonner de la valeur à leur véhicule pour le conserver ou mieux le revendre.

Name: RestorFxLibourne
Description:
RestorFX change l’industrie en redonnant à l'aspect peinture d’un véhicule sa brillance d’origine sans les frais élevés des ateliers de carrosserie ou les longs délais d’exécution.
Des milliers de produits sur le marché, rien n’est comparable à RestorFX. Il est en train de révolutionner la façon dont l’industrie automobile et d’esthétique restaure le vernis peinture.
Dans le cadre du processus d’assurance qualité, certains véhicules sont surveillés sur une période de dix ans pour s’assurer qu’il n’y a pas d’écaillage, de pelage ou de délaminage. RestorFX est une correction permanente et garantie.
Et avec des mises à l’essai et des évaluations en continu, RestorFX demeure le produit le plus avancé du marché.

Une Technologie révolutionnaire
Restauration complète et permanente
Résultats supérieurs à l’esthétique automobile traditionnelle
Alternative peu coûteuse comparativement à une nouvelle peinture
Satisfaction 100 % garantie
Sans danger pour l’environnement

Name: Engine Rebuild & Ceramic Coatings
Description:
Rebuilding all types of engines for over 28 years — specialising in MX bike and ATV engines for more than 20 years. A new workshop has been setup in Inverurie, Scotland, UK. 

If you have an engine that’s broken or simply needs a strip-down, inspection, and rebuild — or if you want to take it to the next level with customisation — we’ve got you covered. Whether it’s fitting aftermarket parts or applying a custom ceramic paint finish, we handle everything in-house.

We are Cerakote-certified applicators, offering the full range of high-performance ceramic coatings. If you're looking for a finish that delivers exceptional durability and corrosion resistance compared to other coatings on the market, Cerakote is the answer. We offer a wide selection of colours, including high-temperature and low-friction options. Our Custom FX colour range takes finishes to the next level with unique visual effects.

We can also apply coatings to a wide variety of items, including piping, valves, car and bike parts, manifolds, turbos, brake calipers, exhaust systems, bicycles, bike frames, golf clubs, tools, gym equipment, knives, cups, brackets, and much more. Depending on the coating type, parts are cured in our ovens at precise temperatures to ensure a fully bonded, long-lasting finish.

Wet and dry blasting is also part of our service, ensuring optimal surface preparation and maximum coating adhesion. Our multi-stage vapour blasting process can restore old aluminium or metal to an outstanding finish — ideal for gearboxes, cylinder heads, manifolds, and more. We can vapour blast and apply a clear ceramic topcoat to seal and protect the revitalised surface.

We also offer custom ATV builds, transforming standard race ATVs into professional-grade machines. Or, if you're just looking to upgrade your current ATV or bike with a few performance parts, we can help with that too.

All work is carried out by a certified mechanic and Cerakote applicator.

Name: Auto Papoušek
Description:
V srpnu, roku 1990, byl otevřen první autoservis v Praze 6 v Dejvicích, na ulici Čs. armády 28, s názvem AUTOSERVIS JIŘÍ PAPOUŠEK, který měl tehdy pouhé dva zaměstnance.

Již v následujícím roce byla zahájena výstavba nového autoservisu v Opletalově ulici 45 v Praze 1, který byl otevřen v březnu 1992. Tehdy firma zaměstnávala již přes šedesát zaměstnanců.

Za dobu 32 let firma vychovala řadu špičkových odborníků a na vysoké profesionální úrovni se etablovala v pražském regionu, kde ročně uspokojí více jak 8000 zákazníků.

Koncem roku 2007 byla firma Autoservis Jiří Papoušek vložena do dceřiné společnosti Auto Papoušek s.r.o.

Naše společnost je ryze český rodinný podnik, který uchovává svou tradici a již druhou generaci vychází vstříc každému zákazníkovi. Staráme se jak o firemní vozové parky, tak o jednotlivé klienty a provádíme kompletní servis a opravy vozů všech značek.

Name: VV-Tech LPG Ltd
Description:
VV-Tech LPG Limited converts cars, vans and trucks to LPG. Your vehicle becomes dual fuel and can be driven on either Petrol or LPG, or mix of Diesel and LPG after it is converted. It was established in September 2011 as an exclusive distributor of well-known and established brand of LPG conversions kits from Poland - AGCentrum.
The company grows a network of LPG conversions centres and outlets across Ireland.
Many of the agencies do car servicing and repairs too.

In most European countries LPG price does not exceed 60% of Petrol. No surprise it became one of the most popular alternatives to petrol.

There are over 17 million LPG converted cars in the World and due to the fact, that petrol prices are on the rise, this number is still growing.

You can easily save up to 50% on Petrol or 15% on Diesel if you decide to convert your vehicle to LPG.

Last but not least, your vehicle will become more eco-friendly producing 30% less CO2 emissions, so you can not only save money but also save our planet. Additionally all Diesel converted vehicles will produce less cancerogenic particles (unburned diesel seen on our roads as black smoke).

Name: Over The Road RV Repair
Description:
We RV too!



Since March 2021 we are FULL TIME! Our family of 5 moved into this Winnebago Forza 38W and we now travel all over the United States. Our dream was to retire early and explore this great country. The reality of full time RV'ing led us to start a mobile RV repair business because stuff happens! 



About Derek,

I am a successful entrepreneur and technology professional having spent 20+ years working in the oil & gas industry. I have worked as a field test engineer and scientist, solving mechanical problems and electrical automation issues on some of the largest drilling rigs in the world. When we started RV'ing I realized many of the same systems I worked on in oil & gas were very similar to those in our RV. I decided to go to NRVTA technician trade school to learn more detailed specifics about RV systems and technology, so I could help people like us. Our interest is making your RV experience fun and enjoyable, because there's really nothing more satisfying than helping a neighbor live out their vacation dreams too!



About Melissa,

I am also a successful entrepreneur and business professional having spent 10+ years working in the automotive industry. I was a service advisor, service dispatcher, and warranty claims administrator for a large Chevrolet, GMC, and Cadilac dealership near Houston Texas. My service experience background helps us navigate the complex world of RV component suppliers and parts distributors. I wanted to attend the NRVTA training to learn more about maintaining our RV, now I help people maintain their own.

En Tallers Suauto trabajamos cada día para que usted siga confiando en nosotros.

Brooklands startade som Lani Bil år 2000 och har sedan 2005 arbetat med Jaguar Land Rover och Range Rover. Det är till oss ni vänder er för service och reparation av din bil. Vi är auktoriserad verkstad för Jaguar Land Rover och Range Rover men vi har lång kunskap och erfarenhet av alla bilmärken och är därför anslutna till AD Bilverkstad. Skall ni köpa eller leasa bil så hjälper vi er att hitta rätt bil oavsett bilmärke. Tillsammans går vi igenom era önskemål och behov. Hittar vi ingen bil i vårt lager så kollar vi med dom kontakter vi har för att ni som kund skall få er drömbil. Brooklands har även bilförmedling, skadeverkstad, rekond och däckhotell.

Ett bevis på vårt jobb och engagemang är att vi flera år i rad har fått ta emot pris för den verkstad med nöjdast kunder!

Name: Leiting Automobile GmbH
Description:
Seit nunmehr über 30 Jahren sind wir Ansprechpartner bzw. Vertragshändler für die Marke SEAT. Seit 2004, also auch schon seit vielen Jahren, vertreten wir die zweite Tochter des VW-Konzerns: die Marke ŠKODA. Ergänzt wird unser Fahrzeugangebot von werkstattgeprüften Gebrauchtfahrzeugen, einer zertifizierten Reparatur-Werkstatt und einem exzellenten Service. Seit 2010 sind wir zudem mit einem Standort in Kleve vertreten.

Wir bieten die gesamte Palette an Dienstleistungen, die ein Autohaus ausmachen: den Verkauf von Neu- und Dienstwagen der Marken SEAT und ŠKODA. Außerdem der Verkauf qualitätsgeprüfter Gebrauchtwagen. Die Wartung aller SEAT und ŠKODA-Fahrzeuge nach Vorgaben der Hersteller, natürlich unter Verwendung der Originalteile und mit einer Mobilitätsgarantie. Unfallschäden oder auch kleinere Dellen und Beulen werden bei uns fachgerecht instandgesetzt. Ein Hol- und Bringservice oder auch der Euromobil-Mietwagen-Service sorgen für einen stressfreien Ablauf der Autoreparatur. Außerhalb der Öffnungszeiten bieten wir einen Notdienst an, 24 Stunden am Tag, 7 Tage die Woche. Wenn es Original-Ersatzteile und Reifen sein sollen haben wir auch dafür Spezialisten, die Ihnen gerne weiterhelfen. Sollten weitere Fragen über uns bestehen, können Sie sich gerne mit uns in Verbindung setzen.

Name: UnderCover UnderCoaters
Description:
Top-tier vehicle undercoating services right at your doorstep. 

Founded to offer an easy alternative to the high cost, inconvenience and sparseness of existing options. We're eliminating the hassle of jockeying for an appointment at a busy, traditional auto shop and waiting for your vehicle for 12 to 36 hours. 

Why would you want to undercoat your car or truck?

Rust eats brake lines, fuel tanks, control arms - and worst of all - your frame. Salt, calcium chloride and magnesium chloride used to treat roads accelerates rust. Even plain old water causes rust. Undercoating will save you on repair costs, reduce the risk of accidents from failed components and prolong the life of your vehicle's frame. We see too many vehicles with lots of life left in the engine and transmission get taken off the road due to rusted-out frames. A tragedy!

Visit us at www.undercoverundercoaters.com

Name: Brad's Service Center
Description:
Brad’s Service Center has a longstanding history in Western Massachusetts and the Chicopee community for domestic and foreign auto repair. 

Brad grew the operation tremendously from inception– from a single-bay shop to the 20+ bay shop we have today.

After Brad’s untimely passing in 2021, his son, Peyton, took over the reins of the business, improving upon the foundation of the business his late father built. 

Peyton decided to sell the business in late 2021 to Teamshares.  With the assistance of Teamshares, Brad’s is proudly now an employee-owned company and will continue to build on the Leveillee’s legacy.  This employee-ownership model allows Brad’s to recognize the contributions of the many employees who spent many years working alongside Brad in building the business.

Brad’s Service Center continues to be an active member of the community– supporting local schools, civic events, and nonprofits.

Name: Palmauto Officina Meccanica
Description:
Chi Siamo:

Palmauto, situata nel cuore di Casalbuttano, è un'autofficina autorizzata Renault e orgoglioso membro della Rete Autorizzata RENAULT. Specializzati nella manutenzione e riparazione di veicoli, ci impegniamo a offrire servizi di altissima qualità per assicurare la massima performance e sicurezza di ogni auto che affidate alle nostre cure.

La nostra officina combina l'expertise tecnica con tecnologie diagnostiche all'avanguardia, permettendoci di affrontare qualsiasi sfida, dalla manutenzione ordinaria alle riparazioni più complesse. Il nostro team è costantemente aggiornato sulle ultime novità Renault e non solo, garantendo un servizio impeccabile e in linea con gli standard moderni.

I Nostri Servizi:

Manutenzione e Assistenza: Servizi di manutenzione preventiva e riparazioni specifiche per veicoli Renault, seguendo gli standard di qualità del marchio.

Diagnostica Avanzata: Utilizzo di strumentazione specifica Renault per diagnosi precise e interventi mirati.

Ricambi Originali: Forniamo solo pezzi di ricambio originali, assicurando la massima compatibilità e performance.

Consulenza Personalizzata: Offriamo consulenze esperte per ottimizzare la durata e le prestazioni del vostro veicolo.

Perché Scegliere Palmauto:

Come autofficina autorizzata Renault, Palmauto si impegna a mantenere gli elevati standard di qualità e affidabilità che i clienti Renault si aspettano. La nostra appartenenza alla Rete Autorizzata RENAULT ci permette di avere accesso diretto a formazioni, aggiornamenti tecnici e supporto dal marchio, assicurando che il vostro veicolo riceva le cure migliori e più aggiornate disponibili.

Invitiamo tutti i proprietari di veicoli a Casalbuttano e dintorni a scoprire il livello superiore di cura e attenzione che Palmauto può offrire. La vostra soddisfazione e sicurezza sono la nostra priorità assoluta.

3. الوصول إلى موقعك: من برمجة السيارات وفحص الكمبيوتر إلى تغيير البطارية والإطارات وخدمات التلميع والعناية، يصلون إليك أينما كنت.

تميزنا:
- وضوح الأسعار والمعلومات، ما تراه هو ما تدفعه.
- القرار بيدك. نوفر خيارات متعددة وأنت تختار ما يناسبك بكل وضوح.
- نتعامل فقط مع مقدمي خدمات المعتمدين، ونتابع رضاك لتجربة أفضل.
- لا للبحث  والتنقل، كل ما تحتاجه متاح لك بضغطة زر.
- نظام تقييمات موثوق يساعدك في اتخاذ القرار الصحيح.

نساهم في دعم التحول الرقمي لقطاع خدمات المركبات، فيكس لاين ليست مجرد منصة، بل شريكك الأفضل في رحلة العناية بمركبتك.

Name: RETÍFICA DE MOTORES IDEAL JF
Description:
Fundada em 1985, nossa trajetória começou com a retífica de motores movidos a diesel para transportadores que utilizavam o corredor logístico do Aeroporto Internacional de Viracopos, em Campinas/SP.
Movidos por uma paixão pelo ramo de retífica, logo expandimos nosso atendimento para atender os moradores da região, abrangendo motores movidos a diesel, gasolina, etanol e GNV. A satisfação dos nossos clientes foi a força motriz para o crescimento da empresa: indicações espontâneas de parentes e amigos nos ajudaram a ultrapassar as fronteiras de Campinas e alcançar outras regiões, sempre com a mesma dedicação e compromisso com a qualidade.
Ao longo dos anos, investimos continuamente em tecnologia de ponta, treinamento de equipe e logística eficiente. Esses esforços consolidaram nossa posição como uma das principais retíficas de motores do Estado de São Paulo. Hoje, atendemos clientes em todo o território nacional, oferecendo excelência e garantia de qualidade a empresas, governos e pessoas físicas que confiam em nosso trabalho quando o assunto é retífica de motores.

Specjalizuje się również w naprawie naczep Kögel, Wielton, Feber, Kassbohrer, Mega, Meiller Kipper których autoryzację posiada od kilku lat. W ramach autoryzacji dokonuje przeglądów oraz napraw gwarancyjnych związanych z pełnym zakresem podzespołów w nich występujących, a w szczególności układów hamulcowych Wabco, Knorr, Haldex, układów jezdnych BPW, SAF i Mercedes-Benz TrailerAxleSystems oraz nóg podporowych JOST.

Truck Partner zajmuje się ponadto naprawami powypadkowymi i związanym z tym prostowaniem ram i kabin. Do prostowania wykorzystuje profesjonalny sprzęt firmy Cellete w którego skład wchodzą pompy, siłowniki hydrauliczne, wierze ciągnące do kabin, a także różnego typu oprzyrządowanie łącznie z płytą podłogową. Dzięki zastosowaniu podgrzewacza indukcyjnego firmy JOSAM nie narażamy instalacji elektrycznej i osprzętu pojazdu na uszkodzenia jak to ma miejsce w przypadku używania tradycyjnego palnika i otwartego ognia, a także nie powodujemy zmian w strukturze stali konstrukcyjnej. Do sprawdzenia dokładności wykonania naprawy, używamy systemu pomiarowego JOSAM.

W zakresie szerokiego wachlarzu prac mechanicznych związanego z naprawą silników, skrzyń biegów, zawieszenia itp., serwis wykonuje także naprawy elektryczne a także związane z nimi montaże urządzeń Toll Collect do automatycznego naliczania opłat za przejazd po niemieckich autostradach oraz montaże i sprawdzanie tachografów.

في أوتوماجيك ، نفتخر بقدرتنا على تنفيذ عملية إعادة التعلم لجميع الوحدات ، بما في ذلك النقطة العمياء و نظام الحفاظ علي المسار و الرادارات. لدينا فنيون ماهرون لديهم سنوات من الخبرة في العمل مع جميع أنواع السيارات وملتزمون بتوفير خدمة عالية الجودة يمكنك الاعتماد عليها.

سواء كنت بحاجة إلى إصلاح بسيط أو تركيب معقد ، لدينا الخبرة والمعدات اللازمة لإنجاز العمل بشكل صحيح من المرة الأولى.

Our programming services also extend to brand new and used keyfobs.

At AutoMagic, we pride ourselves on our ability to perform the relearn process for all modules, including BSM, lane keep assists, and radars. Our skilled technicians have years of experience working with all types of vehicles and are dedicated to providing high-quality service that you can trust.

Whether you need a simple repair or a complex installation, we have the expertise and equipment to get the job done right the first time. Our state-of-the-art diagnostic tools and equipment allow us to quickly and accurately diagnose any electrical issues and provide reliable solutions to get you back on the road as quickly as possible.

For all your auto electrical needs, trust the experts at AutoMagic.

Name: Fleet Fix
Description:
Fleet Fix is a pioneering company based in the UAE, focused on delivering innovative and comprehensive fleet maintenance solutions. With an aim to simplify the complex and often fragmented process of fleet care, we provide end-to-end services that empower businesses to optimize their fleet operations, minimize costs, and ensure maximum uptime.

Since our inception just a few months ago, Fleet Fix has grown rapidly, partnering with over 15 garages across the UAE and managing a fleet size exceeding 500+ vehicles. Our mission is straightforward: to take the stress out of fleet maintenance, allowing our clients to focus on their core operations. With a strong commitment to operational excellence and innovation, Fleet Fix is setting new standards in the fleet care industry.

The Problem We Solve

Managing a fleet can be a logistical nightmare for businesses. Common challenges include:

Unpredictable Downtime: Vehicle breakdowns can disrupt operations, leading to financial losses.
Fragmented Services: Businesses often struggle to coordinate between garages, spare part suppliers, and service providers.
Lack of Transparency: Fleet owners often face unclear pricing and inconsistent service quality.
Data Deficiency: Without clear analytics, businesses cannot make informed decisions to optimize their fleet operations.
Fleet Fix was born to address these pain points. We offer a centralized solution to manage all aspects of fleet care, delivering efficiency, transparency, and peace of mind to our clients.

Name: Wheelmate
Description:
Puncher helps users avoid the need for self-labor and provides a cost-effective solution for real-time problem-solving, saving time and minimizing the distance that users must travel to receive assistance.

There are some differences in the way that car and bike tires are repaired when they become flat. One key difference is the size of the tires. Car tires are typically larger and wider than bike tires, which can affect the repair process.

To fix a flat car tire, you will typically need to use a patch or plug to cover the puncture. A patch is a piece of rubber that is applied to the inside of the tire and then sealed with special glue. A plug is a piece of rubber that is inserted into the tire and then sealed with a special adhesive. Both patches and plugs are designed to seal the puncture and prevent air from escaping from the tire.

Name: Paint Correction by Associated
Description:
Paint Correction by Associated is a full-service paint correction and auto detailing company in Crofton, Maryland. Founded in 2011 by Daniel Zagami and Harry Zagami, Vice President of Associated Building Maintenance Co., Inc. 

We are tuned into the needs of our customers, and your satisfaction is our top priority. We use top of the line chemicals and waxes to get the job done and above all exceed expectations. In addition, we are trained in the latest buffing techniques. We specialize in heavy-duty trucks, SUV's as well as cars and other vehicles.

It is important to distinguish between paintwork that has been truly corrected and paintwork that has been treated with products that are designed to mask and fill surface imperfections. This is not paint correction--even if no scratches or blemishes are apparent. The imperfections have not been genuinely removed and are still present under the product fillers, which will quickly wash away and reveal them once again. 

And that's why you should leave the hard work up to us at Paint Correction by Associated where you know the job will always be done right.

Das Unternehmen bietet ein breites Serviceangebot an verschiedenen Dienstleistungen für verschiedenste Fahrzeuge an. Wartungen, Reparaturen aber auch der 24/7 Pannenservice und die Ausführung von Sonderbauten zeichnen das Unternehmen aus. 

Innerhalb der letzten Jahre überzeugte die Werkstatt durch ihre Innovationskraft. In 2022 wurde der Betrieb komplett neu errichtet und ist zu diesem Zeitpunkt bereits so geplant worden, dass sämtliche vorhandene und kommende Fahrzeugantriebstechnologien bedient werden können. 

Um die Prozesse innerhalb der Werkstatt möglichst umweltfreundlich durchzuführen, produziert das Unternehmen Strom für den Eigenbedarf auf einer auf dem Dach installierten Photovoltaikanlage. Im Gebäude sind darüber hinaus Wärmepumpen sowie energiesparende Fußbodenheizungen verbaut. Heisel & Heiner ist im ISO Qualitäts- und Umweltmanagementsystem und unterzieht sich jährlichen freiwilligen Kontrollen zur Erhaltung der im Unternehmen definierten Standards.

Name: Assist EV
Description:
Assist EV helps you make the most out of your EV charging experience through leading cloud-based software integration. From finding your nearest charge point to payment solutions, Assist EV gives you everything you need regarding your EV charging choices, right at your fingertips.

Why use the Assist EV app?
-More choice. The Assist EV app allows you to locate different charge points and filter by kind (AC/DC) and connector (CCS, Type2, etc.) to meet your specific needs

-Easy payment. Where there is a fee, you can pay directly through the EV charge points different payment methods, including credit/debit card and balance top-ups. You'll be charged per hour or kWh of electricity you consume

-Information on each charge point. You can view the tariff of a charge point, its availability, and any relevant information about the location (for example, if the charge point is on a dedicated floor of a parking space)

-Quick and easy charging. You can add your most used EV charge points to your favourites and reserve charge points. Charging can start by scanning the QR code of the EVSE through the app or by using an associated RFID tag

-Charge management. You can manage your own account, balance, payment methods, and subscriptions. You can also redeem vouchers and promo codes!


With the need for access to public and commercial EV charge points growing, it’s our ethos to make this as easy and stress-free as possible for Assist EV app users. The app has been developed through strenuous user testing and experience feedback to ensure a seamless electric journey.

Name: S & B Motors (London) Limited
Description:
S&B Motors is a Bosch Car Service Centre, whether you’re looking for an MOT test, electric vehicle repairs, a service, tyres or a new exhaust, we can do it and what’s more, we want to! We provide you with affordable service of the highest standard and the very best customer experience.

It all started when…

Now in its third generation, S&B Motors has been a family-run, independent garage since 1965. The company was founded by Peter Boyce and William (Bill) Slevin. In 1975 Peter’s son, Steve Boyce finished school and started as a trainee. Steve worked through the ranks, gaining both experience and management skills from his father and Bill.

Bill, unfortunately, passed away in 1986 and Steve began to share duties with his father. In 1993, upon Peter’s retirement, Steve became the proprietor and expanded the business. Following in her father’s footsteps, Steve’s daughter Natalie joined the team in 2006. Like her father, Natalie felt there was something special about family-led businesses and upon Steve’s retirement took over the business with the manager Sean Regan.


Right from the start, the company’s reputation was built on reliability and honesty rather than just price. As we are now servicing and repairing vehicles for the third generation of many of the same families, who became customers and friends all those years ago, we feel this decision was the right one.

We have an extremely low turnover of staff – our longest standing member of staff, consequently, many of our customers have come to know our technicians and will often have the same person maintaining their vehicle for the whole time they own it. This means you get the benefit of decades of local experience and a heritage of excellence when you need it most.

Name: Volvo-Lotte
Description:
EEN LOT UIT DE LOTERIJ! 
‘Lotte’ is Zweeds voor een lot uit de loterij. Voor ons heeft het een dubbele betekenis, want het is niet alleen dat ons bedrijf letterlijk begonnen is met het winnen van een Volvo PV544 in een loterij, maar het staat ook voor het gevoel dat we onze klanten willen bieden als ze bij ons wegrijden in een net aangeschafte Volvo klassieker; alsof ze de loterij hebben gewonnen!
Volvo’s komen uit het land met lange, eenzame wegen door oneindige naaldbossen. Een land met barre winters. Maar ook het land waar mensen wonen met gevoel voor stijl en design, gekoppeld aan een nuchterheid die ze zelf ‘lagom’ noemen: precies goed. 
Die cultuur komt terug in het ontwerp en de uitstraling van alle Volvo’s: betrouwbaar, solide, robuust, veilig, direct herkenbaar en zeker ook sportief. Het verhaal dat je met een Volvo 1.000.000 kilometers kunt afleggen, is waar: Volvo’s zijn vrienden voor het leven! 
Volvo-Lotte is uw adres voor prachtige Volvo klassiekers en youngtimers, maar ook voor het onderhoud en reparatie, restauratie (een Volvo verdient het om in topstaat gebracht te worden), onderdelen en voor het huren van een auto voor een speciale gelegenheid. 
Kom gerust eens kijken bij Volvo-Lotte in het mooie Ophemert, waar de liefde voor ‘klassiek en jong Zweeds’ voelbaar is. Onder het genot van een Zweedse ‘fika’, koffie met een koffiebroodje, praten we verder!

Unsere Besonderheiten:

Umweltfreundliche Reinigung:
Jede unserer Reinigungen spart mindestens 30 L Trinkwasser und setzt auf nur 0,3 L unseres biologisch abbaubaren Reinigungsmittels für umweltfreundliche Ergebnisse.

Mobiler Dienstleistung:
Durch unsere mobilen Reinigungsteams, die direkt zum Firmenstandort kommen, minimieren wir unnötige Transporte. Dies reduziert CO2-Emissionen und hilft Unternehmen, ihren Carbon-Fußabdruck zu verkleinern.

Soziales Engagement:
Unser Ansatz bei CleenUp Deutschland fokussiert nicht nur auf Integration, sondern gibt Menschen auch die Chance, ihr eigenes Unternehmen auf sicherem Fundament aufzubauen. Mit unserer Unterstützung und Schulung ebnet sich der Weg zum unternehmerischen Erfolg.

Unsere Werte:
Transparenz und Ethik - sind fest in unserer Firmenkultur verankert. Stetige Optimierung und globale Best Practices sichern unsere hohen Standards.

Mehr als umweltfreundliche Fahrzeugreinigung: 
Wir streben danach, einen nachhaltigen Einfluss auf unsere Umwelt, unsere Mitarbeiter und die gesamte Gesellschaft zu nehmen.

Gemeinsam gestalten wir eine saubere, grüne und gerechte Zukunft!

Name: BUNCARE
Description:
● DETAILING ●

Le detailing est plus qu'un processus de nettoyage pour donner à un véhicule une belle apparence, mais une approche systématique pour aider à prolonger sa durée de vie avec des méthodes et des produits qui réduisent les éléments environnementaux nocifs tels que la saleté, le soleil, les hivers rigoureux, etc...
C'est un entretien ou une restauration appropriée des véhicules pour qu'ils gardent leur aspect extérieur et intérieur comme s'ils venaient d'une salle d'exposition ou d'un concessionnaire automobile. Un car-staging augmente également leur valeur de revente tout comme il est pratique courante dans le domaine de l'immobilier.
L'esthétique automobile nécessite une connaissance des techniques appropriées et l'utilisation d'outils et de produits.
Un detailing est généralement divisés en deux catégories: extérieur et intérieur(ou cabine). Il existe des produits et des services qui se concentrent spécifiquement sur ces deux domaines.

● CONCIERGERIE ●

Vous cherchez l'écrin que votre véhicule mérite ou vous souhaitez faire garder votre véhicule dans un garage idéalement placé, avec accès H24 et sécurisé (alarmes, portes doubles, chauffé, protections anti-incendies, etc...)?
Une révision, un contrôle technique, un changement de pneumatique ?
Ne perdez plus votre temps : il s’agit du type de tâches prises en charge par une société de conciergerie automobile.
La conciergerie automobile ou « Car Caring » est un concept né outre atlantique et qui tend à se développer en France.
Il est basé sur le modèle de ce qui existe dans les plus grands hôtels à travers le monde, et qui veut que les concierges soient à votre disposition pour vous apporter les solutions à tous vos problèmes.
BUNCARE, c’est une transposition de cette logique au monde de l’automobile.

We specialize in high-end care for cars, boats, RVs, and even aircraft, transforming vehicles into works of art inside and out. Whether restoring a showroom shine or protecting your ride with cutting-edge coatings, we offer custom solutions that go far beyond the basics.

We believe in elevating the detailing experience. With over 15 years of expertise, our team knows exactly how to bring out the best in your vehicle using only the highest-quality products and techniques. Our ceramic coatings provide an invisible, hydrophobic shield that guards against UV rays, oxidation, and environmental damage while delivering a sleek, high-gloss finish that lasts. Our Paint Protection Film (PPF) ensures your vehicle stays free from chips and scratches, preserving its beauty for years.

For those who crave something bold, our custom wraps offer endless options to make a statement. From striking matte finishes to vivid color changes, we’ll help you express your unique style while adding an extra layer of protection to your ride. We treat every vehicle as a masterpiece in the making.

At Glazed Auto Spa, we don’t just meet expectations—we exceed them. Our expert team listens closely to your needs, offering personalized recommendations and top-tier service every step of the way. Whether it’s a luxury car or a commercial fleet, we deliver excellence in every detail.

We’re proud to offer flexible mobile services throughout the Phoenix metropolitan area, bringing the full Glazed Auto Spa experience to your door. Our facility is equipped to handle any detailing challenge. 

Driven by innovation, we’re pushing the boundaries of vehicle care. Our advanced coatings, designed for both consumer and military applications, represent the future of protection. When you choose Glazed Auto Spa, you’re not just getting a service—you’re experiencing the next level in detailing excellence.

Name: Destak Auto Center
Description:
Na Destak Auto Center, nossa história é forjada na paixão por automóveis e no compromisso inabalável com a excelência em cuidados automotivos. Temos sido uma parte confiável da comunidade, oferecendo serviços de alta qualidade que mantêm os veículos em perfeito estado de funcionamento e proporcionam tranquilidade aos motoristas.

O que nos torna único é o nosso compromisso com o atendimento ao cliente excepcional e nossa equipe de profissionais altamente treinados. Cada membro da nossa equipe compartilha a mesma paixão pelos carros, e isso se reflete na qualidade de cada serviço que realizamos. Nossos técnicos são especialistas em manutenção e reparo de uma ampla variedade de veículos, e eles estão empenhados em manter seu carro em ótimas condições.

Além disso, investimos constantemente em tecnologia de última geração e equipamentos de última geração para garantir que nossos serviços estejam sempre atualizados e de alta qualidade. Valorizamos a inovação e a sustentabilidade, buscando constantemente maneiras de tornar nosso trabalho mais eficiente e amigável ao meio ambiente.

Na Destak, consideramos que a chave para a satisfação do cliente é compreender suas necessidades individuais. Estamos dedicados a fornecer soluções personalizadas para cada veículo que atendemos, garantindo que cada motorista saia satisfeito com os resultados.

Estamos orgulhosos de nossa trajetória e ansiosos para continuar a atender nossos clientes com a qualidade que eles merecem. Seja para manutenção de rotina, reparos complexos ou serviços premium, estamos aqui para atender todas as suas necessidades automotivas. Junte-se a nós na jornada de cuidados automotivos de excelência.

Name: Lima Diesel S.R.L
Description:
La empresa LIMA DIESEL S.R.L nació el  19 de julio de 1986, inicia en la localidad de Arequipa sus operaciones, siendo los pioneros en los servicios de mantenimiento, reparación de bombas de inyección, inyectores convencional y electrónicos en todos los modelos y marcas como BOSCH, ZEXEL, DENSO, CAT, etc.
En el año 1994, logramos un local propio para continuar con la misión y visión de brindar un servicio de primer nivel para la satisfacción de nuestros clientes por ello en el año de 1996 se logró obtener niveles internacionales, la representación como SERVICIO AUTORISADO BOSCH siendo uno de los primeros en el sur del Perú, en el mismo año se implementó el servicio de mantenimiento y reparación de TURBOCOMPRENSORES de todos los modelos y marcas. En tal sentido, la empresa LIMA DIESEL para estar a la par con los adelantos tecnológicos capacito al personal en el extranjero y se adquirió equipos, herramientas, y maquinarias computarizadas de ultima generación homologadas por la fábrica BOSCH. 
En el año 2007 ,se obtuvo la representación como único servicio autorizado DELPHI para toda la región sur del Perú. 
En la actualidad contamos con 2 talleres totalmente equipados en la Ciudad de Arequipa y listos para poder atender tus vehículos.

Name: Wash Me Car Wash MN
Description:
Wash Me Car Wash is a self- service car wash with 5 Manual Wash Bays and 1 Manual Truck Bay, that is able to fit up to dump trucks and Semi's! 
Our goal is to serve the people and businesses of the Rochester Minnesota and surrounding areas to create lasting first impressions through clean and well-kept vehicles. To do this we offer: heated bays for comfort and better cleaning conditions, heated water for a deeper and more thorough clean, vacuums and commercial grade scented carpet cleaning equipment for a complete internal and external clean. To top off your vehicles cleaning, we also offer consistently filled, and updated vending options that include scented air fresheners, external drying towels, internal sanitizing tow-lets, latex gloves, and much more. Wash Me Car Wash is here to help you with all your washing needs. We believe that if you want something done right, do it yourself. Come visit Wash Me Car Wash today, where we put the Wash in Wash Me. ALL equipment and vehicles welcome!

Name: SOLO - Love Your Car
Description:
Solo offers online car services that include maintenance services and annual tests (at a vehicle testing institute), without leaving the comfort of your home. 
The service includes full transparency in the work process and the option to choose between original parts (OE) or aftermarket parts so that you can save substantial expenses - without compromising quality and the car dealer's warranty. 
In addition, Solo has a huge digital store of car accessories and spare parts, where by entering a license number you can individually customize the part or accessory for your car.
